name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: 2024 November e-newsletter
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2024 November e-newsletter
---
|
---
| **Top of the Hill Festival fosters economic vitality**

Dear friends, Thank you for all who participated in the inaugural and very successful Top of the Hill Festival in Daly City, Saturday, Oct. 19. I couldn’t be prouder of city leadership to bring this vibrant celebration of the city’s economic vitality, which offered a unique platform for the arts, entertainment and community connection. And thank you to my colleagues on the Board of Supervisors for approving my request of $35,000 in Measure K district-discretionary funds to support this incredible community-building festival. As an economic development strategy to support local businesses in the northern segment of the Mission Street Corridor, city leadership believes it is critical to bring in visitors and local residents to the neighborhood to spotlight and invigorate the area. This festival will be catalyst for such an endeavor. By driving foot traffic and creating a lively atmosphere, the city aims to stimulate economic growth and enhance Daly City’s reputation as a thriving destination. Key event features included a vendor market, food trucks and booths, live entertainment, interactive activities, cultural exhibits and resource tables from nonprofit and community organizations. Kudos to Mayor Juslyn Manalo and City Manager Tom Piccolotti for focusing on revitalizing this very vital business corridor in Daly City.
---
| **
Kapwa Kultural Center officially opens its doors** I was so proud to join the Kapwa Kultural Center soft opening at 11-B San Pedro Road in Daly City. It finally has its own home to empower Filipina/x/o youth with innovative programming, leadership skills and mental health education. The proposal for Kapwa Kultural Center formally came about in 2018 and has been a community dream for more than a decade and born out of the San Mateo County Filipino Mental Health Initiative (FMHI) and I was happy to contribute $100,000 in my district discretionary Measure K funds in 2023 to help get the project off the ground. The mission of Kapwa Kultural Center (KKC) is to integrate culturally affirming programming for Filipina/x/o youth that combines leadership skills, workforce preparedness, entrepreneurial mentorship, and ethnic studies to support positive cultural identity formation and mental health education. KKC is a department of the Daly City Partnership, a nonprofit offering social services to promote over well-being. This includes basic safety-net services such as food, clothing, housing (rental assistance), diapers and school supplies. Kudos to Stephanie Balon, LMFT and Christi Morales-Kumasawa, AMFT, both Pinay mental health clinicians, who serve as FMHI SMC Co-Chairs. In 2018, they wrote a Request for Proposal to announce their development of an innovative mental health project in San Mateo County. In due time, the Mental Health Services Act Innovation program approved their social business enterprise model to be carried out in five years with the award of $2.5 million in state funds to carry out the project. This is an incredible accomplishment and I encourage anyone feeling lonely or stressed to pay a visit and experience some real cultural connectivity.
---
|
**Digital access a necessity for all like electricity and water** Thank you to the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors for unanimously passing two resolutions in October that I sponsored to advance digital access for older adults and equal access to high-speed internet for every home, educational institution and business in the county. Across the nation, more than 1 in 5 older adults do not have access to the internet which creates challenges that can lead to social isolation and poor health outcomes. We live in a time where reliable, high-speed internet access is no longer a luxury, it is a necessity just like electricity and water. As 7% of our county’s residents currently live without access to high-speed internet, we must double down on our commitment to bridge the digital divide because if we don’t, existing inequities will only deepen. Here in the heart of Silicon Valley, we’ve made great strides to increase access to older adults and our youth, but I can’t rest until every home, every business and every student has access to high-speed internet and the technology to access it. In 2014, San Mateo County launched its SMC Public WiFi program to help build out this infrastructure and provide modern on ramps to the resources available online. In addition to servicing unserved and underserved communities, SMC Public WiFi supports educational opportunities for students, spurs local economic development and provides greater access to county services. To learn more about the San Mateo County Digital Equity Portal and see a list of free public WiFi hotspots in the county go to: [https://www.smcgov.org/smc-digital-equity-portal](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ad7d5f565e&e=c0babbc643).
---
|

**Woodside Road/Port of Redwood City project secures $105 million federal grant**

In July, I announced the the San Mateo County Transportation Authority (TA) and Redwood City will receive up to $48 million in Regional Measure 3 toll funds from the Metropolitan Transportation Commission for the $300 million project. This initiative will enhance the Port of Redwood City and ease traffic at the Highway 101/Woodside Road interchange.

I’m proud to say the TA recently announced the SR84-US101 Interchange Reimagined Improvement Project will receive an additional $105 million federal grant from the Infrastructure for Rebuilding America program (INFRA) that will help close a funding gap

Securing the $105 million INFRA grant was contingent on the TA and Redwood City first securing the $48 million MTC grant.

The interchange provides access to San Mateo County residential communities in Redwood City, North Fair Oaks, Menlo Park and Woodside while supporting industrial activities around the Port of Redwood City, and thousands of jobs at Seaport Center and Pacific Shores.

As the MTC Legislation Chair, I and fellow Commissioner Gina Papan prioritized these improvements to the full MTC Board of Commissioners June 26, which unanimously approved the request. Kudos to the port’s Executive Director Kristine Zortman and SAMCEDA CEO Rosanne Foust (pictured above) for helping to spearhead this project.

Redwood City and the TA plan to start construction in 2027 on a series of safety improvements that will include more than four miles of new bicycle/pedestrian infrastructure as well as improved access for transit shuttles linking the Redwood City Caltrain station and the new San Francisco Bay Ferry terminal planned for the Port of Redwood City.
---
| **Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=8204a6b022&e=c0babbc643). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org ](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org )
---
| **Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=13ccd532a4&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=d381926355&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=4a0fdf8984&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 In friendship,
David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2024 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=3899bbe287) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=3899bbe287).

[](https://login.mailchimp.com/signup/email-referral/?aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5)

I’m proud to say the TA recently announced the SR84-US101 Interchange Reimagined Improvement Project will receive an additional $105 million federal grant from the Infrastructure for Rebuilding America program (INFRA) that will help close a funding gap Securing the $105 million INFRA grant was contingent on the TA and Redwood City first securing the $48 million MTC grant. The interchange provides access to San Mateo County residential communities in Redwood City, North Fair Oaks, Menlo Park and Woodside while supporting industrial activities around the Port of Redwood City, and thousands of jobs at Seaport Center and Pacific Shores. As the MTC Legislation Chair, I and fellow Commissioner Gina Papan prioritized these improvements to the full MTC Board of Commissioners June 26, which unanimously approved the request. Kudos to the port’s Executive Director Kristine Zortman and SAMCEDA CEO Rosanne Foust (pictured above) for helping to spearhead this project. Redwood City and the TA plan to start construction in 2027 on a series of safety improvements that will include more than four miles of new bicycle/pedestrian infrastructure as well as improved access for transit shuttles linking the Redwood City Caltrain station and the new San Francisco Bay Ferry terminal planned for the Port of Redwood City. | Interns wanted to join our team We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: . You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org | Battling food insecurity Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: CalFresh: Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: Contact: (650) 802-6576, mailto:antorres@smcgov.org Daly City Partnership: DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: Second Harvest Food Bank: Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 In friendship, David J. Canepa | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved.

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39277%2E3422442%2ExiQQ9b)
Derek,
The sting of losing isn’t easy, but _we are not giving up._
Our fundamental freedoms, our planet, our democracy are too important—we have to fight for them.
**[Truth to Power brings the power of the people to bear against Washington corruption—and Donald Trump is at the top of our list. Will you turn anger into action by chipping in now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241107-2?refcode=em20241107-39277&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39277_3422442_xiQQ9b&akid=39277%2E3422442%2ExiQQ9b)**
If you’re feeling lost and asking yourself where we go from here, you’re not alone. But there are certain truths that can light the path forward.
**Fact:** Donald Trump’s corruption cannot go unchecked.
**Fact:** Several candidates endorsed by Truth to Power (and fueled by YOUR donations) won their elections. Now they can play a critical role in Congress demanding accountability from the Trump administration.
**Fact:** Our fight is just getting started, and our work is 100% grassroots funded.
MAGA would like nothing better than for supporters like ours to shrug and give up. With your help, we can do the opposite and get to work NOW getting more progressive candidates to Congress and state and local offices.

TTP

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: This is urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Peter, I wouldn't reach out again if it weren't important.
Our race in Nevada is still too close to call. This race will be one of the tightest in the country, and unless we raise another $115,762 before midnight, we could fall short of the critical resources we need to pull ahead and win.
The hard truth is that Nevada is won by the margins, so please, will you chip in right now to help tip the scales in our favor to keep Nevada blue?

name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: Republicans Win Supermajority in NH State Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yNjA4NDg0NjUzNTQzMjAwNTYwJmM9bThtNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMzgyNjgwOTk5JmQ9cTBjOXc3dw==.ldm6Aynx2OK5wwyyGDN2hW4IUFaJRKgALcHwHt6zzAM)
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Friends, Before the election, I predicted that we would win 15 seats. I was wrong -- We won 16! For the first time in over a decade, the Republicans will have a supermajority in our State Senate. This election was a strong endorsement of the work that our majority has done over the past four years. The voters of New Hampshire have spoken and their message is loud and clear - New Hampshire wants common-sense Republican rule in our state government. We want to keep taxes low with a fiscally responsible government. We want better education for all children regardless of family income and we want parents’ rights protected. We want to protect the safety of our communities from homelessness, drugs and illegal immigration. I want to congratulate all of our incumbent candidates that secured re-election and our new State Senators-elect David Rochefort, Mark McConkey, Tim McGough and Victoria Sullivan. And I would like to thank the voters of New Hampshire for putting their trust in us to keep New Hampshire headed down the path to prosperity. Thank you again! \- Senate President Jeb Bradley
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC. Jeb Bradley, Chairman

body:

[ ](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlGpBLNM9DdY-TrFptiHSq-L9c1ri9sVau_yBdU3bjlcgt11yaiPOxQivUjcB0wPJ7iVBr1KD5Kw_Au8YlZRNISvbRqmnpC5FHTydhRX9UzdPO5OFb8ro1RLgK5SB1PHGk_tR88FEYU8_tcCfXI1ekfJADp_KPGd7JVor3teve762tdfPTwuncN9SJyyXQWs3Zgx-1chnChEDdhGEiy_MW44zval4xGPzjCCugQXs2OjSbAlooSahEbmq1gUUpmmnbIxbs-AD9twEEcZAvcgWAaGg9ADRLyKU48UzXjO71h5IUInQmrjwNx7QQVXvNAsVciLvw02N0i_sk_X03Oy4NapcLkpWq6iJKJQzgp4-FIQ/4ba/tCzaA0TbRtiYGKQ0AuGMhQ/h0/h001.kvSJF8sSKZ6iI3mamuozc35sL9-agCcYHhAYCw6McXo)
Peter, the results in the presidential election weren’t what any of us had hoped for. We know that you are probably feeling a mix of fear, anger and concern about what's to come. But, as the Vice President said last night, we cannot throw up our hands when it is time to roll up our sleeves. **Right now, there are a number of very important Senate races that are yet to be called or have been won by small margins and will be subject to legal challenges.**_We have to do what we can to win those critical races, and defend the outcome of the ones we have won in court._ [If you’re in a position to do so, please contribute $50 to the Harris Fight Fund program now. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. clean_body: We know the results in the presidential election were something any of us had hoped for and we know that you are probably facing this moment with a mix of fear, anger and concern about what's to come. | | | Peter, the results in the presidential election weren’t what any of us had hoped for. We know that you are probably feeling a mix of fear, anger and concern about what's to come. But, as the Vice President said last night, we cannot throw up our hands when it is time to roll up our sleeves. Right now, there are a number of very important Senate races that are yet to be called or have been won by small margins and will be subject to legal challenges.We have to do what we can to win those critical races, and defend the outcome of the ones we have won in court. . If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you and we'll be in touch, Kamala HQ | | | |

**THEN** , a brand-new poll showed Jacky Rosen down 1 point to her extremist opponent.
**NOW** , votes are still being counted, and we have to be prepared for whatever the next few days have in store. We cannot afford to lose another Senate seat.

Here’s the latest: FIRST, Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups overwhelmed the airwaves with more than $75 million in attack ads against Sen. Jacky (D–NV). THEN , a brand-new poll showed Jacky Rosen down 1 point to her extremist opponent. NOW , votes are still being counted, and we have to be prepared for whatever the next few days have in store. We cannot afford to lose another Senate seat. We MUST act with extreme urgency to ensure every single vote is counted and to stop an anti-abortion MAGA extremist from passing a national abortion ban! name: Katrina
subject: Thank You
body:
| | | | | [](https://katrinaforarizona.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b33bbe17b20417c692e3cf693&id=90a240df8d&e=a7c9c08fba)
---
| | | | | Hey,I cannot begin to express my gratitude for all the love and support this campaign has received during this election year. We are united in a vision for this country that builds bridges, connects people from all walks of life, and most importantly moves our country forward.
Our movement has grown into hundreds of volunteers spread across the district, with folks from across the political spectrum uniting for a common goal. This shows how much we can accomplish when all of us come together to fight for the greater good.
I started this campaign to fight for freedom over fascism. I wanted to prioritize the needs of working people and everyday families, to stand up to a system that benefits the top and has left the rest of us behind.
Even though the results of this election are not the outcome we had hoped for, I have been encouraged, inspired, and humbled by every person I have met on the campaign trail. The work our team has put into this race is nothing short of heroic. We came together to put democracy first and to put country over party. We came together to fight for healthcare, a strong economy, and national security. Every donation, every phone call/text, postcard and door knocker has influenced this election in a way that brings our district together. You have accomplished more than you will ever know and I am deeply honored that you took the time out of your day to support our campaign because you believed in a better tomorrow.
I believe in that tomorrow. I am inspired by humanity and this campaign has shown us that our movement will continue to grow. We will continue to hold Andy Biggs accountable and anyone else who tries to undermine our democracy. We will do so, by building on our momentum and bringing people together in ways we thought were impossible. Each and everyone of us has the potential to inspire change in our daily lives. Thank you for being a part of that change as we continue to move our country forward, together.

---
| Thank you for your on going support,Katrina Schaffner
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Real Quick...Katrina continues to work hard fighting for American families. Your individual contributions allow her to keep that work going and reach more people. Your support helps us continue to grow our campaign.
Please consider making a $25 donation or whatever you can give today.

We cannot afford to let the Democrats' divisive rhetoric and policies further fracture our great nation. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Fellow Conservative, to ask for your immediate support. name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: We Won — Because of YOU
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Against all odds — the biased polls, slanted media, intimidation tactics, dark Democrat super PACs, and their attempts to silence us — we won.

| | | | ****

---
**_MESSAGE FROM ANNA PAULINA LUNA:_** **_THANK YOU!_** ****
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zoevm774scr379vnktppfh9n3jpk5v3kpvoqbp4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmcor1chh2bs)

Dear Patriot,
Against all odds — the biased polls, slanted media, intimidation tactics, dark Democrat super PACs, and their attempts to silence us — _we won._

Together, we showed them that the strength of the American spirit is stronger than any underhanded tactic.
Thanks to your support, our team knocked on 61,000 doors, made 110,000 phone calls, and brought our message of freedom and faith to every corner of our district.

Now, as I prepare to continue serving you in Washington, D.C., I am more committed than ever to fighting for our Constitutional Republic.
As we close out the 118th Congress and look forward to the 119th, I promise you that we will put forth policies that will uplift _all Americans._ Our country deserves leaders who will work relentlessly to restore, protect, and strengthen what we hold dear. _Matthew 5:9_ reminds us, "Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall be called children of God."
Thank you for standing with me through every challenge. With your continued support, we’re not just fighting; we’re winning. Together, we’re going to take back America and build a future we can be proud of.
**_[P.S. If you’d like to keep our movement strong as we step into this new chapter, I’d be honored if you considered a small contribution>>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zjof3j3g5v7l7r58obl19o83lmsdooncep6usoo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmcor1chh2bs)_**
Every dollar fuels this fight to protect our nation’s future.
With gratitude,

Anna Paulina Luna
Congresswoman (FL-13)
U.S. Air Force Veteran

|
---
PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS

Update For America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Fellow Conservative, The dust has settled, and we've emerged victorious in the 2024 election! But our work is far from over. As we celebrate President Trump's win, we must acknowledge the daunting task ahead of us: bridging the internal emotional divide that threatens to tear our nation apart. We cannot afford to let the Democrats' divisive rhetoric and policies further fracture our great nation. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Fellow Conservative, to ask for your immediate support. We're facing a budget shortfall, and we need your help to ensure we have the resources necessary to keep fighting for our values and principles. **[Join the Elect Republicans 1000 Club Today!](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkp8tr028166qn33nhgjbsjlq5qe8v8mfq87lte8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmaob4cth2bs)** As a dedicated America First Republican, you've been selected to join the exclusive Elect Republicans 1000 Club. name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: We Won — Because of YOU
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Against all odds — the biased polls, slanted media, intimidation tactics, dark Democrat super PACs, and their attempts to silence us — we won.

| | | | ****

---
**_MESSAGE FROM ANNA PAULINA LUNA:_** **_THANK YOU!_** ****
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0e85lhvfptgtobce64dopdj75ki6f7uo061jlt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmaob4cjh2bs)

Dear Patriot,
Against all odds — the biased polls, slanted media, intimidation tactics, dark Democrat super PACs, and their attempts to silence us — _we won._

Together, we showed them that the strength of the American spirit is stronger than any underhanded tactic.
Thanks to your support, our team knocked on 61,000 doors, made 110,000 phone calls, and brought our message of freedom and faith to every corner of our district.

Now, as I prepare to continue serving you in Washington, D.C., I am more committed than ever to fighting for our Constitutional Republic.
As we close out the 118th Congress and look forward to the 119th, I promise you that we will put forth policies that will uplift _all Americans._ Our country deserves leaders who will work relentlessly to restore, protect, and strengthen what we hold dear. _Matthew 5:9_ reminds us, "Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall be called children of God."
Thank you for standing with me through every challenge. With your continued support, we’re not just fighting; we’re winning. Together, we’re going to take back America and build a future we can be proud of.
**_[P.S. If you’d like to keep our movement strong as we step into this new chapter, I’d be honored if you considered a small contribution>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7ugqohfplltkdeetl4dplmu4f24fskmppsdaj60_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmaob4cjh2bs)_**
Every dollar fuels this fight to protect our nation’s future.
With gratitude,

Anna Paulina Luna
Congresswoman (FL-13)
U.S. Air Force Veteran

|
---
PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrb8qi1k8tnvb0pg8f1oe2sm1u9695ai02hm7ne0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmaob4cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6cpb1cjgmeoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgjj6flpcdcrn0ffu0u1br91p1h1530vc2fp35dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmaob4cjh2bs)_

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: We won BIG – thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | (509) 370-8398 | www
body:
We received 60% of the vote in the 5th CD. | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | |
---
| Friends,
Thank you for helping us to a resounding 60% victory in the election! I am so grateful for all your support and so excited for what comes next!
Thank you to the many of you who have sent congratulatory texts and emails. They are so appreciated. Please keep me, Eleanor and the kids in your prayers as we start this new adventure.
I head to DC next week for freshman orientation and leadership votes to determine the Speaker of the House and other key positions.
Back home we’ll be working to build our District office ready for January.
Best, Michael
P.S. – I’m hoping that many of you will be able to join me in DC for the January 20th Presidential Inauguration. Stay tuned for more details.

---

name: Speaker Johnson
subject: HISTORY. MADE.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
America has spoken. Now it’s time to deliver.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zicn4iquil4alcd7un80vqrc11p3v5eta0d0tbu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmeoj4cth2bs)
---
It's official, Friend! President Trump will be returning to the White House. Republicans will take the majority in the U.S. Senate. And I’m confident House Republicans have held our Republican House majority! The American people have rendered a **HISTORIC** mandate on our country. **[We voted to END the Biden-Harris border catastrophe!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd154dj740dn6ss14drcd65uc09cn38h870ngvro_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmeoj4cth2bs)** **[We voted to KICKSTART our economy and send America into a new golden age!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zupekbpg9nofg490fh9es7bf3r7nhs67koun2e9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmeoj4cth2bs)** **[We voted to BUILD UP our military and foster peace through strength.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq34o5l826hcbuvnknb3f0rr96e2105fbnkqte5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmeoj4cth2bs)** **[**And most importantly, we voted to PUT AMERICA FIRST!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoftkt1vs8mo912fgvdqvjjgd8dvhoonpfji3dh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmeoj4cth2bs)**
---
[**KEEP THE MOMENTUM**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl9flugknsbabr0ud7d2qk84n5c6vbg1nu75i5c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmeoj4cth2bs)
---
Friend, none of this would be possible without your generous support. Every prayer, every vote, every survey response, and every generous donation have been instrumental in our victory last night. I mean it when I say it - THANK YOU! But the work is far from over. As I watch returns continue to trickle in, our key races to keep the majority are looking very, _very_ close – and some could even wind up in a recount. As Speaker, I promised to see our conservative House candidates to the very end, even beyond Election Day. And now, as the votes are being counted, they need us more than ever. So, Friend, **[**can I count on you to spare a few bucks to help us maintain our momentum and bring our candidates home?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm8b6jln9ofj8ismn0dmajh2nmioedhbu8luhet0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hmeoj4cth2bs)** Thank you for your support. Sincerely, Mike Johnson

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjrk4bqlc22abckmv8a8282tjv6pcnn8p5ipncno_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9n39k402158mvu7gtc2l37mgjidkv5ja9vrgaq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlha6fohcso8nslblslngibuvo69r8fa5p7c7ps8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkkqid7gl90lo9baadn3qncp5bngp0tl3918tbm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh7si68nkcoo1jtdasklv60fp055ir4tcui5b028_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6cpb1cjim9oh1k8gn48n24hjmcp30cdie0p34s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh98001k35f5topvn8315vmjon6rcs0rug50afh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)_

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: We Won — Because of YOU
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Against all odds — the biased polls, slanted media, intimidation tactics, dark Democrat super PACs, and their attempts to silence us — we won.

| | | | ****

---
**_MESSAGE FROM ANNA PAULINA LUNA:_** **_THANK YOU!_** ****
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zisd8kcjc6c0qa9rf4p7qijqtpn8m83ankap8i2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)

Dear Patriot,
Against all odds — the biased polls, slanted media, intimidation tactics, dark Democrat super PACs, and their attempts to silence us — _we won._

Together, we showed them that the strength of the American spirit is stronger than any underhanded tactic.
Thanks to your support, our team knocked on 61,000 doors, made 110,000 phone calls, and brought our message of freedom and faith to every corner of our district.

Now, as I prepare to continue serving you in Washington, D.C., I am more committed than ever to fighting for our Constitutional Republic.
As we close out the 118th Congress and look forward to the 119th, I promise you that we will put forth policies that will uplift _all Americans._ Our country deserves leaders who will work relentlessly to restore, protect, and strengthen what we hold dear. _Matthew 5:9_ reminds us, "Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall be called children of God."
Thank you for standing with me through every challenge. With your continued support, we’re not just fighting; we’re winning. Together, we’re going to take back America and build a future we can be proud of.
**_[P.S. If you’d like to keep our movement strong as we step into this new chapter, I’d be honored if you considered a small contribution>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlo5jrff8dmpfi1n37lcapfeq5lf6vctv4nokj08_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)_**
Every dollar fuels this fight to protect our nation’s future.
With gratitude,

Anna Paulina Luna
Congresswoman (FL-13)
U.S. Air Force Veteran

|
---
PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS

GOP Presidential

name: Speaker Johnson
subject: HISTORY. MADE.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
America has spoken. Now it’s time to deliver.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0ok6adhsv20cgim2fchoqa4tfhhcn0qcbcvjo9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)
---
It's official, Friend! President Trump will be returning to the White House. Republicans will take the majority in the U.S. Senate. And I’m confident House Republicans have held our Republican House majority! The American people have rendered a **HISTORIC** mandate on our country. **[We voted to END the Biden-Harris border catastrophe!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi5k8js01mae5qqq8drmv3kldmrcrtj25plen2c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)** **[We voted to KICKSTART our economy and send America into a new golden age!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z02gk4tdfqkq7h34dge55euvdpquisd4cgoa8ri8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)** **[We voted to BUILD UP our military and foster peace through strength.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjuqj3ildqpombv2kr87lts5cu1kcrmjhfvj2v4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)** **[**And most importantly, we voted to PUT AMERICA FIRST!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6ikk4ifmi6jhrl5pcmhlc0jhtp49chbb3nl3g2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)**
---
[**KEEP THE MOMENTUM**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjun2nj3gostkrnj9cf568fv53jfr2g2016699do_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)
---
Friend, none of this would be possible without your generous support. Every prayer, every vote, every survey response, and every generous donation have been instrumental in our victory last night. I mean it when I say it - THANK YOU! But the work is far from over. As I watch returns continue to trickle in, our key races to keep the majority are looking very, _very_ close – and some could even wind up in a recount. As Speaker, I promised to see our conservative House candidates to the very end, even beyond Election Day. And now, as the votes are being counted, they need us more than ever. So, Friend, **[**can I count on you to spare a few bucks to help us maintain our momentum and bring our candidates home?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt7t0ohid6oppqkluvkmht84li3e4b7hiifk7bio_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1hm9o34cjh2bs)** Thank you for your support. Sincerely, Mike Johnson

name: Speaker Johnson
subject: HISTORY. MADE.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
America has spoken. Now it’s time to deliver.

| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zee4qd0imp1vlqho7f60apvkqbq81vlat6e3m438_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1jm0o71chh2bs)
---
It's official, Friend! President Trump will be returning to the White House. Republicans will take the majority in the U.S. Senate. And I’m confident House Republicans have held our Republican House majority! The American people have rendered a **HISTORIC** mandate on our country. **[We voted to END the Biden-Harris border catastrophe!](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z878fipfqort3k20tlc807mnekrssgmdlo88iej0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1jm0o71chh2bs)** **[We voted to KICKSTART our economy and send America into a new golden age!](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ztieivr818t3lspa3ool77cfisktqb7ljsm6auko_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1jm0o71chh2bs)** **[We voted to BUILD UP our military and foster peace through strength.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2ssjhcc6dlfc15b6v9thg6mccqa795mch80e34o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1jm0o71chh2bs)** **[**And most importantly, we voted to PUT AMERICA FIRST!**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2za5jcgi797qcop13hl6qh71jt79tp9qm8u55v4v8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1jm0o71chh2bs)**
---
[**KEEP THE MOMENTUM**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7r9ml65nh1tcss2j1aaqv7f7thabtkbenkak030_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1jm0o71chh2bs)
---
Friend, none of this would be possible without your generous support. Every prayer, every vote, every survey response, and every generous donation have been instrumental in our victory last night. I mean it when I say it - THANK YOU! But the work is far from over. As I watch returns continue to trickle in, our key races to keep the majority are looking very, _very_ close – and some could even wind up in a recount. As Speaker, I promised to see our conservative House candidates to the very end, even beyond Election Day. And now, as the votes are being counted, they need us more than ever. So, Friend, **[**can I count on you to spare a few bucks to help us maintain our momentum and bring our candidates home?**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8q5u1dmnkmj2ms99v4cpbfljs52avcs8jlp90eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1jm0o71chh2bs)** Thank you for your support. Sincerely, Mike Johnson

# Trump’s Plan To Avoid

Donald Trump has reclaimed the White House, and America is on the path to victory once again.

But don’t think for a second that the Dems on the inside will go down without a fight.

Whether stirring up controversy through identity politics in the liberal media, or creating economic turbulence through market manipulation, there are many present threats to your financial future.

They use these tactics to enrich themselves while everyday Americans watch their retirement accounts slowly erode under market volatility.

The constant volatility benefits them, but it’s draining the hard-earned money in your retirement accounts.

Whether it’s a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension, your post retirement future could be in serious danger if you are not aware of the options you have to protect your wealth from their game.

Donald Trump has reclaimed the White House, and America is on the path to victory once again.

But don’t think for a second that the Dems on the inside will go down without a fight.

Whether stirring up controversy through identity politics in the liberal media, or creating economic turbulence through market manipulation, there are many present threats to your financial future.

Whether stirring up controversy through identity politics in the liberal media, or creating economic turbulence through market manipulation, there are many present threats to your financial future. They use these tactics to enrich themselves while everyday Americans watch their retirement accounts slowly erode under market volatility. The constant volatility benefits them, but it’s draining the hard-earned money in your retirement accounts. Whether it’s a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension, your post retirement future could be in serious danger if you are not aware of the options you have to protect your wealth from their game. The good news is, Trump is fighting for you! Thanks to a crucial IRS loophole that President Trump kept open, you can transfer your funds tax-free and penalty-free to a safer, more reliable option that isn’t tied to the manipulated stock market. Don’t wait until it’s too late. Dems in the Senate and the House could make moves to close this loophole at any time, and once it’s gone, you’ll be back at the mercy of a rigged system. secure your future before the deep state strikes again with another wave of orchestrated volatility. | Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: American Briefing
subject: Trump’s Wealth Saving Plan To Beat The Volatility Ahead
body:
Trump’s Plan To Avoid The Elites Raid On Your 401(k)

Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.
| |
---
---
# Trump’s Plan To Avoid
# The Elites Raid On Your 401(k)
---
Donald Trump has reclaimed the White House, and America is on the path to victory once again.

But don’t think for a second that the Dems on the inside will go down without a fight.

Whether stirring up controversy through identity politics in the liberal media, or creating economic turbulence through market manipulation, there are many present threats to your financial future.

They use these tactics to enrich themselves while everyday Americans watch their retirement accounts slowly erode under market volatility.

The constant volatility benefits them, but it’s draining the hard-earned money in your retirement accounts.

Whether it’s a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension, your post retirement future could be in serious danger if you are not aware of the options you have to protect your wealth from their game.
[Click Here for Your FREE Wealth Protection Guide](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zudctu22fqh2utmd2m662e7egpnm54u9eekci9ng_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1jm2ob1c9h2bs)
The good news is, Trump is fighting for you!

Thanks to a crucial IRS loophole that President Trump kept open, you can transfer your funds tax-free and penalty-free to a safer, more reliable option that isn’t tied to the manipulated stock market.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/doodUwobXnIZVRcL74UIIw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpEHSKP0ScaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQxMTA4VwNzcGNCCmcrct4tZ9mHEjBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/doodUwobXnIZVRcL74UIIw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpEHSKP0ScaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQxMTA4VwNzcGNCCmcrct4tZ9mHEjBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/doodUwobXnIZVRcL74UIIw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpEHSKP0ScaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQxMTA4VwNzcGNCCmcrct4tZ9mHEjBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/doodUwobXnIZVRcL74UIIw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpEHSKP0ScaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQxMTA4VwNzcGNCCmcrct4tZ9mHEjBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

name: Victor Riches
subject: What If Barry Goldwater Were Running Today?
body:
If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."

|
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d8bbc4cadfa14d32a53e9fea94ff2b30&_e=dICK5YgTnMf26-uQi3XxeHgh8g0cmAaxSF6bELuaqhAQIpMXa7jQVctuOHiajtueySlvv85YNOsbZdsQP1_Wb9RwJtUZXsni_tMrAheZ9u3FwyeEiEE1njvZNcLGIiupXAjnT6RZTjN6k_QbyLnLweIjGXIRk-yxT4x53-3H6EaxZStMBE6SC4fy4WzTCYSt8E1mR8wQ8ApYtEsOKIbAjTd5Ah6G0rD1XYCnCvHmz3KjGGdsE9G3rn6-pt5dfcOLMlJCu3kVjs6FDB5wbc3vPQQdw-w8f1WWt3a5GuQPhg8%3D)
Friend,

In 1964, Senator Barry Goldwater boldly opposed government overreach, declaring that _" extremism in the defense of liberty is no vice."_

Today, we face another threat -- the rise of woke culture -- where free speech is stifled, the government interferes in every aspect of our lives, and identity politics replaces individual merit.

**If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."**

Senator Goldwater would recognize the "woke" movement as a form of collectivism and groupthink that conflicts with individual liberty. He would argue that true equality means equal opportunity, not equality of outcome, and that the government has no business imposing ideological conformity.

He would oppose mandatory diversity training, DEI, critical race theory, and identity-based quotas -- and all illiberal attacks on our nation's founding principles.

The Goldwater Institute is keeping Barry Goldwater's legacy alive by fighting to protect the rights of all Americans against the injection of toxic identity politics into everyday life, and we are winning!

[You can help the Goldwater Institute stop the woke narrative that is sweeping the nation by donating today. When you give, your gift will be MATCHED! Click to double your donation >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d8bbc4cadfa14d32a53e9fea94ff2b30&_e=dICK5YgTnMf26-uQi3XxeHgh8g0cmAaxSF6bELuaqhAQIpMXa7jQVctuOHiajtueySlvv85YNOsbZdsQP1_Wb9RwJtUZXsni_tMrAheZ9u3FwyeEiEE1njvZNcLGIiupXAjnT6RZTjN6k_QbyLnLwbJ_GBCa_4jQ24d4vSQkU8WDCSIY0rAcK8w7bISndUyla2fZDLr7N6yDwKP4l1vIrkNEQlEIQkId6WBnxDP7TzA4Fwss_Jk6tP22aYeyGBdR6y43Pk1Xs9YYQZLJalUFOMOJjQKWmSSCbLQfQnevmb4%3D)
[Have Your Donation Matched!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d8bbc4cadfa14d32a53e9fea94ff2b30&_e=dICK5YgTnMf26-uQi3XxeHgh8g0cmAaxSF6bELuaqhAQIpMXa7jQVctuOHiajtueySlvv85YNOsbZdsQP1_Wb9RwJtUZXsni_tMrAheZ9u3FwyeEiEE1njvZNcLGIiupXAjnT6RZTjN6k_QbyLnLwRFXL0IoBE2HXMM5JBwSMqOZ68nD8fyqVmRHAEZ5SL1AlvXuk-F9Klm2pZUN51PejAfOis82V3oWBTGiBu5u1I7FhzKvAEsJMjIdSkTy3RfwiQkykN2EjzvRjrlyVuERaaWCuDTMtcraf7dhSbNzLQo%3D)
The Goldwater Institute has a plan to defeat politically charged Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies. To achieve this goal, the Goldwater Institute has partnered with allied organizations to create a set of model policies targeted to state legislatures.

Our five-point program for removing DEI from college campuses includes:
1. Abolishing DEI bureaucracies.
2. Protecting professors and students from mandatory political indoctrination.
3. Ending the use of bias reporting systems that encourage students to spy on their colleagues and report them to university administrators.
4. Passing new state laws with "teeth" that hold college bureaucrats accountable when they don't protect free speech on campus.
5. Requiring transparency in classroom curriculum and instructor syllabuses.

The war against discriminatory DEI practices will continue until we persuade state legislators to support our cause and implement our five-point policy platform in their states.

**Here 's how you can help defeat DEI:**

[ALL online donations are matched until the end of the year! Can you donate $10, $35, $100, or even $250 today? [Help us keep fighting for Barry Goldwater's legacy of liberty by donating today!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d8bbc4cadfa14d32a53e9fea94ff2b30&_e=dICK5YgTnMf26-uQi3XxeHgh8g0cmAaxSF6bELuaqhAQIpMXa7jQVctuOHiajtueySlvv85YNOsbZdsQP1_Wb9RwJtUZXsni_tMrAheZ9u3FwyeEiEE1njvZNcLGIiupXAjnT6RZTjN6k_QbyLnLwZWb5dNOKmXuWKVmWW9YwntVdmEwgY1B24oMC5FtC0Bx1akAdGCWCAxeTaCXhhblcVSjzlDA5xaE1_KNeu0arRcZhd2J4y8ruWWKpkTH8LS2yHg2c4NzknVVJ2kSQvxpLQcclie7kOjKdTl7DmD7vyI%3D)

clean_body: If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism." | | | Friend, In 1964, Senator Barry Goldwater boldly opposed government overreach, declaring that " extremism in the defense of liberty is no vice." Today, we face another threat -- the rise of woke culture -- where free speech is stifled, the government interferes in every aspect of our lives, and identity politics replaces individual merit. If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism." Senator Goldwater would recognize the "woke" movement as a form of collectivism and groupthink that conflicts with individual liberty. He would argue that true equality means equal opportunity, not equality of outcome, and that the government has no business imposing ideological conformity. He would oppose mandatory diversity training, DEI, critical race theory, and identity-based quotas -- and all illiberal attacks on our nation's founding principles. The Goldwater Institute is keeping Barry Goldwater's legacy alive by fighting to protect the rights of all Americans against the injection of toxic identity politics into everyday life, and we are winning! The Goldwater Institute has a plan to defeat politically charged Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies. To achieve this goal, the Goldwater Institute has partnered with allied organizations to create a set of model policies targeted to state legislatures. Our five-point program for removing DEI from college campuses includes: 1. Abolishing DEI bureaucracies. 2. Protecting professors and students from mandatory political indoctrination. 3. Ending the use of bias reporting systems that encourage students to spy on their colleagues and report them to university administrators. 4. Passing new state laws with "teeth" that hold college bureaucrats accountable when they don't protect free speech on campus. 5. Requiring transparency in classroom curriculum and instructor syllabuses. The war against discriminatory DEI practices will continue until we persuade state legislators to support our cause and implement our five-point policy platform in their states. Here 's how you can help defeat DEI: Senator Goldwater wouldn't just fight back against the woke agenda. He would lead the charge for freedom. And that's exactly what the Goldwater Institute is doing. We're standing on the front lines of this cultural battle, promoting the same principles that Barry Goldwater held dear: liberty, free markets, and limited government. Barry Goldwater believed in America -- and so do we. You can help us carry the torch of liberty into the next generation. Sincerely, Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

They have weaponized the government for their own political and personal agenda. Remember Russia Gate? Fraud! Remember what the 50 former intelligence officials said about the Hunter Biden story? Lies! Remember the Whitmer kidnapping? Entrapment! They used all of these events to influence the public during an election. That's why we need to stop the Deep State during this critical moment and return our country to one of public service. It starts by holding the Deep State accountable. I created The Kash Foundation to offer legal and financial help to whistleblowers who come forward with proven and verified evidence against the Deep State’s actions, and separately for veterans, active duty, and law enforcement in need. This is the time when we take our country back from the Deep State and their Government Gangster cronies. That all starts with encouraging those with information to come forward. Whistleblowers provide “the smoking gun” that we need to prove to the American public that the Deep State is corrupt. And here’s why your support matters: Whistleblowers risk losing their jobs and their entire careers by exposing the truth to the American public. The Kash Foundation has already helped Kyle Seraphin, Steve Friend, Garrett O’Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes. Your generous donation will help us support the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State. Thank you, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to The Kash Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution. Address: The Kash Foundation 717 King St., Suite 300 Alexandria, VA. 22314 By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive unlimited calls and recurring SMS/MMS messages, including artificial, pre-recorded, auto-dialed, and automated calls and texts to that number from The Kash Foundation. Msg&data rates may apply. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Fellow Conservative, The dust has settled, and we've emerged victorious in the 2024 election! But our work is far from over. As we celebrate President Trump's win, we must acknowledge the daunting task ahead of us: bridging the internal emotional divide that threatens to tear our nation apart. We cannot afford to let the Democrats' divisive rhetoric and policies further fracture our great nation. name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b275c3e1a374102bb03beda24b27e2f&_e=wFn04h-zesKhQBgMIDowsLRPI8f5Qq_a6GSClfjx8kmEFll-_ZUFFwgGd6sUkl-iPN7BcYxRhZUHYT2l3HQcT7BWtzFmIYjqPIczUuvFmA0OPx-2DvrTIyIYH92mmF1CeEtdG0sLP2bNeh7HyfTpkOYhAJdkSwtltgs0Q98oyuTGvw2i3rPNpF1wcSY2x-ga_x9t3m-2HSZU6HaYvoZmxMN5Wy5EAXx__LM1BF1juyX3R63arDu_wvT7x013lfD2VouHtH4kXxWsjg67kSNmzvsU31tlK4PvnCGJBZOXjnmU8X0lkn6zisT1UPHBcfQ12_rYjI2ILYys-sc5NVVm_I7BUQP6f0x36CWJic7RMycapXwoQfIPs9ANK4n4cb86)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b275c3e1a374102bb03beda24b27e2f&_e=wFn04h-zesKhQBgMIDowsLRPI8f5Qq_a6GSClfjx8kmEFll-_ZUFFwgGd6sUkl-iPN7BcYxRhZUHYT2l3HQcT7BWtzFmIYjqPIczUuvFmA0OPx-2DvrTIyIYH92mmF1CeEtdG0sLP2bNeh7HyfTpkOYhAJdkSwtltgs0Q98oyuTGvw2i3rPNpF1wcSY2x-ga_x9t3m-2HSZU6HaYvoZmxMN5Wy5EAXx__LM1BF1juyVPsPLESkRKCa_rSqswK9xeu7mjgpLcrCvhjJNZqEotaoLuUGSL-kXwWdMg3bS5JCsjhL0RWOsLNA84fXUnAyqDn9Mc9JxvOxhIORnJr1O2jZkwGceM8qiRByQESZDj9DTMCGbU-OR5ZUrrCD1_ir7B)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b275c3e1a374102bb03beda24b27e2f&_e=wFn04h-zesKhQBgMIDowsLRPI8f5Qq_a6GSClfjx8kmEFll-_ZUFFwgGd6sUkl-iPN7BcYxRhZUHYT2l3HQcT7BWtzFmIYjqPIczUuvFmA0OPx-2DvrTIyIYH92mmF1CeEtdG0sLP2bNeh7HyfTpkOYhAJdkSwtltgs0Q98oyuTGvw2i3rPNpF1wcSY2x-ga_x9t3m-2HSZU6HaYvoZmxMN5Wy5EAXx__LM1BF1juyVSklzcuX1vbqhaJkU0ki9zO08vAIxAsWBr72Kf4rJuNBHTF-jQjpyPKlYPyXbvVfCeT6dJDZoV42_yzRTTqdCN07doq0ndrft49h2LuZ0A_ICK9r9LftF2WXboGqGLGzg057F39jUEXftm6MCaPzcE)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b275c3e1a374102bb03beda24b27e2f&_e=wFn04h-zesKhQBgMIDowsLRPI8f5Qq_a6GSClfjx8kmEFll-_ZUFFwgGd6sUkl-iPN7BcYxRhZUHYT2l3HQcT7BWtzFmIYjqPIczUuvFmA0OPx-2DvrTIyIYH92mmF1CeEtdG0sLP2bNeh7HyfTpkOYhAJdkSwtltgs0Q98oyuTGvw2i3rPNpF1wcSY2x-ga_x9t3m-2HSZU6HaYvoZmxMN5Wy5EAXx__LM1BF1juyXxuXw6iqMV27aqY6lJC-XKMqhAW9KK4dBQy8yTRuXdKG6cpdorrMw2weOig9ykEKNRntI8Xevgt1WcP6BRAz98nNfoWza6pwk2ovJX46Ro_3OU2MlRFFNKJZ54y1oUrY7GEGzk6hhtE7ZWZVsmdLX2)
---

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: We’re still in this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
While we continue to monitor the returns, we must ensure that every lawful vote is counted and the will of AZ-06 voters is carried out, no matter how long it takes.
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | |
---
| |

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a6308a9-34bb-4752-bd7b-213dabd2a7b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hi Peter — Our race for Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District is still undecided. The stakes feel higher than ever, but we’re still in this. In 2022, it took a week to determine a winner. Now, we’re neck-and-neck — but thousands of lawful votes still need to be counted. While we continue to monitor the returns, we must ensure that every lawful vote is counted and the will of AZ-06 voters is carried out, no matter how long it takes. [To do that, we’ll need your grassroots support. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us ensure that every lawful vote is counted fairly and securely?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T538fe07a-3d3a-41db-b085-694fbf8e821f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a8e0f2f-8bc9-4bf9-a500-176eb37aa16a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | I am honored to have received so much support over the past two years and I wouldn’t be here without everyone who volunteered, donated, and voted. Thank you so, so much — I am so grateful for your support in our fight for a better Arizona. Onwards! Kirsten

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49601ad2-2295-475d-b550-119bf82649cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: We won, but the fight is far from over - will you join the elite group of patriots leading the charge?

body:
But the real battle begins now - will you be part of the elite group that shapes America's future?

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=19e4ccb6dd154f81b65744f553eecf77&_e=OW538WcYXlpJE90ynDuSrSGBA8NMV5SYfEzXq9pn9mbkQ9o2vUecjpl4LqFzenyOrXA79zSg4gE0m-cv70_yFyZ_GiPREBHNZL8UftpxJRJwLiBJ_kNE5zPxHctPaMliXhWuZRRJEXSLpKVj32AKUCz3rUXy_l2aP1uvnlWDl4FUm05NUIQRtuSMLLpmGXeKe7oxPSHSXy0E3Xz2KHlavExLr71JKcxYxQt0WB2PKK7H3KCccYRATiPgNw9Sf84o-Yth8uMnQQqAeuhyeTLbBuYnMeQJDVFxx-Uj-E1WKyrEdFx_H48hb0LJO5Jl80vpBCQIk-_5SFl1hjtL3oWzvfd10XhcSU_5ITzm9YuMiYdaNj-uPaUIOHH2DEqjrR8qNmaVhN3QAx2pMc_Z8XiiMxyeBAKeUjugObRXmtGoRYPvgbKRkZp7chSNvSp-ZBzaHFw9bigRgaChv5tdWuz00hihNKpcYEIT0dVioYyZ46UEP9v287wxY3QbeuHXUlw7p79VkALonnTxxi-OUDsgdS-p7gUe8qJd3SpLo9YMqBeqx0GiIP1bOoyvHHbDAsR7fpfczh2wktGhaD5fmzjdyQ%3D%3D) Fellow Conservative, **We did it!** President Donald J. Trump has been re-elected, and it's all thanks to the tireless efforts of patriots like you who stood strong against the liberal agenda. But our work is far from over. As we celebrate this monumental victory, we must remember that the Democratic Party will stop at nothing to undermine our progress and push their radical ideology on America. [_We saw it during the election, with Vice President Kamala Harris and her allies trying to manipulate the system and silence our voices._](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=19e4ccb6dd154f81b65744f553eecf77&_e=OW538WcYXlpJE90ynDuSrSGBA8NMV5SYfEzXq9pn9mbkQ9o2vUecjpl4LqFzenyOrXA79zSg4gE0m-cv70_yFyZ_GiPREBHNZL8UftpxJRJwLiBJ_kNE5zPxHctPaMliXhWuZRRJEXSLpKVj32AKUCz3rUXy_l2aP1uvnlWDl4FUm05NUIQRtuSMLLpmGXeKe7oxPSHSXy0E3Xz2KHlavExLr71JKcxYxQt0WB2PKK7H3KCccYRATiPgNw9Sf84o-Yth8uMnQQqAeuhyeTLbBuYnMeQJDVFxx-Uj-E1WKyrEdFx_H48hb0LJO5Jl80vpBCQIk-_5SFl1hjtL3oWzvfd10XhcSU_5ITzm9YuMiYdaNj-uPaUIOHH2DEqjrR8qNmaVhN3QAx2pMc_Z8XiiMxyeBAKeUjugObRXmtGoRYP83X63rDiF4ZovPlRM6TShZHqrA1nznGi9jMvMDt_ScMGPm73GPpzkFUKIXM3Whmr5VCyNecC2ta1pcm2XIcSpUN4d6DmUG01UDp0m95-3ux0kCfWAaG0CHZ6yx2gti25Rs8rZw-7yiPOYfKOdCzCnrTxjrlAKlhqEruNH5bmENoK28EgJOhwlRBmym762VAI%3D) But we won't let them succeed. We must continue to stand together and fight for our values, our freedom, and our country. That's why I'm asking you to join the Elect Republicans 1000 Club, an exclusive group of dedicated America First Republicans who are committed to electing more conservatives to office. By contributing **ANY AMOUNT** today, you'll be securing your spot in this prestigious club and sending a powerful message to the Democrats: [**we won't back down, and we won't be silenced.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=19e4ccb6dd154f81b65744f553eecf77&_e=OW538WcYXlpJE90ynDuSrSGBA8NMV5SYfEzXq9pn9mbkQ9o2vUecjpl4LqFzenyOrXA79zSg4gE0m-cv70_yFyZ_GiPREBHNZL8UftpxJRJwLiBJ_kNE5zPxHctPaMliXhWuZRRJEXSLpKVj32AKUCz3rUXy_l2aP1uvnlWDl4FUm05NUIQRtuSMLLpmGXeKe7oxPSHSXy0E3Xz2KHlavExLr71JKcxYxQt0WB2PKK7H3KCccYRATiPgNw9Sf84o-Yth8uMnQQqAeuhyeTLbBuYnMeQJDVFxx-Uj-E1WKyrEdFx_H48hb0LJO5Jl80vpBCQIk-_5SFl1hjtL3oWzvfd10XhcSU_5ITzm9YuMiYdaNj-uPaUIOHH2DEqjrR8qNmaVhN3QAx2pMc_Z8XiiMxyeBAKeUjugObRXmtGoRYPvgbKRkZp7chSNvSp-ZBzaDHPvK6HdB0t_36U2hq0L49eGnwcvzkhzFODTZl_VBqcR6flZ-LsM1cxHji75wWCFgdscsGCh9q79FQCRFPbM47EV5pV-Y73UsRmkXdzVpyVTVdPuufpLyVBNAxxtOalKruyY11-bF46Z6QseycrsHA%3D%3D) |

name: Jim Carris
subject: Sharing My Thoughts
body:
Dear Peter,After spending the last year trying to make a difference, these past 48 hours have been difficult. My family spent time together reminiscing about all the good times, the fun things we did, and the difference we tried to make. There was some sadness and some entertaining stories. It was almost as if someone died and we were sitting Shiva.The experiences that Team Carris had cannot be replicated. I visited the southern border and saw the heartache of illegal immigrants seeking a better life and heard the stories of how many "gotaways" there were coming across the border from places unknown, with intent in this country that is also unknown - a very scary thought. I had the honor of doing a ride-along with the Waukegan Police on a Friday night. I came away from that experience with nothing but respect for our policemen and women who, every day and night, go from one dangerous situation to another, and one tragedy to another. My hats off to them. We attended dozens of parades and had fun with the parade-goers and held many meet-and-greets and fundraisers with sweet, well-intended citizens. We made thousands of calls to the District trying to get our message out. We put up hundreds and hundreds of signs to build name recognition. And, I was subject to name-calling, disparaging comments, and untruths by some people who had never met me but felt safe behind their keyboards. But now, thinking about why we got involved in the race with all the people we interacted with, I cannot just go about my business and not share some thoughts.First, my plan, had I won, was to hold a press conference today, November 7, demanding the return of the hostages held by Hamas. It's been 13 months, and our government has not prioritized these people at all. Had I won, I would have used the bully pulpit of the House of Representatives to push for the weight of the whole U.S. government to require the hostages to be returned. But, even though I'm not in office, we cannot lose sight of the fact that these innocent people are still in captivity. Something must be done! They cannot be forgotten! I would not rest as an elected official, and I still will not rest until the hostages are returned.The second key priority we had was to try to make life better for the people living north of the Lake Bluff line. While many people I talked to in the North Shore felt the economy was good because their 401(k)s were positive territory, we met so many people living paycheck to paycheck and some even needing a few dollars in a given day to get a meal. To them, the price of gasoline, eggs, and milk is critical to their survival. These are our neighbors, and they live in the District. How can we go about our business and have a government that ignores them and doesn't try to help take care of them so that they can get on their feet? I planned to create economic stimulus in that area by cleaning up the environmentally contaminated lakefront in North Chicago and Waukegan, creating multiple access points for the citizens to reach the lake, and creating economic incentives for private investment to materially and long-term invest in that forgotten area so that we could create jobs and revitalize those communities. My plan would bring hope back to those areas and create the dynamic economic mecca that Waukegan used to be many years ago. This would help decrease crime, create jobs, and give the citizens of that area a sense of purpose, which would in turn benefit the whole 10th Congressional District.We also worked hard to engage the young people, who, for the first time in America's history, will be worse off than their parents' generation. It's also for them that we worked hard to engage them in the political process to try to improve the economy, public safety, and our national security so that we would not have to send them to war as we have with previous generations. This group of young people, because of the increases in costs and inflation over the past three and a half years, cannot afford to buy their own home and many must still live with their parents. I will not sit back quietly while these young people lose hope.This past election was not a defeat in the 10th, but a call to action for those of us citizens who realize that we need to press our government to actually do their jobs. While people continue to suffer, our government dithers and focuses on their own retention and expansion of power. Those of us who have seen the suffering and heartache but also the opportunity over these last 12 months realize that there is an "urgency of now" that we must keep up the fight. Let's all put the same amount of effort into changing these things that we did and trying to get elected. If we do that, many of our neighbors and friends will be better off.Fortunately, we have a changing of the guard in the White House, the Senate, and the House of Representatives (hopefully) and we must press our new government to fulfill their commitments to the benefit of our people. Once again, thank you all for your support! I wish you, our District, and the country only the best!Sincerely, Jim Carris [](https://carrj-jimcarrisforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-stttyid-tlidtddjku-r/)[](https://carrj-jimcarrisforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-stttyid-tlidtddjku-y/)[](https://carrj-jimcarrisforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-stttyid-tlidtddjku-j/)[](https://carrj-jimcarrisforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-stttyid-tlidtddjku-t/) [ Share ](https://carrj-jimcarrisforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-stttyid-tlidtddjku-i/) [ Tweet ](https://carrj-jimcarrisforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-stttyid-tlidtddjku-d/) [ Share ](https://carrj-jimcarrisforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-li-stttyid-tlidtddjku-h/) [ Forward ](https://carrj-jimcarrisforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-tlidtddjku-FE53F914-stttyid-l-k) | [Unsubscribe](https://carrj-jimcarrisforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-u-stttyid-tlidtddjku-u/)

They have weaponized the government for their own political and personal agenda. Remember Russia Gate? Fraud! Remember what the 50 former intelligence officials said about the Hunter Biden story? Lies! Remember the Whitmer kidnapping? Entrapment! They used all of these events to influence the public during an election. That's why we need to stop the Deep State during this critical moment and return our country to one of public service. It starts by holding the Deep State accountable. I created The Kash Foundation to offer legal and financial help to whistleblowers who come forward with proven and verified evidence against the Deep State’s actions, and separately for veterans, active duty, and law enforcement in need. This is the time when we take our country back from the Deep State and their Government Gangster cronies. That all starts with encouraging those with information to come forward. Whistleblowers provide “the smoking gun” that we need to prove to the American public that the Deep State is corrupt. And here’s why your support matters: Whistleblowers risk losing their jobs and their entire careers by exposing the truth to the American public. The Kash Foundation has already helped Kyle Seraphin, Steve Friend, Garrett O’Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes.
