name: Aditya Pai from Pai's Politics
subject: Why Kamala lost
body:
A sincere letter to Democratic women

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..OohLEWxPYe5GvYZb-KcfVc35Kfye8SdWsuVyWKisuzI?) for more
---
# [Why Kamala lost](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=151150710&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMTUwNzEwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzEwNzQwMDIsImV4cCI6MTczMzY2NjAwMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.bGH2hJE77ThIZwbOw-VXmiIw5Lk350mX-09rlBcj5E0)
### A sincere letter to Democratic women
| | [Aditya Pai](https://substack.com/@adityapai)
---
| Nov 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@adityapai)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=151150710&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMTUwNzEwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTA3NDAwMiwiZXhwIjoxNzMzNjY2MDAyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTExNzMwIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.jn1RfWZ51H1geyoS3K0tDoemzTt1UcVc4sgz0pV3yy4&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=151150710&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMTUwNzEwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzEwNzQwMDIsImV4cCI6MTczMzY2NjAwMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.bGH2hJE77ThIZwbOw-VXmiIw5Lk350mX-09rlBcj5E0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=151150710&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMTUwNzEwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzEwNzQwMDIsImV4cCI6MTczMzY2NjAwMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.bGH2hJE77ThIZwbOw-VXmiIw5Lk350mX-09rlBcj5E0)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcGFpcG9saXRpY3MvcC93aHkta2FtYWxhLWxvc3Q_.TynpIMypgnUXBukM89j30wp0SQV7v2VssoTWMvYX2dk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paipolitics/p/why-kamala-lost?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
_**" Sounds like misogyny."**_
That was the gist of some responses I got to my pre-election claim -- carefully drafted, by the way -- that the vice president was "mostly incompetent."1
And honestly, it's been deeply hurtful to hear this from women I love.
I'm not a misogynist. I love women. I love all people. Even when they're unkind.
Am I, at the very least, sexist? My answer might not be what you expect: _of course I am, to some extent._ It's impossible to grow up as a boy in America -- and as I did until age 9, India -- without getting at least _some_ gender prejudice programmed into you. This is precisely how unconscious bias works: you're not always aware of it.
To minimize the possibility of implicit bias, I've kept my critique of the vice president very explicit, specific, and, in fact, _singular_ : **in focus group** 2,**after focus group** 3,**after focus group** 4**, undecided voters in the swing states told us that they simply didn 't know enough about her positions to cast a ballot in her favor.** **They were exhausted by Trump, and find him morally distasteful, but they still had no idea who Harris is.**
For example, here's one discussion between two then-undecided swing state voters (_emphasis mine_):
> _" With Harris, she just to date hasn't given me a reason to vote for her. **Every time she gets asked a question, it gets right to the stump speech or goes off on a tangent or doesn 't answer the question directly.** So while I find Trump enraging, I find that she's almost insulting my intelligence, thinking that I'm not gonna see through that." -- _Jaimie, then-undecided male Nevada voter, Sept. 16, 2024.
> _" I can't agree more with you. **I feel insulted by her in some ways.** I feel like this is her election to lose because I do think there are a lot of people who are over Trump and frustrated, and his just, as you said, he's just dividing the country. But, at the same time, I feel like, especially at the debate, **I feel like Kamala went and did the same thing that he 's been doing, and it is insulting, I think, to voters who don't know what to do, and she's not saying or making us feel any more confident in her. And it's very frustrating."** -- _Kim, then-undecided female Pennsylvania voter, Sept. 16, 2024.
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/da725d15-5894-4b4d-b3f6-a804c582a337?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I believe that these voters, and hundreds of thousands like them, were _looking for reasons_ to move past Trump and gave the VP a real chance. But Harris came across like a cipher5, and they stuck with the devil they know rather than the one they do not.
**Unlike partisans, undecided/persuadable voters want to vote** _**for**_**someone, not just against.**
I find Harris's candidacy lacked competence because, as many independent/swing voters will tell you, she did not answer their most basic question:
_Why are you running for president?_ 6
_" I'm not Donald Trump and I'm not Joe Biden"_ is not an answer.7
And it's political malpractice not to give voters more to go on that _that_ -- especially when Harris changed her position on several major policy issues of the last 5 years, without explanation.8
As a consequence of her silence, voters didn't know who she was. So Trump had _carte blanche_ to fill in the details with her 2019 wokeness.9 That was Harris's colossal mistake -- strategic ambiguity that proved unstrategic.
Finally, Harris effectively ended her campaign around noon, Tuesday, October 8th, on the _The View._**When asked what she would do differently than a president with an approval rating of 38% her answer was:**_**" there is not a thing that comes to mind."**_10
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cfd75a80-3061-4d1e-bd84-ec264d3790ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I knew by Labor Day that Trump was going to win the Electoral College. After I watched Kamala on _The View_ , I began to wonder if he might even win the popular vote.
Yes, Harris was hurt by sexism and racism. No, she wouldn't have won if she were a white man.
Why Kamala lost requires one word to explain, and it's not sexist or racist to use it:
_incompetence._
--
_I know Democratic women are hurting right now. I hear you._ And I know you may not agree with what I'm about to say**,** but I gotta say it:**this election was NOT a rebuke of women or abortion rights. It was a rebuke of** _**one**_**woman: Kamala Harris.** 11 A better Democratic female candidate would have won.
For example, here are two excellent female candidates who, [as I predicted alongside Trump's victory](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e53463c1-821a-4067-b1ab-25af4cb03c42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), got elected United States senators in swing states Trump won. I take great solace as a pro-choice feminist in that:
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6437e398-7043-46bd-985f-e019d9434710?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7bbb7750-598e-4cc0-9e01-13d4dc1cda78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Candidate quality matters.**
And yes, if you're a woman or a minority running for president of the United States, being a quality candidate matters even more.
This time Democrats just didn't have one.
1
_[What America Deserves](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/12a38eea-3739-41c2-a15f-7c5fd51edd85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) , _Oct 26, 2024.
2
['GOP pollster Frank Luntz: Harris still hasn't said what she would do on immigration, affordability,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f64fa742-e559-4096-9e96-935d8d2b0d86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _The Hill_ , October 29, 2024.
3
['2WAY Focus Group: Mark Halperin talks with undecided voters in the battleground states,' ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7c77ed34-66c3-44cb-98e1-e4baa2c08226?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_2WAY,_ Sept. 17, 2024.
4
['Harris remains an unknown entity to skeptical Latino voter focus group,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/55fe2df8-581b-44d5-a6cf-d14de5c96682?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _NBC News_ , Aug. 29, 2024.
5
['Cipher,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/46a82611-bb7d-4431-a75e-6be01ffbfb30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _Merriam-Webster._
6
['Start with why,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c43f0757-c90e-45fa-b507-919514fbc9d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in my _MEMO: 3 strategic adjustments would help VP Harris beat Trump_ , Oct 29, 2024.
7
['Harris to Colbert: 'I'm obviously not Joe Biden ... I'm not Donald Trump,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/42b98e97-5fec-420d-84fa-7639a1c16e5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _The Hill,_ Oct. 9, 2024; ['Harris says she is different from Biden because 'I offer a new generation of leadership,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1c52672c-fcd9-40ab-b405-bb10b516a649?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _The Associated Press,_ Sept. 14, 2024. ['A New Way Forward,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7b0892b8-e2b1-4d96-ab84-f78b750e3ecb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _Kamala Harris for President_ (Accessed: Oct 29, 2024).
8
['Harris recalibrates policy stances as she adjusts to role atop Democratic ticket,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ab34a0b0-34db-4c99-b398-706f38dad06f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _CNN_ , July 30, 2024; ['Harris defends shifting positions on fracking and decriminalizing illegal border crossings,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ac02de38-123d-4edb-ae74-7ee3bf8c9d74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _PBS News_ , Aug 30, 2024; ['Harris praised 'defund the police' in 2020. Hear where she stands on the issue now,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/db8729c3-9d6b-41ef-835e-43b31a88c1ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _CNN_ , Jul 27, 2024. ['Sen. Kamala Harris: We Must "Reexamine ICE And Its Role,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1952e46d-e855-4ace-8542-7f17b7208d7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) MSNBC, June 25, 2018. (Then-Sen. Harris: _" We need to probably think about starting from scratch."_); ['KFile: Harris told ACLU in 2019 she supports cuts to ICE funding and providing gender transition surgery to detained migrants,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/02ab9903-a4e2-49f3-b34c-ff6c612b280a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _CNN_ , September 9, 2024; ['Harris isn't pushing Medicare for All anymore. Progressives say that's OK,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6e332fc6-dff8-4e03-80f1-99234294551e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _Politico_ , Aug. 19, 2024; ['KFile: Harris move to the center on border wall, asylum contradicts her years of progressive immigration positions,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b579ae38-c71a-4bb8-8bf9-f7f42601c4e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _CNN_ , Sept. 4, 2024; ['Wall? What Wall? Kamala Harris hasn't clarified her position on immigration and the border wall, and the media won't press her to do so'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b1380000-287d-4e58-af97-6f0ef48764a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), _City Journal_ , Sept. 11, 2024; ['Kamala Harris to Joe Biden: 'I Don't Believe You Are a Racist,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b577d14f-e4c5-4940-93dc-f5189069a5e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _Bloomberg Quicktake/NBC News_ , Jun 27, 2019; ['Harris campaign dodges over EV mandate walkback,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/78ad5c9d-ea19-4cc1-b4a1-dc8f9f187057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _Axios_ , Sept. 4, 2024.
9
['Trump campaign skewers Harris over gov't-funded trans surgery for migrants: "Kamala is for they/them",'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d026411e-429c-4b5d-adfd-d56ea73a363c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _New York Post_ , Sept. 20, 2024.
10
['Kamala Harris says there's 'not a thing' she would have changed about Biden's record #shorts,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7830f386-6122-4be5-a4a2-29f126c5130e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _New York Post_ , Oct. 8, 2024; ['CNN Poll of Polls: Biden approval rating,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2780aab1-69ea-43f1-ae43-0ddc318a339c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _CNN_ , Sept. 20-Nov. 2, 2024.
11
_Women voters explain why they didn 't vote for Kamala Harris: short clip_, in ['Trump 47: Return to Power | 2WAY TONIGHT | Thursday, 11/07/24,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ff27971e-8043-461e-96a8-e0f07ff88ada?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _2WAY_ , Nov. 7, 2024.
* * *
_**Aditya Pai** is a 33-yr-old practicing attorney, writer, and [recent Democratic congressional candidate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8e488c18-d2bf-476d-be33-88392d34e039?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Orange County, CA. He earned a B.A. Summa Cum Laude from Claremont McKenna College, where he served as student body president, and M.Phil. and J.D. degrees in history and law from Cambridge University and Harvard Law School, under the graduate supervision of Nobel Laureate in Economics Amartya Sen. Pai is a naturalized American citizen from Bombay._

clean_body: A sincere letter to Democratic women | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more A sincere letter to Democratic women | | | Nov 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | " Sounds like misogyny." That was the gist of some responses I got to my pre-election claim -- carefully drafted, by the way -- that the vice president was "mostly incompetent."1 And honestly, it's been deeply hurtful to hear this from women I love. I'm not a misogynist. I love women. I love all people. Even when they're unkind. Am I, at the very least, sexist? My answer might not be what you expect: of course I am, to some extent. It's impossible to grow up as a boy in America -- and as I did until age 9, India -- without getting at least some gender prejudice programmed into you. This is precisely how unconscious bias works: you're not always aware of it. To minimize the possibility of implicit bias, I've kept my critique of the vice president very explicit, specific, and, in fact, singular : in focus group 2,after focus group 3,after focus group 4, undecided voters in the swing states told us that they simply didn 't know enough about her positions to cast a ballot in her favor. They were exhausted by Trump, and find him morally distasteful, but they still had no idea who Harris is. For example, here's one discussion between two then-undecided swing state voters (emphasis mine): " With Harris, she just to date hasn't given me a reason to vote for her. Every time she gets asked a question, it gets right to the stump speech or goes off on a tangent or doesn 't answer the question directly. So while I find Trump enraging, I find that she's almost insulting my intelligence, thinking that I'm not gonna see through that." -- Jaimie, then-undecided male Nevada voter, Sept. 16, 2024. " I can't agree more with you. I feel insulted by her in some ways. I feel like this is her election to lose because I do think there are a lot of people who are over Trump and frustrated, and his just, as you said, he's just dividing the country. But, at the same time, I feel like, especially at the debate, I feel like Kamala went and did the same thing that he 's been doing, and it is insulting, I think, to voters who don't know what to do, and she's not saying or making us feel any more confident in her. And it's very frustrating." -- Kim, then-undecided female Pennsylvania voter, Sept. 16, 2024. I believe that these voters, and hundreds of thousands like them, were looking for reasons to move past Trump and gave the VP a real chance. But Harris came across like a cipher5, and they stuck with the devil they know rather than the one they do not. Unlike partisans, undecided/persuadable voters want to vote forsomeone, not just against. I find Harris's candidacy lacked competence because, as many independent/swing voters will tell you, she did not answer their most basic question: Why are you running for president? 6 " I'm not Donald Trump and I'm not Joe Biden" is not an answer.7 And it's political malpractice not to give voters more to go on that that -- especially when Harris changed her position on several major policy issues of the last 5 years, without explanation.8 As a consequence of her silence, voters didn't know who she was. So Trump had carte blanche to fill in the details with her 2019 wokeness.9 That was Harris's colossal mistake -- strategic ambiguity that proved unstrategic. Finally, Harris effectively ended her campaign around noon, Tuesday, October 8th, on the The View.When asked what she would do differently than a president with an approval rating of 38% her answer was:" there is not a thing that comes to mind."10 I knew by Labor Day that Trump was going to win the Electoral College. After I watched Kamala on The View , I began to wonder if he might even win the popular vote. Yes, Harris was hurt by sexism and racism. No, she wouldn't have won if she were a white man. Why Kamala lost requires one word to explain, and it's not sexist or racist to use it: incompetence. -- I know Democratic women are hurting right now. I hear you. And I know you may not agree with what I'm about to say, but I gotta say it:this election was NOT a rebuke of women or abortion rights. It was a rebuke of onewoman: Kamala Harris. 11 A better Democratic female candidate would have won. For example, here are two excellent female candidates who, , got elected United States senators in swing states Trump won. I take great solace as a pro-choice feminist in that: | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Candidate quality matters. And yes, if you're a woman or a minority running for president of the United States, being a quality candidate matters even more. This time Democrats just didn't have one. 1 , Oct 26, 2024. 2 The Hill , October 29, 2024. 3 , Sept. 17, 2024. 4 NBC News , Aug. 29, 2024. 5 Merriam-Webster. 6 in my MEMO: 3 strategic adjustments would help VP Harris beat Trump , Oct 29, 2024. 7 The Hill, Oct. 9, 2024; The Associated Press, Sept. 14, 2024. Kamala Harris for President (Accessed: Oct 29, 2024). 8 CNN , July 30, 2024; PBS News , Aug 30, 2024; CNN , Jul 27, 2024. MSNBC, June 25, 2018. (Then-Sen. Harris: " We need to probably think about starting from scratch."); CNN , September 9, 2024; Politico , Aug. 19, 2024; CNN , Sept. 4, 2024; , City Journal , Sept. 11, 2024; Bloomberg Quicktake/NBC News , Jun 27, 2019; Axios , Sept. 4, 2024. 9 New York Post , Sept. 20, 2024. 10 New York Post , Oct. 8, 2024; CNN , Sept. 20-Nov. 2, 2024. 11 Women voters explain why they didn 't vote for Kamala Harris: short clip, in 2WAY , Nov. 7, 2024. Aditya Pai** is a 33-yr-old practicing attorney, writer, and in Orange County, CA. He earned a B.A. Summa Cum Laude from Claremont McKenna College, where he served as student body president, and M.Phil. and J.D. degrees in history and law from Cambridge University and Harvard Law School, under the graduate supervision of Nobel Laureate in Economics Amartya Sen. Pai is a naturalized American citizen from Bombay. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Aditya Pai 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Kelly Ayotte
subject: Thank you, New Hampshire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kelly for New Hampshire, Chris Connelly Treasurer, PO Box 4723 Manchester, NH 03108**](https://press1535
body:
| | **Can 't see this message? _[View in a browser](https://press1535.wixsite.com/so/3bPC6u8ah/c?w=w9VSrP5AUUUGJKhwZRZRZ2tfsj4YjStm34hy0vj7HY0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wcmVzczE1MzUud2l4c2l0ZS5jb20vc28vM2JQQzZ1OGFoP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, From the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU for your support and your vote. I am honored to have the privilege of serving as your next Governor. This victory is our victory. Whether you joined us to march in parades, knocked on doors, or sent words of encouragement, your efforts were vital to this win. I could not have done it without you! New Hampshire is on a tremendous path thanks to eight years under Governor Sununu's leadership, but we can't be content to rest on those successes. There are very real challenges ahead, and we need to confront them head on if we are going to keep our state moving in the right direction. Together, we will work to tackle our housing crisis, strengthen our mental health system, and continue to improve education for all students. I love and believe in the people of our great state, and I could not be more optimistic that our best days are ahead. This was a hard fought election, with strong opinions on both sides. I want you to know that I am going to be a Governor for all of New Hampshire – and that I will bring a bipartisan spirit to the corner office. I believe that together we can make our great state even better. Joe and I thank each and every one of you for your support, hard work, and encouragement over the course of this campaign. Now, let's get to work to deliver an even brighter future for New Hampshire! All the best, Kelly
---

# ▶️: Expressing Gratitude

As we close out this election season, I want to express my **deepest gratitude** for your hard work, dedication, and belief in our campaign.
[**Please watch the video below for reflections on our campaign and the path ahead:**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=f6b2fd27de&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=62a1bcb8f0&e=a2a46ff12c)
| Although the results weren’t what we’d hoped for, they’ve only strengthened my resolve to continue this fight.
**I fully intend to run again and hope to have your support as we work to flip this seat and bring real change to our community.**
I want to extend special thanks to the organizations, clubs, and individuals who stood by me and invested so much in our shared vision.
**Though this chapter has closed, we’re not done.**
Let’s finish this year on a high note, take stock of all we’ve accomplished, and prepare for what lies ahead.
Together, we’re making a difference, and together, we will continue to fight the good fight.*If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Mother Jones once said, “mourn for the dead, but fight like hell for the living,” and that is what we must do._ In the shadow of recent national developments, our fight for democracy gains even greater significance. Amidst these challenging times, we wish to acknowledge a beacon of hope: our hard-fought victory electing Democrat Josh Stein as North Carolina’s Governor-elect. This triumph, powered by your generous contributions, allowed us to invest over $15,000 in crucial ads against misogynist and MAGA candidate Mark Robinson, affirming that our collective effort can indeed uphold progressive values. **_Yet, the path ahead remains daunting. The recent presidential outcome has cast a long shadow, but it also fortifies our resolve to persist in our endeavors for justice, equality, and true representation in government._** [**Your continued support is vital. Each donation fuels our capacity to combat the challenges that threaten our democratic principles. I urge you to stand with us once more, contributing what you can to sustain this crucial fight.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOs4U0GT0AXg0yu5jPKTFFOqv-J94iiagU0EFt-qvBxRlQuO1oUcNF4gVpJ91YpGxPOcPFod0ZwWcro9ixq5AGjFCpUmBqFxi54P1ZztkIHuOwhK7gNuqaWtW8qldgcvnBL0uixCMtDe4Ul73CRBEzhC8JUxeS3NMZJHIZryUIH6CUOyrfRJtwq_xyxWfW6OXwf-CRR-XluOPffAlu3te7eMBk0MHBwdcupFRRpAVD1wdWJOjCV8iYLyM9BDv1UVsB1XOaRgzcXrC_02gqneS9eLpJGzyyF61M8W-ug6BO6uTAe9Sunvw47P3Q-TcQenXU/4ba/K3RDhvPiQEGye1z2tNLKpQ/h1/h001.HibFG_ENrjM-B9pgMWsrEuSYhHzQl-5jbFbHJlt76RY) Let us move forward together, undeterred, to safeguard our democracy and strive for a future that reflects our ideals. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Jordan Zaslow
subject: The story of women in America is far from over…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96783798/511176897/1701071684?refcode=EM_C_241107recap_N_JZ_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhMGJlMmVmLWRkOWQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Xxd7Iv96uQOMwNdo2e87c2eCxC9IFp4r-DuqUD4fjCw=)
---
Hi Peter,

As the dust settles from the unbelievably disappointing results of Tuesday’s elections, we wanted to check in to remind you of the power you still have.

Women have made unimaginable progress in less than 1 century. Many of our mothers and grandmothers remember a time when women couldn't even open their own credit cards or apply for high paying jobs. None of the rights women have today were handed to us. Women fought TIRELESSLY for them. They committed to never giving up and won SO MANY critical battles.

This is a devastating, monumental, and, yes, terrifying setback in the story of women in America. We have lost trust in our fellow Americans' desire to see us thrive or even survive. Trump, his supporters, and the misogyny he has normalized, have promised to continue waging a war on women.

In the days since Trump’s victory, young men within the MAGA movement have started a disturbing trend of commenting on women’s social media posts, “Your body. MY choice.”

We are sickened, and we WILL NOT STAND FOR IT.

Over the next few years, the work we do at Her Bold Move will be more important than ever. We MUST continue working to elect pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women to our government AT ALL LEVELS. We must continue the work of unseating the legislators who worked to strip us of our rights.

We have a vision for this country, and a dream of FINALLY seeing ourselves, our daughters, our friends, and our fellow American women represented at the highest level of our government. We will get there. But it will take continued work and determination. We hope you’ll continue to join us.

[**Donate to Her Bold Move today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96783799/511176898/1701071684?refcode=EM_C_241107recap_N_JZ_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhMGJlMmVmLWRkOWQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Xxd7Iv96uQOMwNdo2e87c2eCxC9IFp4r-DuqUD4fjCw=)

With love and solidarity,

Jordan Zaslow
Founder & Executive Director
Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move believes that ambitious women will transform our country. We provide critical support for fiercely pro-choice women candidates and their campaign teams: financial support, endorsements, message amplification, campaign media, fundraising support, and more.

In the days since Trump’s victory, young men within the MAGA movement have started a disturbing trend of commenting on women’s social media posts, “Your body. MY choice.” We are sickened, and we WILL NOT STAND FOR IT. Over the next few years, the work we do at Her Bold Move will be more important than ever. We MUST continue working to elect pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women to our government AT ALL LEVELS. We must continue the work of unseating the legislators who worked to strip us of our rights. We have a vision for this country, and a dream of FINALLY seeing ourselves, our daughters, our friends, and our fellow American women represented at the highest level of our government. We will get there. But it will take continued work and determination. We hope you’ll continue to join us. = With love and solidarity, Jordan Zaslow Founder & Executive Director Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move believes that ambitious women will transform our country. We provide critical support for fiercely pro-choice women candidates and their campaign teams: financial support, endorsements, message amplification, campaign media, fundraising support, and more. Will you support us with a contribution today? = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. Her Bold Move One Park Row 5th Floor Providence, RI 02903 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe this email was sent in error, please contact us at info@herboldmove.org. We'd hate to see you go, but if you must, you can . To learn more about Her Bold Move Action, please visit us at herboldmove.org.

| | | Now that convicted felon Donald Trump has won the election, President Biden is [facing calls](https://default.salsalabs.org/T113dbe61-66ff-4712-a977-9d7ee169f2da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) from Republicans and even some others to pardon him for his crimes related to January 6th and his mishandling of classified documents. As if that would help bring our country together. **[Absolutely NOT! Tell President Biden: DO NOT Pardon Trump!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1e54b3d-b6fd-4b73-92cc-9579c75987f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Trump doesn't deserve to have the slate wiped clean -- he put our democracy and national security at risk. We won't forget what he's done, even if he pardons himself or goes after the justice department. But he definitely doesn't get to come in on day one with a fresh start. [**Add your name to tell President Biden: Do NOT pardon Trump!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2e1ead3-241c-4a76-a1fd-fd4ed3969520/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: With Honor Action
subject: Thank you, Veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/596fc22e1810/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14050170?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/596fc22e1810/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14050170?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Friends, As we approach Veterans Day weekend and the end of another election cycle, it is important that we take a moment to consider the sacrifice every single veteran has made, and every single current service member is making, to defend our rights – especially our right to vote in free and fair elections.

We also want to applaud the 513 veterans who ran for Congress this election cycle across party lines, including the more than 80 who have won their elections and will join the 119th Congress. For an assessment of the results of veterans running for Congress this election cycle, please reference this [Military Times article](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=4b807a101e&e=33f53a5b1a). The 30 veterans endorsed by With Honor's political action committees who won their elections this cycle, understand the issues plaguing service members across the country, and put party politics aside in order to get real things done for the American people. An example of this is the bipartisan House Armed Services Committee’s [Military Quality of Life Panel](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=2bea35e254&e=33f53a5b1a) led by For Country Caucus founding Co-Chair Representative Don Bacon and founding Vice Chair Representative Chrissy Houlahan. The panel’s recommendations served as the base text for this year’s House version of the National Defense Authorization Act, including legislation to address [military food insecurity](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=489f0beafc&e=33f53a5b1a), military housing, and military spouse employment. To learn more about what With Honor Action is doing on this topic and other military quality of life issues, check out our [website here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=c4b613970c&e=33f53a5b1a).
---
| | | |
---
| Please follow With Honor Action on X via this [link](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=f396d255c5&e=33f53a5b1a),
and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.
---

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: We’re still in this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hi friend,
**Our race for Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District is still undecided.** The stakes feel higher than ever, but we’re still in this.
In 2022, it took a week to determine a winner.
Now, we’re neck-and-neck -- but thousands of lawful votes still need to be counted.
**While we continue to monitor the returns, we must ensure that every lawful vote is counted and the will of AZ-06 voters is carried out, no matter how long it takes.**
[**To do that, we’ll need your grassroots support. Can you split a donation between my campaign and GIFFORDS PAC to help us ensure that every lawful vote is counted fairly and securely?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24-engel.qopc3n&refcode=em2401108-1-30&t=1&akid=9396%2E3935704%2E9arC5L)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Will you help us ensure every last vote is counted in Nevada?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I have nowhere else to turn
Are you awake, Peter? I’m sorry for the early morning email – but I have important election news out of Nevada, and I have nowhere else to turn.
Our U.S. Senate race here in Nevada is _still_ too close to call, meaning this race will come down to just a handful of votes. My campaign is hard at work phone banking and canvassing to help with ballot curing and to ensure _every last vote_ is properly counted.
But we spent all of our resources to get through Election Day, and now we need emergency funds to keep this work going until the race is officially called. **[My senior advisors and I just met, and they told me we need to raise another $136,299 to keep this work going. Will you chip in a split donation to my campaign and Lucas Kunce now to help get us across the finish line?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84046?refcode=em20241108-8655&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&t=1&akid=8655%2E614464%2EXKlEDo)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84046?refcode=em20241108-8655&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&t=2&akid=8655%2E614464%2EXKlEDo)**
You can bet Republicans are going to put up a fight. But you and I know what hard work looks like – and I’m confident that we have what it takes to win in Nevada again if we can make it through this final step.
Thank you for sticking with me.
– Jacky

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8655%2E614464%2EXKlEDo). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Just when I thought it was the end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
BREAKING: A federal judge is now considering...
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=cd9dac6f36d34e038212f8a25a6365c1&_e=rHH9wLF9pv6ZBDevThDqd1KfPQE9G-fKZJCXqIdTUrSV0hjLPQ1IOgsEeUtqrpXAadlMCXiCWvnEG6dtRocQL6i0wvf0MZ67P5EVPzpz7CD7xtWR5x60syzIh9bGbVn_z2GP9_PxZhWMott1_RF9Cc8QPIgR8GLjazZzCyXKimrx-iejknSbdtKcxUnzGsOeSGajgBFoOwI-3BCtiUBBF-UBituWBQUQgqR8uIxgtouQY1yJ5H3Tn_EyEZzLYa18dhdzUTS0g2L6SpdUzTad4BY1jIzdLpPI-izPyaLOXvSagDxYrJILoK60DzWCK-LZuLwyHtpb5zdQV9hTcP-zriWC20NZqjahbhcLRFVm8xFMsKXNzWIIG1h1EPs4V5dDRd5KGvcEEueyPGHz9MphMgDTr4YORhz03-AwunwJMnALWjJjgmm7pFuZUHCNdQpo6wJ-OS4StQW9RhBU9W8Dcg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
On October 22, a federal judge decreed that I had 7 days to hand over my home in New York - as well as my only car and sentimental keepsakes and heartfelt gifts that I collected over the span of 80 years.
---
_I thought that would be the end of the damage ..._
---
Kamala's Deep State _truly_ wants to ruin me with all they've got. They're now considering dealing one final blow to me.
---
**A judge may now order me to give up my _remaining_ home in Florida - __my primary residence.__**
---
As my lawyer inquired: _**do they truly want me homeless?**_
---
Over the last few days, we've heard ridiculous claims about President Trump being a "fascist."
---
Let me tell you what fascism is... Fascism is weaponizing the legal system to punish your political opponents. Fascism is having your home taken from you. Fascism is taking the law license away from your opponent's lawyer. Fascism is trying to turn your enemies into political prisoners.
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=cd9dac6f36d34e038212f8a25a6365c1&_e=rHH9wLF9pv6ZBDevThDqd1KfPQE9G-fKZJCXqIdTUrSV0hjLPQ1IOgsEeUtqrpXAadlMCXiCWvnEG6dtRocQL6i0wvf0MZ67P5EVPzpz7CD7xtWR5x60syzIh9bGbVn_z2GP9_PxZhWMott1_RF9Cc8QPIgR8GLjazZzCyXKimrx-iejknSbdtKcxUnzGsOeSGajgBFoOwI-3BCtiUBBF-UBituWBQUQgqR8uIxgtouQY1yJ5H3Tn_EyEZzLYa18dhdzUTS0g2L6SpdUzTad4L5cShMFLH06_sZTm0ahOLTQXqyftd9fCOsWSZAVG-kCm8EhSv1S98p9tQkKvA5feP4dGylKAhVpfpeU1gfG-PJLsi94sCfXRDxGs4qNOLvbKQGDwPvpJuQLEYWRCXaiuGH_q-TBSzjMffSN6XPbOem2KRnfD8uwdpF7kE-iVUXR)
---
_**I am _living through_ the Democrats' fascism right now.** _
---
I sincerely pray that freedom, justice, and the truth prevail - or the damage done to me will spread like wildfire to the rest of our great Republic.
---
**But, as I wrote to you in an earlier letter, the Bible reminds us that our earthly possessions will always fade, but greater "heavenly treasures" await us.**
---
_The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than a car or a home. Possessions come and go, but I could _NEVER SURRENDER_ my fight for freedom and for what I know to be _true.__
---
I would be tone deaf if I didn't acknowledge that times are tough right now for _all_ Americans, not just me, so please stop reading here if you cannot give at this time.
---
_But funding my Legal Defense Trust is my last remaining hope of fighting for my freedom and for the liberty and justice of all Americans._
---

clean_body: BREAKING: A federal judge is now considering... | Dear Peter, On October 22, a federal judge decreed that I had 7 days to hand over my home in New York - as well as my only car and sentimental keepsakes and heartfelt gifts that I collected over the span of 80 years. I thought that would be the end of the damage ... Kamala's Deep State truly wants to ruin me with all they've got. They're now considering dealing one final blow to me. A judge may now order me to give up my remaining home in Florida - my primary residence. As my lawyer inquired: do they truly want me homeless? Over the last few days, we've heard ridiculous claims about President Trump being a "fascist." Let me tell you what fascism is... Fascism is weaponizing the legal system to punish your political opponents. Fascism is having your home taken from you. Fascism is taking the law license away from your opponent's lawyer. Fascism is trying to turn your enemies into political prisoners. I am living through the Democrats' fascism right now. I sincerely pray that freedom, justice, and the truth prevail - or the damage done to me will spread like wildfire to the rest of our great Republic. But, as I wrote to you in an earlier letter, the Bible reminds us that our earthly possessions will always fade, but greater "heavenly treasures" await us. The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than a car or a home. Possessions come and go, but I could NEVER SURRENDER my fight for freedom and for what I know to be true. I would be tone deaf if I didn't acknowledge that times are tough right now for all Americans, not just me, so please stop reading here if you cannot give at this time. But funding my Legal Defense Trust is my last remaining hope of fighting for my freedom and for the liberty and justice of all Americans. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

# Trump’s Plan To Avoid

Donald Trump has reclaimed the White House, and America is on the path to victory once again.

But don’t think for a second that the Dems on the inside will go down without a fight.

Whether stirring up controversy through identity politics in the liberal media, or creating economic turbulence through market manipulation, there are many present threats to your financial future.

They use these tactics to enrich themselves while everyday Americans watch their retirement accounts slowly erode under market volatility.

The constant volatility benefits them, but it’s draining the hard-earned money in your retirement accounts.

Whether it’s a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension, your post retirement future could be in serious danger if you are not aware of the options you have to protect your wealth from their game.

I mean it when I say it - THANK YOU! But the work is far from over. As I watch returns continue to trickle in, our key races to keep the majority are looking very, _very_ close – and some could even wind up in a recount. As Speaker, I promised to see our conservative House candidates to the very end, even beyond Election Day. And now, as the votes are being counted, they need us more than ever. name: Citizens Alliance New Hampshire
subject: New Hampshire wins BIG 🏆
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS ALLIANCE OF NEW HAMPSHIRE]()
body:
Together, they are prepared to build a transparent, accountable, and liberty-centered Legislature that truly represents the people of our great state. | | | | | [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=3976b6a561&e=8c8e704ee6)
---
| | | | | Peter, we have major news...
During this election cycle, we proudly endorsed 88 candidates committed to upholding the values of liberty and transparency.

**Of those endorsed, 71 of our champions won their races and will represent us in the New Hampshire House of Representatives!**

We want to personally congratulate our 71 champions on their well-deserved victories!
---
[](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=1a6241ef35&e=8c8e704ee6)
[KEEP THE MOMENTUM ALIVE! JOIN CITIZENS ALLIANCE OF NEW HAMPSHIRE IN SUPPORTING OUR LIBERTY CHAMPIONS >>>](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=397a7b56e6&e=8c8e704ee6)
| Each of these 71 champions has signed our Pledge, committing to supporting and sponsoring legislation that honors the principles set forth by our founders in the New Hampshire and US Constitutions.

Together, they are prepared to build a transparent, accountable, and liberty-centered Legislature that truly represents the people of our great state.
---
| **NEXT STEPS: BUILDING A STRONGER, FREER NEW HAMPSHIRE**

With these 71 champions, we’re on our way to fostering bold, liberty-minded legislation that strengthens New Hampshire’s place as a beacon of freedom for the entire nation.

But we can’t stop here — our work to expand our roster of liberty advocates in Concord has just begun. We need to keep the momentum going and ensure that New Hampshire remains a model of accountable government, where leaders act with integrity and keep their promises to the people.

Our efforts during the election cycle have laid a strong foundation. Together, we knocked on over 12,000 doors, sent over 200,000 text messages, and ran targeted digital advertising campaigns in support of our Pledge Signers.

Every ounce of energy was dedicated to empowering candidates who will stand strong for New Hampshire’s future.
**Keep the momentum alive! Join Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire in our fight for a more transparent and accountable government.

**[**Donate $20 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $2,500 >>>
Donate any amount to SAVE NEW HAMPSHIRE >>>**](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=46766b1388&e=8c8e704ee6)
Every donation you make will go directly toward our ongoing work to advance liberty-minded leadership in New Hampshire.

Together, we’ll build a Legislature that not only reflects our values but keeps our state a true sanctuary for freedom.

Thank you for standing with Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire and for believing in a brighter, freer future.

For Liberty,
---
[](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=4d5af807f4&e=8c8e704ee6)

---
USO Supporter,
In a couple of days, the United States Marine Corps will celebrate its 249th birthday. As a daughter of a retired Marine, this day is especially meaningful for my family and me.
It can be difficult to truly understand the sacrifices our military heroes make day in and day out. Right now, thousands of Marines are deployed to some of the most dangerous places around the world, putting their lives on the line to keep us safe back at home. That's why I hope you'll take a moment to sign the official USMC birthday card now. Please, **[will you add your name to our Marine Corps birthday card and show these heroes how grateful you are for their service?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/xdbZhGpNR~h2/S0ZyMXJoQ2cvc1ZVWXU1cjV0S3Y1bnRXOEVja3hDa29DOGdEVWJEeUZ4S0NVanlXaUFSODF0a0srQ01zM0RmbTNQZ2dvbzVBanFJRTE4ZHFvUHJHVTYxYUFlWm1FN3NPRnc3ZnFoSGZBbXM9S0/SlNHWHJlMGVDL1l3SXhueC85S000NXFqeGJMZnFHUHZDeC9tYU05TSsxQ3dzbFFXWTUyTEFSTUpPSVVoVkQrb0hSNGllMnAyYzFzcEQ4a3JwWTAxRlp4QVhoSEJTY05wS0)**
[SIGN THE MARINE CORPS BIRTHDAY CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
I know signing a card might not seem like a big deal, but it means the world to Marines like my dad when military supporters thank them for their service and sacrifice. Your name on our card reminds our heroes in uniform that we haven't forgotten them and to stay strong during their most challenging moments.
**But we only have two days! And we can 't reach our signature goal without your help: [Please, take a moment to add your name and honor our courageous Marines ahead of this important day.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[SIGN THE MARINE CORPS BIRTHDAY CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
On behalf of my family, thank you for supporting the Marines. Semper Fi.
Maggie Cowart, USO

Friend,

_Out-of-state Democrat elites tried to tear us down, but we fought back!_

Now that we've officially WON re-election, I'm preparing my agenda for 2025 and need your help. I promise to continue to focus on the issues that matter most to true American patriots like you in 2025.
_**[Defending your Constitutional rights>>

Combating skyrocketing inflation >>

Securing our Southern border >>

Backing the blue >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp0td1mscnrcahmlcv25acfq0tfobutdgb58gm4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1ie6o35cph2bs)**_
Friend, you've stood by me since the beginning, so there's no one else I trust more than YOU to help me finalize my agenda for 2025.

My team and I personally curated an **[Official 2025 Agenda Survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbbjc6bv9m7gcc1rqlml0bfg4haqav4rjb1ll9lg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1ie6o35cph2bs)** for you to complete, and I need your response ASAP. **[Please confirm your responses here.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrsh24farhi279jtd9qj7bafp3mmjpkqibeliqk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1ie6o35cph2bs)**

name: Dr. Asif Mahmood
subject: Gratitude & Commitment
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us14.campaign-archive.com/?e=7b1b739a89&u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=26ef0ddf7b)
---
| | | | |

Dear Friends,
I wanted to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude for your incredible support, hard work, and dedication throughout this journey. While the results of this election were not what we had hoped for, we still have so much to be proud of. Together, we stood up for our values and vision, demonstrating the strength and unity of our community.
I am especially proud of Vice President Kamala Harris and her entire team for running a campaign grounded in integrity, courage, and a commitment to the issues that truly matter to us all. Their tireless work and unwavering spirit have inspired millions and brought hope to so many across this country.
As we look to the future, the road ahead may have its challenges, but our work is far from over. We still have much to do to ensure our values shape the policies and progress we envision for our country. Our commitment to equality, access to healthcare, economic opportunity, and the protection and restoration of women’s reproductive rights, along with the safeguarding of democratic principles, will guide us as we continue moving forward together.Let’s build on the momentum we’ve created, stay engaged, and support one another in this shared mission. Our collective voice and actions will be crucial as we take the next steps toward realizing a brighter future for all.
Thank you again for your unwavering support. I am honored to work alongside each of you in this journey.
Sincerely,
Asif

---
| | | | | | |

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We’re going to fight our way through
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, I know the last few days haven’t gone how we’d hoped.
I’ve been through some tough times in my life. Times when it seemed foolish to hope, when the outcome was uncertain. I got through those tough times by fighting my way to the other side. Today, tomorrow, and the next day, we have to fight.
With Republican control of the Senate assured, every seat that we win is a check on their control. I won’t shy away from working with anyone if it’s in the best interest of Arizona, but whatever power we retain is a mechanism for fighting the worst that might come our way.
My race is still too close to call. There are hundreds of thousands of votes yet to be counted. We need to run through the tape and win this seat in Arizona.
[**Please, make a donation to my campaign. One last push to victory in Arizona. This matters, Peter. And I would not be asking you for help if it didn’t.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov24-overtime.lIuiiG&refcode=em241108-1-160e&t=1&akid=3551%2E734936%2EMn-PYh)

subject: Our work isn't done in Nevada:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
We can't afford to lose another Senate seat |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96789598/511195237/2020196845?refcode=WTEFHW41_20241108_RosenCureRS2_PL_MO&sourceid=1055427&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzA1YzM3ZS1lMzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6yf5I8q8XBDAX5xV4nwEwYN42GWyYagdN_ndrXZpr0M=) Here's where things stand, Peter: **Nevada's Senate race is still too close to call —**** which means our work isn't done yet. And we're expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes**.

We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada, they'll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda — including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: **[Please, will you split a donation now between my campaign and EMILYs List to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96789599/511195238/2020196845?refcode=WTEFHW41_20241108_RosenCureRS2_PL_MO&sourceid=1055427&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzA1YzM3ZS1lMzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6yf5I8q8XBDAX5xV4nwEwYN42GWyYagdN_ndrXZpr0M=)** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96789600/511195239/2020196845?refcode=WTEFHW41_20241108_RosenCureRS2_PL_MO&sourceid=1055427&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzA1YzM3ZS1lMzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6yf5I8q8XBDAX5xV4nwEwYN42GWyYagdN_ndrXZpr0M=)

We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and keep Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day — because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country.

Our work isn't done until every vote in Nevada is counted. And that will take time, and money.

clean_body: We can't afford to lose another Senate seat | = Here's where things stand, Peter: Nevada's Senate race is still too close to call — which means our work isn't done yet. And we're expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes. We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada, they'll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda — including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: = | = We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and keep Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day — because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Our work isn't done until every vote in Nevada is counted. And that will take time, and money. So please, Peter, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment: = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you so much, Jacky EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Bob Casey
subject: I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4801%2E552475%2Em7NWk6)
Hello, Peter.
This Senate race is still too close to call, and my team needs your help to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard.
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241108-1?refcode=em20241108-1&refcode2=4801_552475_m7NWk6&akid=4801%2E552475%2Em7NWk6)**
It has been made clear there are more than 100,000 votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out and ensure that every vote that is eligible to be counted will be counted. That is what Pennsylvania deserves.
My team is working hard to make sure every ballot is properly counted, but we’ll need the resources to make sure we can keep up this work.
**[So please, donate $5 or more today to ensure we have what it takes to count every last vote.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241108-1?refcode=em20241108-1&refcode2=4801_552475_m7NWk6&akid=4801%2E552475%2Em7NWk6)**

Bob Casey

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We Never Quit!
body:
Your time is valuable, so let me get right to the point... While the country waited for the election results, Judicial Watch didn’t take a day off fighting for you, for the U.S. Constitution, and for open and honest government.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Your time is valuable, so let me get right to the point...
**While the country waited for the election results, Judicial Watch didn 't take a day off fighting for you, for the U.S. Constitution, and for open and honest government.**
**That 's because our investigations and litigation don't take a break!**
**[And that’s why I respectfully ask you to make a contribution today help us stay on track?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71014&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71014&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

* **We _keep_ fighting for honest elections...and it pays off!**

Just before the election, a federal court panel ruled in our favor in our lawsuit challenging **Mississippi 's** law "extending" Election Day...setting a huge precedent for more lawsuits to protect "Election Day" as defined under federal law. Our similar lawsuit against **Illinois** continues, and last month we sued **Oregon** for its failure to clean its voter rolls.

And make no mistake about it... _our commitment to the hard work of keeping elections honest paid off this week, as Election Day came and went without any of the chaos and confusion that marred the 2020 vote_!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71014&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

* **And we are fighting for the legal principle that "no discrimination based on race" means exactly that!**

We're pursuing our lawsuit in **Minnesota** to overturn a teachers' contract that gives unlawfully discriminatory job protections to racial minorities, in violation of the Minnesota Constitution, and we are suing the city of **Evanston, Illinois** over its "**reparations** " program that distributes city funds to certain residents and descendants of former residents _based on race_ ...which violates the Equal Protection Clause of the U.S. Constitution.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71014&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

We have never been more deeply involved in consequential legal battles, as well as fighting _every day_ for the American people's "right to know" what our government is doing.

...and that is why I am so _[counting on you to give us your help again now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71014&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_.

The American legal system is slow at times, but it is our best safeguard in upholding the rule of law!

Because of our members’ support, your Judicial Watch is the largest and most effective government watchdog group in the nation. We're always fighting for you and the rule of law!

Thank you in advance for helping us perform all this essential work.

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71014&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

|

Washington, DC 20024

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: You have an important role to play right now, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96791297/511200271/-154088383?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1735-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWY4YmE1MS1lNjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giOnaNIoIu3EOqXbQbl2NJ8Hi95xa199_Ei8TfG0j_4=)
Peter —

When I first launched this campaign, I never would’ve dreamed that this many people would have my back.

It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we’ve built together.

Here’s where we’re at in Arizona:

I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close.

Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down.

Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it.

I know you’ve already given so much, but I’ve got to ask you one more time, Peter:

**[If you’re looking for some way to have an impact and help us fight back against Kari Lake as we work to ensure the votes are counted, please make a split donation to my campaign and Letitia James.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96791298/511200272/-154088383?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1735-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWY4YmE1MS1lNjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giOnaNIoIu3EOqXbQbl2NJ8Hi95xa199_Ei8TfG0j_4=)**

clean_body: | | | = Peter — When I first launched this campaign, I never would’ve dreamed that this many people would have my back. It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we’ve built together. Here’s where we’re at in Arizona: I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close. Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down. Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it. I know you’ve already given so much, but I’ve got to ask you one more time, Peter: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Letitia James and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks again, and Semper Fi. — Ruben | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Michael DiManna
subject: Thank you for your support!
disclaimer_text: Paid for By The Committee to Elect Michael DiManna for HD2, Registered Agent Michael DiManna www
body:
Please see my message on the election results in HD2...
| | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001blI_zjGNzEXgvdSCwI3xhKFrkychUDT7q_lsY2keJZtw5vSV4WEIbYtxRWsVPE4ppPBdKMkP4S_voE_6gnQKFf9uiJjGUwqkr56MlhfhUNB1AAwFq9reYptX99kLr6qUD32vb5UzaOK9FGL40krNJybOw3F2560xPwqx1M2Uj4lF-K-wIin6ASQvhwmW84lWPtrVczmcawznlhyQyIq1Cg==&c=whVCWa92jO4b15bD7QMBpkdQ6i7iQbQrPHbxj0GFRoYgCm6_ka4ARA==&ch=8WIbFmz1iOXCrOjCTzGlt6Tspvm3C1uF-pNgBZLFqDklwtYP8YRJuA==)
---
| Friends, I first want to thank you for your tremendous support of our campaign over the past several months. Here in HD2, we knew this was a herculean effort to defeat Steven Woodrow, and we gave it one hell of a fighting chance.
We raised over $40,000 in this race thanks to your generous support and we left it all on the field, not even leaving enough in the bank to refund my personal loan of $5,000 that we used to start this movement.
I am pleased to report that we performed better than any republican candidate in this race since 2016, winning over 24.5% of the vote. As we move forward, I hope that we have reminded Rep. Woodrow that he represents not just his party, but all of HD2 in the legislature and I pray that he will take his constituents into account over these next two years.
Lastly, I want to thank my incredible campaign team, donors, and family for supporting and making this campaign possible. I am humbled by the love and support you have shown. I congratulate Representative Woodrow on his win in HD2, and I look forward to whatever comes next on my journey.
As we move forward, my faith is renewed in America as we prepare to enter four years of prosperous America First Leadership under President-Elect Donald Trump. I congratulate our 45th and soon-to-be 47th President on his resounding win in the General Election, it was an honor to appear on the ballot with him, and I look forward to supporting his administration in any way I can.
It is time to Make America Great Again, so let's get to work!
---
| My gratitude and thanks,
---
| [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001blI_zjGNzEXgvdSCwI3xhKFrkychUDT7q_lsY2keJZtw5vSV4WEIbYtxRWsVPE4ppPBdKMkP4S_voE_6gnQKFf9uiJjGUwqkr56MlhfhUNB1AAwFq9reYptX99kLr6qUD32vb5UzaOK9FGL40krNJybOw3F2560xPwqx1M2Uj4lF-K-wIin6ASQvhwmW84lWPtrVczmcawznlhyQyIq1Cg==&c=whVCWa92jO4b15bD7QMBpkdQ6i7iQbQrPHbxj0GFRoYgCm6_ka4ARA==&ch=8WIbFmz1iOXCrOjCTzGlt6Tspvm3C1uF-pNgBZLFqDklwtYP8YRJuA==)
---

name: Center for Reproductive Rights
subject: Here's what we’re up against—and how you can help
body:
Top takeaways from our post-U.S. election debrief | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96791749/511201955/2141984067?sourceid=1150025&utm_campaign=25emkge-1102aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=townhall&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzkxNGE0NC1lNzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUyyqyxV-qtV8GA8Gv2cfj3bZD0Wmn4BZ2zXNOFencM=&emci=bd26777c-6e9d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=a7914a44-e79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96791750/511201956/2141984067?sourceid=1150025&utm_campaign=25emkge-1102aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=townhall&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzkxNGE0NC1lNzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUyyqyxV-qtV8GA8Gv2cfj3bZD0Wmn4BZ2zXNOFencM=&emci=bd26777c-6e9d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=a7914a44-e79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

Yesterday we held a post-election briefing to break down the U.S. election results, what's at stake in the ongoing fight for reproductive rights, and [ **most importantly, how you can make a difference.** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96791751/511201957/2141984067?sourceid=1150025&utm_campaign=25emkge-1102aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=townhall&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzkxNGE0NC1lNzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUyyqyxV-qtV8GA8Gv2cfj3bZD0Wmn4BZ2zXNOFencM=&emci=bd26777c-6e9d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=a7914a44-e79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237)

[**The call was recorded and is now available to watch**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96791752/511201958/-629098520?sourceid=1150025&utm_campaign=25emkge-1102aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=townhall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzkxNGE0NC1lNzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUyyqyxV-qtV8GA8Gv2cfj3bZD0Wmn4BZ2zXNOFencM=&emci=bd26777c-6e9d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=a7914a44-e79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237)**. **As I mentioned in the call, the Center will be a legal fighting force when it comes to the Trump administration, and we'll need you with us. | [**PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96791753/511201959/2141984067?sourceid=1150025&utm_campaign=25emkge-1102aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=townhall&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzkxNGE0NC1lNzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUyyqyxV-qtV8GA8Gv2cfj3bZD0Wmn4BZ2zXNOFencM=&emci=bd26777c-6e9d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=a7914a44-e79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237 "PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS")
---
Our discussion underscored the urgency of this moment for abortion access and reproductive rights. [ **Here are the TOP 3 things the Center is prepared to do:** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96791754/511201960/2141984067?sourceid=1150025&utm_campaign=25emkge-1102aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=townhall&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzkxNGE0NC1lNzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUyyqyxV-qtV8GA8Gv2cfj3bZD0Wmn4BZ2zXNOFencM=&emci=bd26777c-6e9d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=a7914a44-e79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237)
1. Defend patients and providers targeted for investigation or prosecution, and bring litigation to challenge any misuse of the 1873 Comstock Act to block abortion access.
2. Use administrative law and the courts to block harmful actions by the Department of Health and Human Services, the Department of Justice, and the State Department.
3. Monitor dangerous policies and appointments, leverage oversight tools, and litigate if necessary to block harmful policies and protect access to care.

We’re ready for this next fight. We will scrutinize every action of the White House and federal agencies, amass the factual and legal record to counter agency actions, and work to stop harmful policies from going into effect. **[We're in this together, Peter.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96791755/511201961/2141984067?sourceid=1150025&utm_campaign=25emkge-1102aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=townhall&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzkxNGE0NC1lNzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUyyqyxV-qtV8GA8Gv2cfj3bZD0Wmn4BZ2zXNOFencM=&emci=bd26777c-6e9d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=a7914a44-e79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237)**

Onward,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO
P.S.**** To stay updated on breaking news, critical updates, and more ways for you to get involved in the fight for our rights, **text ACTIVE to 73776**. Thank you for being with us.

clean_body: Top takeaways from our post-U.S. election debrief | | | ---|--- Peter, Yesterday we held a post-election briefing to break down the U.S. election results, what's at stake in the ongoing fight for reproductive rights, and . As I mentioned in the call, the Center will be a legal fighting force when it comes to the Trump administration, and we'll need you with us. | "PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS" Our discussion underscored the urgency of this moment for abortion access and reproductive rights. 1. Defend patients and providers targeted for investigation or prosecution, and bring litigation to challenge any misuse of the 1873 Comstock Act to block abortion access. 2. Use administrative law and the courts to block harmful actions by the Department of Health and Human Services, the Department of Justice, and the State Department. 3. Monitor dangerous policies and appointments, leverage oversight tools, and litigate if necessary to block harmful policies and protect access to care. We’re ready for this next fight. We will scrutinize every action of the White House and federal agencies, amass the factual and legal record to counter agency actions, and work to stop harmful policies from going into effect. Onward, Nancy Northup President & CEO P.S.** To stay updated on breaking news, critical updates, and more ways for you to get involved in the fight for our rights, text ACTIVE to 73776**. Thank you for being with us. "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: brian
subject: weird email to send you
body:

| | Quick clarification...

I've got a couple of angry messages from people over the past few days...

They were mad because I _ _ supposedly _"blocked them on Facebook."_

**Well, I didn’t.**

Because I recently deleted my entire Facebook account and it felt so good that the dopamine rush is still lingering. So, it’s tough to block people on a platform that I'm not on, right?

So this is just a heads up.

I am **_NOT_ **on Facebook anymore.

I refuse to participate in that dumpster fire of a platform or fund their ad frenzy during election time.

Just a public service announcement from your local neighborhood Senator.

Cheers,

Brian

---
Hey team — With just 2 days left to cure ballots in Arizona, we’re in a race against time to make sure every single vote counts in this election. If you’re unfamiliar with the process, ballot curing is an important step in the voting process. Sometimes, voters make small errors with mail-in ballots — like a missing signature or a signature that doesn’t match official records. When this happens, ballot curing gives voters a final opportunity to fix these errors so that their vote can finally be counted. The fix is simple: we reach out to the affected voters and help them work with their county officials to correct any issues. We know that some sources have already called some critical races in Arizona, but with so many votes outstanding, we can’t afford to leave anything to chance. We only have 2 days left and we need your support to make sure we can reach every voter who needs help. **[Can you pitch in right now to help us support volunteers working on this ballot curing effort? clean_body: | = Hey team — With just 2 days left to cure ballots in Arizona, we’re in a race against time to make sure every single vote counts in this election. If you’re unfamiliar with the process, ballot curing is an important step in the voting process. Sometimes, voters make small errors with mail-in ballots — like a missing signature or a signature that doesn’t match official records. When this happens, ballot curing gives voters a final opportunity to fix these errors so that their vote can finally be counted. The fix is simple: we reach out to the affected voters and help them work with their county officials to correct any issues. We know that some sources have already called some critical races in Arizona, but with so many votes outstanding, we can’t afford to leave anything to chance. We only have 2 days left and we need your support to make sure we can reach every voter who needs help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for helping us in this final push to make sure every vote is counted. — Arizona Democratic Party Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. RICK MCGUIRE, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG
