body:
Only half the votes for my battleground House race in CA-9 are in, and as you can see, it’s a dead heat.

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaef310ec92e4e548156e7899458ceee&_e=Yz2hCzdEjA05KRgoX2ZyjySfmCjiFPvTZzSzbJEB9-50yzliVdtixVuyFfcOxbPZrxh6piMAhrERvplRvAxlLe9nT9yUHyKrH-V589FY-hnWR_f2eWAAqWEEH7Wh-CPFYxPGldvu1uRYBG2Um65qCyjNdFSkia_RJx-MPE2SsOehOLi2izLbQu0usnEDHIsPdJEyUHnoln7kceWhwBzYQ7aRAsO7kHdyvWwtp7HLhPLvTwuX_ZXq_Gr3cuL8gkNMw6GRND57_BkIO7AxKoyePLS65MQdmGL31P0Nh3QrWGE504i1Dy-hV40dST0hRZqqYsaPBxW9WLJwdBA96kiz1UtJPum5o4AUjJxlpkZz5_to5SSZUd_H_AKj4VWh8Ehc7TqUXQ3z7N_inEkHWWmgvTZSZbKjmNSYmSpxldNUyGOptwL_UGmkty3sdQ-w_0Qq)
Fellow American,

Across the nation, we’re celebrating huge wins for President Trump and a new Republican Senate Majority.

**But the battle for the House isn’t over yet.**

Only half the votes for my battleground House race in CA-9 are in, _**and as you can see, it’s a dead heat.**_

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaef310ec92e4e548156e7899458ceee&_e=Yz2hCzdEjA05KRgoX2ZyjySfmCjiFPvTZzSzbJEB9-50yzliVdtixVuyFfcOxbPZrxh6piMAhrERvplRvAxlLe9nT9yUHyKrH-V589FY-hnWR_f2eWAAqWEEH7Wh-CPFYxPGldvu1uRYBG2Um65qCyjNdFSkia_RJx-MPE2SsOehOLi2izLbQu0usnEDHIsPdJEyUHnoln7kceWhwBzYQ7aRAsO7kHdyvWwtp7HLhPLvTwuX_ZXq_Gr3cuL8gkNMw6GRND57_BkIO7AxKoyePLS65MQdmGL31P0Nh3QrWGEnzqX8a2NImDc7mQVcrzRA85hK4EbKwmed9m4-3eS_gekFaWWZiw-HQ5BMcSCuQpQOUztf935FAwalfZjuidB-vG5Kn_an3jQn2HHYAHMHW9pMowOMC2fXsZlyu3rWZoeAMGLyhRBmeuBxcJbnFONb)
This seat is needed to ensure we have a strong House Majority that can pass the Republican agenda, [**and we still need your help.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaef310ec92e4e548156e7899458ceee&_e=Yz2hCzdEjA05KRgoX2ZyjySfmCjiFPvTZzSzbJEB9-50yzliVdtixVuyFfcOxbPZrxh6piMAhrERvplRvAxlLe9nT9yUHyKrH-V589FY-hnWR_f2eWAAqWEEH7Wh-CPFYxPGldvu1uRYBG2Um65qCyjNdFSkia_RJx-MPE2SsOehOLi2izLbQu0usnEDHIsPdJEyUHnoln7kceWhwBzYQ7aRAsO7kHdyvWwtp7HLhPLvTwuX_ZXq_Gr3cuL8gkNMw6GRND57_BkIO7AxKoyePLS65MQdmGL31P0Nh3QrWGF86W6zBBggPVdwEHbK7WZnccAlp3rFyH2r6xtYfTcTNdS2AUVUNR2WVRGGo1t2ohyB2ndlw26_t7lRv4UFn8w4J0yB_5uJ3QkbaXl6IHN5vBId9FYDgNx_SgijNhh_WbUTBDM4woGRDt4SJ1-n_7ka)

We are dispatching field teams to cure mail ballots and make sure our votes are counted. And if necessary, we need to be able to take action. [**But we also need your help to pay for this.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaef310ec92e4e548156e7899458ceee&_e=Yz2hCzdEjA05KRgoX2ZyjySfmCjiFPvTZzSzbJEB9-50yzliVdtixVuyFfcOxbPZrxh6piMAhrERvplRvAxlLe9nT9yUHyKrH-V589FY-hnWR_f2eWAAqWEEH7Wh-CPFYxPGldvu1uRYBG2Um65qCyjNdFSkia_RJx-MPE2SsOehOLi2izLbQu0usnEDHIsPdJEyUHnoln7kceWhwBzYQ7aRAsO7kHdyvWwtp7HLhPLvTwuX_ZXq_Gr3cuL8gkNMw6GRND57_BkIO7AxKoyePLS65MQdmGL31P0Nh3QrWGGSWNIYixpxqBGv1o9URJhYxodKOpbnZHsJ0X5h9q82ue9aVIBQekOcSY6TfhhatVJLZzaqAC1IytcIH4NWsEZ0XMYkiyHa5JYqpMarL8pgMlssZIIq2OhCAT1diJDT7d6icg4G6Ty3i4qnESslWw80)

We don’t have armies of left-wing lawyers like the Democrats. [**Can you pitch in to help us secure the vote in this still-undecided critical race?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaef310ec92e4e548156e7899458ceee&_e=Yz2hCzdEjA05KRgoX2ZyjySfmCjiFPvTZzSzbJEB9-50yzliVdtixVuyFfcOxbPZrxh6piMAhrERvplRvAxlLe9nT9yUHyKrH-V589FY-hnWR_f2eWAAqWEEH7Wh-CPFYxPGldvu1uRYBG2Um65qCyjNdFSkia_RJx-MPE2SsOehOLi2izLbQu0usnEDHIsPdJEyUHnoln7kceWhwBzYQ7aRAsO7kHdyvWwtp7HLhPLvTwuX_ZXq_Gr3cuL8gkNMw6GRND57_BkIO7AxKoyePLS65MQdmGL31P0Nh3QrWGH2iSMP4MXIpUs0uxhN_GhtDKxdiYED6kLCd2iTRsbu2rvanUPhMCLL6K6Tzp8uQ3Pvj85GrAcEua7NMEoAyfzdx9s7gdkHonq9K95NZC3sllgjez3sWmUM5VXX83zEeR66D_LpvUVyRyXgFLRnAryj)

This election isn’t over yet, and we don’t want to lose a single vote - it's that close.

Please continue supporting our victory!

**Kevin Lincoln**

[ ** Help us Protect the Vote ➞ **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aaef310ec92e4e548156e7899458ceee&_e=Yz2hCzdEjA05KRgoX2ZyjySfmCjiFPvTZzSzbJEB9-50yzliVdtixVuyFfcOxbPZrxh6piMAhrERvplRvAxlLe9nT9yUHyKrH-V589FY-hnWR_f2eWAAqWEEH7Wh-CPFYxPGldvu1uRYBG2Um65qCyjNdFSkia_RJx-MPE2SsOehOLi2izLbQu0usnEDHIsPdJEyUHnoln7kceWhwBzYQ7aRAsO7kHdyvWwtp7HLhPLvTwuX_ZXq_Gr3cuL8gkNMw6GRND57_BkIO7AxKoyePLS65MQdmGL31P0Nh3QrWGEUQb7YZHOouBaxkVsT6anpvIYWCleGYvqchvYrHxBFtq0_BMpO_TA0yam2OLLGPMO6_st8SjHgHUD8S-WJPzhAbourZT6_nSOLVnr5SJvzkIQEJee8X7PlaubiIuRpnSnLFccn_23vvVceNEs1zN8v)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

clean_body: Only half the votes for my battleground House race in CA-9 are in, and as you can see, it’s a dead heat. | Fellow American, Across the nation, we’re celebrating huge wins for President Trump and a new Republican Senate Majority. But the battle for the House isn’t over yet. Only half the votes for my battleground House race in CA-9 are in, and as you can see, it’s a dead heat. This seat is needed to ensure we have a strong House Majority that can pass the Republican agenda, We are dispatching field teams to cure mail ballots and make sure our votes are counted. And if necessary, we need to be able to take action. We don’t have armies of left-wing lawyers like the Democrats. This election isn’t over yet, and we don’t want to lose a single vote - it's that close. Please continue supporting our victory! Kevin Lincoln | Meet Kevin Lincoln My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran. Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader. I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton. Kevin Lincoln is a former member of the U.S. Marine Corps. name: AOC
subject: From the bottom up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We need mass-movement politics and robust people's movements.
#
I would ask how you're doing, but I posted that question in my Instagram Q&A;'s and a lot of people are feeling similar things.
For those asking functional questions about what we can do: one of the big things that I believe is going to be very important for us is a theory known as _inside/outside politics_.
I believe we have people and elected officials that try to organize, build power, and help influence decisions on the _inside_ of institutions — but that alone is not enough to make change in this country.
**We _also_ need mass-movement politics and robust people's movements**. Those movements are where the actual seeds of power and influence in this country come from: from a mass, organized, mobilized base of working people.
So from an outside perspective, there are a lot of things that we have to do.
One of those things is something known as _programs of political education_ , that can go from the most basic to more complex. **But we need to learn a lot**.
This comes down to political education, of race and class consciousness, and people understanding that **these billionaires are not looking out for us**. They are grinding us to a pulp and eating us for breakfast. They are burning our planet.
It is going to take a huge level of effort and solidarity. We are going to be looking towards our brothers and sisters in the labor movement, in the human and civil rights movement.
When I came to politics, it was not about trying to articulate what being a “leftist” is. I always considered myself as running from the bottom.
It is not about left and right. **This is about top and bottom — and that we have to run from the bottom up**.
To me, the Democratic Party’s alienation of the working-class has to do with the fact that we haven’t been able to deliver on a $15 minimum wage, etc, for many different reasons.
**We have to put those demands front and center. We shouldn’t be afraid to fight for what we believe in**.
In solidarity,
Alexandria

[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241108.sSc4GD&refcode=em20241108-7547-P_FND_EXP_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7547%2E2526796%2E1kpfkW)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241108.sSc4GD&refcode=em20241108-7547-P_FND_EXP_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7547%2E2526796%2E1kpfkW)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241108?refcode=em20241108-7547-P_FND_EXP_CTR&t=21&refcode2=7547_2526796_1kpfkW&akid=7547%2E2526796%2E1kpfkW)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241108-7547-P_FND_EXP_CTR&t=22&akid=7547%2E2526796%2E1kpfkW)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=7547%2E2526796%2E1kpfkW) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=7547%2E2526796%2E1kpfkW) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=7547%2E2526796%2E1kpfkW)
---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=7547%2E2526796%2E1kpfkW)

name: James Gravitt
subject: Helping with ballot curing efforts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
| Peter, For many of us, the outcome of Tuesday’s election wasn’t what we wanted to see at the top of the ticket. With President-elect Trump in charge of the executive branch, and Republicans having flipped the Senate, a Democratic House is the only potential backstop against total GOP control of Washington. Ballots are still being counted in races across the country, including here in Arizona’s 2nd District — where it looks like the final outcome may be determined by “cured” ballots: those are ballots that had some sort of error or mistake and must be corrected to count. We’re trying urgently to reach the voters who need to fix their ballots, and the reality is that we’re all out of campaign cash to fund those efforts. We know it’s been a long, hard campaign season — but helping us to cure these ballots is an important step in ensuring all votes are counted in this critical race for Congress. [**We really appreciate anything you can pitch in today, and we’re so grateful for all the support you’ve shown us over the last year.**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/DYvwkHRUmJJVcJJ85ZRumg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpEM3vP0TcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL25lejExMjQ_YW1vdW50PTEwJnJlZmNvZGUzPUVNX05CSV9ORVpfMjAyNDAxMTA4X0JhbGxvdEN1cmVfM01PX05lel9OQV9OQV8xXzImY2RtYz0yb1hSMEpmRnc5MU5mS2NBTXV2UmlVb2RjSEwmcmVmY29kZTI9Mm9YUjBKZkZ3OTFOZktjQU11dlJpVW9kY0hMJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJvWFIwSmZGdzkxTmZLY0FNdXZSaVVvZGNITFcDc3BjQgpnLO9ILmdLDQyqUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAABdg~~) Thank you, James Gravitt Campaign Manager Nez for Congress

✓ Precision-engineered to TRUMP TOUGH combat-grade standards

✓ Hand-built Presidential-level craftsmanship in America

✓ Sub-MOA accurate and combat-grade durable with a LIFETIME warranty

✓ A unique, cerakote, commemorative work of art! But here's what makes this truly special: On January 6th, when Congress confirms what we already know (and certifies Trump as President)... **Production STOPS. Forever.** No more [**_MAGA Patriot AR-15_**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19052/6374453/e233b65fcb1490379a8f248166c4ebbbc47d6f7a/cd4ee4b920f9991b813d91080f7c7a343ad816d6)s will ever be made. **The same people who mocked us? name: Carmen Goers
subject: Thanks to All Our Supporters
body:
| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Thanks to All Our Supporters**
---

Thank you to everyone who supported our campaign and believed in our vision to restore the hope and opportunity of the American dream for the next generation. While the results of this election did not go as we had hoped, I want to encourage Kim Schrier to uphold her campaign statements to address rising cost of living and supporting our family farms with a modernized Farm Bill.

This campaign has been about more than just winning; it has been about listening to the voices of our community and advocating for our families and businesses. I am proud of the work we have done together and the connections we have built.

Though I may not be taking office, I remain committed to serving our community and supporting the important issues we care about. I encourage everyone to remain civically engaged, holding our representative accountable.

Thank you once again for your support and dedication. Let’s continue to work together to make our community a better place for all.

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

---

* * *
# [The Post Election Anti-Muslim Hate -- From The Left](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151371013&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzcxMDEzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzEwODcxNDEsImV4cCI6MTczMzY3OTE0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aPND3lNLRa6c3Qrt8KytD4rBaD0Aqf14defg7O_RhPU)
### The anti-Muslim and Islamophobic attacks I've received from Democrats must stop, and we need to stand united against fascism
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Nov 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151371013&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzcxMDEzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTA4NzE0MSwiZXhwIjoxNzMzNjc5MTQxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vwxw3DS_ILD_ywmS4tHWDGS0YQAWLzLTTMUhaPUJPmQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151371013&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzcxMDEzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzEwODcxNDEsImV4cCI6MTczMzY3OTE0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aPND3lNLRa6c3Qrt8KytD4rBaD0Aqf14defg7O_RhPU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151371013&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzcxMDEzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzEwODcxNDEsImV4cCI6MTczMzY3OTE0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aPND3lNLRa6c3Qrt8KytD4rBaD0Aqf14defg7O_RhPU)
---
| | [](https://substack..jC3AGO1jA2ynG4A1XJ5BwJfSFYbKFobBxOG2-b-m4sw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/the-post-election-anti-muslim-hate?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..W8qt1Yz5O4GgvwpZzb2geWwvArpxSvlzBT_zJlL0GeM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151371013)
This is an uncomfortable piece to write, but a necessary one. We know anti-Muslim hate from the right has been here, is rising, and will spike likely to record levels once Trump formally takes office. But right now, post-election, I'm seeing a rising sense of anti-Muslim sentiment among Democrats on the claim that Harris lost due to the American Muslim vote. This is dangerous for a number of reasons and we must counter this hate immediately. The morning after the election I [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/31ca629d-8314-4d99-ae03-99f91bbcb6bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Many people are hurting. Many are angry. There is no rush to respond. I say this both to those hurting, and to those looking to point fingers. Already this morning I've received notes telling me to "_f*ck off_ " or "_enjoy the camps_ " or "_hope you like being deported_ ," even making genocidal statements about Palestine. And to be sure, these aren't from MAGAs--but sadly from folks on the left.
Over the past few days these attacks from folks on the left have increased. I've received texts from Muslim and Arab friends expressing fear--not just of the eventual and inevitable fascist ban on Muslims--but of the bigotry they are experiencing here and now. I've also received many thoughtful notes of support from my white Christian friends expressing love, compassion, solidarity, and asking me to be safe because of the rhetoric they're hearing in their circles. To those allies I am grateful. But today I want to candidly lay bare this hate to each of you as a reminder of its reality, and how you can be an ally in these difficult times. **Let 's Address This**.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8a48ab16-4ca8-4519-99dc-b939a3616de9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..W8qt1Yz5O4GgvwpZzb2geWwvArpxSvlzBT_zJlL0GeM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151371013)
This anti-Muslim hate is driven by the perception that Americans who are Muslim cost Kamala Harris the election, because they voted for Jill Stein. Apparently, the claim goes, the peaceful protests American Muslims held against Biden for funding genocide in Gaza caused Harris to lose every swing state, and thus the presidency. This claim is, in a word, meritless. Before I provide the receipts on just how meritless this claim is, let me offer a snapshot of what this disinformation is igniting.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b143d185-dd89-4708-b746-dfc1b7e01176?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In response to my detailed analysis of what the Democratic Party did wrong in this election, this person gloated that "Muslim ban #2 is coming, as are deportation camps"--apparently all due to our critiques of President Biden. Off the bat, if you are offended that a citizen criticizes the President, then it isn't democracy you support, its blind compliance. As Teddy Roosevelt famously said, "_Patriotism means to stand by the country. It does not mean to stand by the president_." Apparently some never got that memo, and are upset I dared to criticize the Democratic Party.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/19471dbe-990a-4ddd-9cd3-19c349159f13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What ignited this response? My suggestion that the Democratic Party ignored their base of young voters, which is part of the reason why voters 18-29 shifted 30 points to the right in the 2024 election. The fact is, we cannot and will not win voters back if our self-reflection amounts to "GO F*CK YOURSELF." Similarly, we will not win back voters if we sensationalize criticism of the Democratic Party as the same thing as rape. Yes, that is a claim some are making in their efforts to rebuke my criticisms.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5154339d-5a7d-4e2c-8968-03faa3b8210a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Apparently, according to Karen, Democrats were raped, and criticizing the party's strategy this election amounts to rape shaming. Yes, it is as absurd and as offensive as it sounds, but this is again a snapshot of the rhetoric I've received post-election. And yet, the rhetoric is only getting worse--including calls to genocide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c4e4da73-f2a4-49a5-b31b-e9f42af71811?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This person openly called to "flatten Palestine," which is a call to mass murder and genocide. Imagine being so angry at a fellow citizen criticizing unjust foreign policy, that your response is to wage all out genocide against innocent and unarmed people? Again, how does this distinguish from MAGA Republicans and the violent rhetoric we often see from the right? Especially when the above genocidal rhetoric is coupled with ongoing declarations of being victimized by American Muslims, and wishing violence upon American Muslims. See the next example.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e10125a-b390-4339-affc-fc1940b437e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"_I hope you all get what was promised_ " is also an implicit acknowledgement that the Trump and Netanyahu regimes promise genocide, concentration camps, and ethnic cleansing--and far from condemning this horror--it is now being "hoped" upon American Muslims. This is a theme in many of the comments I've received, taunting me to "_enjoy what you voted for_." Obviously, I did not and would never vote for Trump, and have actively worked for a decade against his fascism, including donating thousands of dollars of my own income to Democratic candidates running against Trump candidates. But it seems none of that matters anymore--I should "enjoy what I voted for."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/767331bd-2246-43b2-a148-4883b3781a61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And again.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/44862cb0-e679-42a8-a4bb-8d14f740fa5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And again.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fbbd0f9f-3997-48c6-8eb2-72be6274c1ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And again, with subtle racism.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6720cfba-7872-4b64-9f86-82d67d6c6519?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And again, with overt racism for good measure.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a02819f3-d1e5-478e-919d-c75f3fa558a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And finally, before I bring up the receipts of what actually transpired this election, another common theme of the hateful attacks American Muslims are receiving post-election is that "_we stood with you [Muslims], and you abandoned us_."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3dc03169-d7c2-4971-82f4-2cc7ca09b67e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Never mind that the final piece I wrote before the election was [to implore people to vote against Trump so that the ACA care my daughter needs to live is not taken away](https://substack.com/redirect/f1fb8725-a273-4220-a80d-53c73361a1e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Again, apparently none of that matters to these critics. And if they are willing to pause the hate and look at facts, they'll see the facts completely undermine their meritless and violent claims against American Muslims.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..W8qt1Yz5O4GgvwpZzb2geWwvArpxSvlzBT_zJlL0GeM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151371013)
### The Facts of Jill Stein's Negligible Impact
The facts are explicitly clear that American Muslims did not cost Harris the Presidency. In [reality](https://substack.com/redirect/39a3d723-5329-4481-9cd5-acad2cb7c450?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Jill Stein only won between 0.4% and 0.9% of the vote in the 38 states in which her name appeared on the ballot. The largest chunk of votes she received in any given state was in the very blue state of New Jersey, earning 0.9% or 34,953 votes. But what about in the Blue Wall states of Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin?
Again, while Stein's absence could have made the race closer in swing states, her presence and support from some American Muslims did not enable Harris's loss or Trump's win. Consider the facts:
* Harris lost PA by 38,000 votes--where Stein only received 33,000 votes.
* Harris lost MI by 80,000 votes--where Stein only received 44,000 votes.
* Harris lost WI by 30,000 votes--where Stein only received 12,000 votes.

In fact, RFK and the Libertarian candidate each received somewhat similar votes as did Stein in each of those states, with RFK alone receiving more votes than did Stein in Wisconsin.
Moreover, the best data available on the [voting breakdown by religion](https://substack.com/redirect/a19f1009-5d03-4ae4-bb62-9975d5d9c87a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) suggests that American Muslims (who would fall into the "Something else" category below) voted somewhere around 59% for Kamala Harris. And given the largest demographic of Muslims in America are Black Muslims, and Black Americans voted close to 90% for Kamala Harris, it would be unsurprising if American Muslims voted Democratic even higher than 59%. Far from abandoning Harris or American democracy, American Muslims were on the front lines of fighting MAGA fascism.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/578caf72-5fba-4d7c-8bb6-a4f346b8bee3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Finally, remember that American Muslims are not a massive block of voters across swing states, and amount to less than 1%. Still, in 2020 they came out strong for Joe Biden and helped him get across the finish line. And in 2024, the nation's largest Muslim civic organization, Emgage, endorsed Kamala Harris and worked hard to register 1 million American Muslims to vote. Likewise, the Muslims for Harris coalition activated across swing states, holding events, raising money, and knocking doors. Those American Muslims who exercised their constitutional right to protest against a genocide funded by US tax dollars had every right to do so--a fact the eventual Harris/Walz ticket openly endorsed. Way back in early March, Governor Tim Walz shared his view of the Uncommitted Movement by [stating](https://substack.com/redirect/f1827118-5465-44d4-a413-592654c3b9d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> These folks are asking for a change in course. They're asking for more pressure to be put on. They're civically engaged. People are frustrated, but it bodes well for me that they're actively engaged to go out and cast his vote and ask for change.
The point is, attacking American Muslims for their _crime_ of being civically engaged is not how we strengthen our democracy, it is how we undermine our unity. Unity for the sake of justice is how we must move forward if we have any hope of stopping Trump's fascism and the forthcoming onslaught of Project 2025.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..W8qt1Yz5O4GgvwpZzb2geWwvArpxSvlzBT_zJlL0GeM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151371013)
### The Need for Unity Against Hate
As I implored in my [election breakdown](https://substack.com/redirect/87a8997e-c43c-4383-8955-6c75def85f17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Today, the Democratic Party has two very distinct paths ahead of it. It can either blame everyone else as racist, embrace war criminals like Dick Cheney, and hold loaded primaries, thereby ensuring a repeat of this election's failures in the future. Or, the Democratic Party can look inwardly and actually listen to its base and future--young voters, Black voters, Asian and Muslim voters, and Latino voters--and ensure success on the local, state, and federal level for a generation or more.
This will always hold true, if we truly intend to become a big tent party that listens to its base. Those quick to attack American Muslims for peacefully exercising their constitutional right to dissent should reflect on how that differentiates from MAGA Republicans who demand absolute loyalty in all matters? The election is over, the results are what they are, and now we have a choice before us. Continue to attack a historically marginalized community that will sadly continue to suffer marginalization, or reflect on what we could have done better as a party, and build a better party and country going forward. I know I am choosing the latter. And I am confident most people reading this will as well.
Finally, ally-ship is not just about recognizing hate. It is also in actively calling hate out by being anti-hate, anti-racist, and anti-fascist, and by investing in doing the work to uphold and advance justice. By investing your resources in those standing on the front lines. Many of us have done this for years, and the moment calls to redouble our efforts. Let us continue to build our coalition for justice and stand united against the divisiveness that the Trump administration is counting on to advance their agenda. The next four years will be unimaginably difficult, but we can and will get through it, if we stand together.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..W8qt1Yz5O4GgvwpZzb2geWwvArpxSvlzBT_zJlL0GeM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151371013)
### A Final Note
With your support--I have built this _Let 's Address This_ community to now more than 78,000 thoughtful people on the promise to speak truth to power and uphold justice in all matters. If you're reading this, you are a member of that community, and I am grateful to you for choosing to partake. **So, my ask is that if you are in a position to[become a paid subscriber](https://substack.com/redirect/9f92eb34-91f5-44cc-87f1-56e228ef8624?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as we build into this next year, now is a crucial time to join this movement.**
Thank you for the trust you have in me. My commitment is to reciprocate that trust with consistent, thoughtful, fact-based analysis and insights on the key human rights and civil rights issues that impact us all.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..W8qt1Yz5O4GgvwpZzb2geWwvArpxSvlzBT_zJlL0GeM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151371013)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1d536e18-0af9-42eb-a30c-c73aef707d88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

This is dangerous for a number of reasons and we must counter this hate immediately. The morning after the election I : Many people are hurting. Many are angry. There is no rush to respond. I say this both to those hurting, and to those looking to point fingers. Already this morning I've received notes telling me to "fck off " or "enjoy the camps " or "hope you like being deported ," even making genocidal statements about Palestine. And to be sure, these aren't from MAGAs--but sadly from folks on the left. Over the past few days these attacks from folks on the left have increased. I've received texts from Muslim and Arab friends expressing fear--not just of the eventual and inevitable fascist ban on Muslims--but of the bigotry they are experiencing here and now. I've also received many thoughtful notes of support from my white Christian friends expressing love, compassion, solidarity, and asking me to be safe because of the rhetoric they're hearing in their circles. To those allies I am grateful. But today I want to candidly lay bare this hate to each of you as a reminder of its reality, and how you can be an ally in these difficult times. body:
Our fight for progress is far from over.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96801439/511234956/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_241108_1_1_Concede&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyMjEyOTc5LWY3OWQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O-xe6PsmjP4JJaYE-ryTSERlwWDoX8h1NeF3ViBFeMI=)
Team,
Kamala Harris stood before the nation with resilience and grace, acknowledging the outcome of this historic race. **Her words reminded us that while this chapter may be closing, our fight for progress is far from over.**
Kamala spoke to the heart of our movement: of what we’ve accomplished and the values we defend. She made it clear that every vote, every rally, every dollar raised was a testament to our shared commitment to a fairer, stronger America.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: A message of hope.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
These victories are our path forward.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96801541/511235209/1328794144?refcode=ea.6b715659-f79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ms=ea.6b715659-f79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiNzE1NjU5LWY3OWQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c8N0s2h0eRIu7j5u5GTBp6zK1cdssBPNO1Itorsfy9Y=&emci=9c0e901c-589d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=6b715659-f79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=4823105)
---
I’m still processing everything from this election, and I imagine you are too. The results have brought a whirlwind of emotions. But even in the face of a Trump presidency, I want to remind you of the power we’ve built and the victories we can celebrate. Because despite what we’re up against, we are not starting from scratch — we’re starting from strength. Across the country, **_65 of our JanePAC-endorsed climate champions have officially achieved stunning down-ballot victories,_** with _many more races yet to be called._ This is no small feat, and it matters more than ever. Let’s break down some of Tuesday’s climate wins so far.
* **In California,** we’re winning up and down the ballot. Sade Elhawary, who made environmental justice the centerpiece of her campaign is on her way to Sacramento. Social justice organizer and civil rights attorney Ysabel Jurado will be a strong voice for climate action on the Los Angeles City Council, and in San Francisco, organizer and activist Jackie Fielder won a 7-person race for a seat on the San Francisco Board of Supervisors by prioritizing the planet in her platform.

* **In Arizona,** one of the biggest battlegrounds this year, John McLean is currently leading his race to flip a state senate seat and Jen Allen is in a strong position to win her race for Pima County Supervisor.

* **In New Mexico,** 11 of our endorsed climate champions won their state legislative races: Joseph Hernandez, Eleanor Chavez, Heather Berghmans, Joy Garratt, Mimi Stewart, Harold Pope Jr., Debbie Sariñana, Charlotte Little, Kathleen Cates, Carrie Hamblen, and Matthew McQueen. These leaders will help guide the state toward a cleaner and healthier future.

* **In Pennsylvania,** Summer Lee (US House), Andre Carroll (HD-201), Nikil Saval (SD-1), and Danielle Friel Otten (HD-155) won seats to advocate for strong climate policies that benefit all communities.

* **In Wisconsin,** Greta Neubauer (AD-66) and Vinnie Miresse (AD-71) emerged victorious, keeping environmental justice a priority.

**And in Washington State,** the defeat of Initiative 2117 was another significant victory. This ballot measure, backed by monied anti-climate interests, would have dismantled critical climate protections. Its defeat shows the power of grassroots efforts and the will to protect our environment. And in the race for Washington State Commissioner of Public Lands, Dave Upthegrove defeated former Republican Representative Jaime Herrera Beutler. This is a crucial position responsible for managing the state’s Department of Natural Resources and overseeing millions of acres of public land. These victories send a clear message: Climate champions can win anywhere. And now, these local and state-level races matter more than ever. These victories build the firewall we need to fight back against the incoming administration and its plans to undo the progress we’ve made. We should be proud — _so proud_ — of what we’ve accomplished together. As we face the road ahead, know that we’re not alone. We have each other, and we have climate champions across the nation ready to hold the line. Let’s keep pushing, keep organizing, and keep fighting for a future where we, not polluters, dictate our path forward. | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96801542/511235210/2105508926?refcode=ea.6b715659-f79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ms=ea.6b715659-f79d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiNzE1NjU5LWY3OWQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c8N0s2h0eRIu7j5u5GTBp6zK1cdssBPNO1Itorsfy9Y=)
---

Jane Fonda

These leaders will help guide the state toward a cleaner and healthier future. In Pennsylvania, Summer Lee (US House), Andre Carroll (HD-201), Nikil Saval (SD-1), and Danielle Friel Otten (HD-155) won seats to advocate for strong climate policies that benefit all communities. In Wisconsin, Greta Neubauer (AD-66) and Vinnie Miresse (AD-71) emerged victorious, keeping environmental justice a priority. And in Washington State, the defeat of Initiative 2117 was another significant victory. This ballot measure, backed by monied anti-climate interests, would have dismantled critical climate protections. Its defeat shows the power of grassroots efforts and the will to protect our environment. And in the race for Washington State Commissioner of Public Lands, Dave Upthegrove defeated former Republican Representative Jaime Herrera Beutler. This is a crucial position responsible for managing the state’s Department of Natural Resources and overseeing millions of acres of public land. These victories send a clear message: Climate champions can win anywhere. And now, these local and state-level races matter more than ever. These victories build the firewall we need to fight back against the incoming administration and its plans to undo the progress we’ve made. We should be proud — so proud — of what we’ve accomplished together. As we face the road ahead, know that we’re not alone. We have each other, and we have climate champions across the nation ready to hold the line. Let’s keep pushing, keep organizing, and keep fighting for a future where we, not polluters, dictate our path forward. | = With love and solidarity, Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
Fox News covers our work in 2024
| | |

| Friends,
This has been a historic week for our country and our movement. All of the work we've done to this point is starting to pay off - and America is paying attention.
---
| Just moments ago, Fox News published this:
---
| [Fox News: Trump's 'they/them' ads combine culture war, economic worries to make effective pitch: expert](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018BJ9e6lLsidldx0qZOftEHu_CyH9hGl0qxN761JBm2qxlXZMobZPwOwwkvJqcqUhBu2Vw9Td4GI0Bt2Az5jwhAIa351XR2Y1bn5ZTM5e0YyPkQnGowSpJcNburvFn-jYf5fcvffNTSKRDV8XjumIGNDLjmxomcTACq2oD0-qrnEskvFmPKAZ2eFXS_7_WrqEZfCTUXfnUK8fE1lB-NAUWTTILuSeUHaK5dy_0kkK5yI-mVggxw4JwWkyW5e2Ug1OVZw9Pi80LhLvpiBcu7LXGw==&c=rNd1Wgo9VtD9GAnKmxiRoUcaxacNazuCdBpaQq0vBIVEAaWm_gz8ag==&ch=co_VPkvlcehhz9GLwqIDuwp1JesQR_ZmpTOGBAMRX0ks2tZ35TOhTA==)
---
| Take a look: "In the final days of President-elect Donald Trump's 2024 campaign, he focused on a culture war issue that may have locked in more swing votes--and with it, the election," a conservative activist involved in the ad campaign argues.
This is precisely the polling I shared with President Trump back in July. This is exactly why we wrote the studies on the [Transgender Industrial Complex.](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018BJ9e6lLsidldx0qZOftEHu_CyH9hGl0qxN761JBm2qxlXZMobZPwOwwkvJqcqUhkkBT0dE3zTQJkgBTOMzDvLwYIaospYmBzkmZbzpXMIPA_04qM_S_jrSG538HyIu5JidqgQTtifQwfc6kHUz2No5-LvtDdKB-&c=rNd1Wgo9VtD9GAnKmxiRoUcaxacNazuCdBpaQq0vBIVEAaWm_gz8ag==&ch=co_VPkvlcehhz9GLwqIDuwp1JesQR_ZmpTOGBAMRX0ks2tZ35TOhTA==)
---
FoxNews, Daily Wire, New York Times... The country is waking up to our FAMILY FIRST agenda.
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018BJ9e6lLsidldx0qZOftEHu_CyH9hGl0qxN761JBm2qxlXZMobZPwK36e1fpjZLiCSVePuiDaUT-VLhZFHRuucl323yuvTbRg8ip4dooHULaLtH4BOE0te4S-mIHaOkV4T8vaYPzW2eTUQ7kghEPBWx3TvTFc22ld2MnMT5H8s0dOBHUNVK0SbhnvyPFisf7kqTAoz-sFsF5JiC5eySRc8q-lb3ew-c2nFByo7D7YR8p7aCyHF0Z0rjwov5CPBMiH50dgoSYfM6UJF3IOIamBQ==&c=rNd1Wgo9VtD9GAnKmxiRoUcaxacNazuCdBpaQq0vBIVEAaWm_gz8ag==&ch=co_VPkvlcehhz9GLwqIDuwp1JesQR_ZmpTOGBAMRX0ks2tZ35TOhTA==)
---
It's time to secure for the future - a new age of prosperity for the American family.
---
And its going to continue to happen here. With us. At American Principles Project.
---
It's time to work even harder, and we're committed to ensuring the Trump Administration has the right people in place to do just that.
When I first started talking about these issues, even many conservatives laughed. We raised concerns about things like "Drag Queen Storytime" as early as 2016 and 2017, warning that the left would take this route to undermine the fabric of our society.
We fought through it all, and now we're finally getting the recognition for standing firm for what's right and true.
With our election victory celebrated, the real work begins. Our family-first agenda will take center stage in the crucial days ahead. We must keep fighting.
---
* APP will be ready on Day 1 of the new Trump Administration to influence Executive Orders that protect women's sports, kick the woke and destructive policies out of our military and take down transgender ideology.

* Our team will also be working to ensure the White House and government agencies are filled with staffers who support family values and will fight against the globalist agenda.

---
But our work won't end in the White House.
---
* We're committed to flooding the halls of Congress so every member who vowed to protect children is armed with the facts and the tools necessary to enshrine those protections into law.

* We will continue working with Republican Governors and State Legislatures to make sure our schools are teaching values that align with parents, not bureaucrats put in place by Soros-backed machines.

---
| | CONTRIBUTE
---
I will make sure that we won't stop until Big Family is the largest special interest group in the country.
The real fight has just begun and we need your help to keep the pressure on the left and to hold Republicans accountable to the campaign promises they made.
Can you contribute to our mission?

---
| In Freedom,
---
|
---
| Terry Schilling President American Principles Project

NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [Let's not gaslight the voters on the economy (again)](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151382642&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzgyNjQyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzEwODc0MzUsImV4cCI6MTczMzY3OTQzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6GWuxIYyqICACqCAy-tYzYqPlOjJJzwfPuMVjp6TlTw)
### Gaslighting. Cognitive Dissonance. Whatever you want to call it, our message invalidated the voters' lived daily experience.
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Nov 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
---

---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0e943ecc-7bbf-4ea4-be96-8faa8e668be8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Dan Senior](https://substack.com/redirect/c9f46ba3-da4f-47bf-868c-d76e323e51a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/157ec5ea-7598-44ec-9c91-fdf23f205d13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We learned on Tuesday, November 5, 2024 that most voters can overlook the felonies, the sexual abuse, the obvious dementia, and the threats to deport millions and assassinate political enemies.
They can even overlook authoritarianism, fascism, and promises to "terminate" portions of the U.S. Constitution.
The majority of voters on Tuesday, November 5 resonated with a candidate who shared their feeling that the status quo just is not working out for them. In their minds, January 6 was a problem. But so was the defund the police effort that sprang up after the murder of George Floyd.
I delivered to voters the Democratic Party lines that the economy is the most robust it has ever been.
That Joe Biden had created more jobs than any other president in history - True
That inflation had peaked when we jump-started the economy after Covid, but now it was steadily coming down - True
That compared to our peer countries, we had the best economy on the globe - True
That Kamala Harris's Opportunity Economy was going to put more money in the pockets of everyday Americans, while Trump's tariffs and corporate tax cuts were going to result in $4,000 more a year out of pocket - Also True
What I did not successfully "get" was that none of that mattered to the clerk at the Dollar General Store. Nor did it matter to the low-level admin at the county office. Nor did it matter to the person who has 3 part-time jobs, none of which has health benefits or retirement savings.
Carrie Fischer (aka Princess Leia) famously said, "Delayed gratification takes too long."
A tax credit takes too long. A huge number of people don't even file taxes anyway, so a tax credit is meaningless.
They can't even imagine buying a house, even with the $25,000 first time homebuyer credit. There are no houses that are anywhere near any of their three part-time jobs.
They don't have a kid, or their kid is grown and gone, so the Child Tax Credit is moot.
Start-up Tax Credit? They don't even have internet at home. How are they going to start up anything?
The person who is working 60 hours a week in order to bring home $30,000-$50,000 a year needs a candidate who says, "I will put food on your table, gas in your car, and make sure you have money for rent."
The big "miss" was that Democrats did exactly that when Joe Biden sent money to everyone. Actually, that was the year we had people filing their tax returns even though they don't normally file. People filed, reporting $1 in income, because they wanted to collect their stimulus checks. And the stimulus payments were not chump change. Wasn't it $1200, then another $1500, then another $1400? Double for two-income households. More if you had kids? Some people got as much as $4000? That's not nothing.
We didn't mention that. Were we afraid that people would ask us how we were going to pay for it if we did another stimulus package? (Cue dialogue on raising the corporate tax rates and imposing a tax hike on high-dollar earners.)
Many of the voters in NY-21 cringe when they have to put $10 worth of gas in their cars on Monday night, when the paycheck doesn't arrive until Friday. (Notice -- I didn't say they are filling up their car. They can only afford to part with the $10 and hope they can make it stretch.)
That's reality.
They don't have mental bandwidth or an appreciation of global economics to understand or care that the US economy is stronger than any other economy.
They need to buy eggs, milk, and bread and they already have the late notice from the landlord stuffed in their purses.
What did we do (myself included)? We gaslit the conversation on the economy.
When they said their most important issue was the economy, we talked about abortion rights.
When they said their most important stressor was money, we told them to hang in there for a theoretical "Opportunity Economy".
When they said they are paralyzed by crushing inflation, we talked about joy, freedom, and equality.
So they voted for the candidate who outwardly mirrored the chaos that they feel inwardly.
As baffonish as Trump is - that's how many voters feel. Their only regret is that they can't act that way and get away with it.
They voted for the cartoonish felon who said that he was going to do this-this-and-this (go after his enemies, deport the illegals, and drill, baby, drill to lower gas prices) "on Day One", instead of the elegant, joyous candidate who simply wanted to "turn the page."
It's like the voters were telling us what was important to them, and we talked right past them.
We invalidated their concerns.
Out of everything that they heard this election cycle, their votes went with the party that promises to upend the very system that just is not working out for them.
Our message ignored their pain. Our plan was not going to help them buy groceries, or gas, or rent.
Gaslighting. Cognitive Dissonance. Whatever you want to call it, our message invalidated the voters' lived daily experience.
I will run again. I hope I will have your support to do so.
But I hope this time, I don't gaslight my voters on the economy again.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

clean_body: Gaslighting. Cognitive Dissonance. Whatever you want to call it, our message invalidated the voters' lived daily experience. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race * Gaslighting. Cognitive Dissonance. Whatever you want to call it, our message invalidated the voters' lived daily experience. | | | Nov 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Photo by on We learned on Tuesday, November 5, 2024 that most voters can overlook the felonies, the sexual abuse, the obvious dementia, and the threats to deport millions and assassinate political enemies. They can even overlook authoritarianism, fascism, and promises to "terminate" portions of the U.S. Constitution. The majority of voters on Tuesday, November 5 resonated with a candidate who shared their feeling that the status quo just is not working out for them. In their minds, January 6 was a problem. But so was the defund the police effort that sprang up after the murder of George Floyd. I delivered to voters the Democratic Party lines that the economy is the most robust it has ever been. That Joe Biden had created more jobs than any other president in history - True That inflation had peaked when we jump-started the economy after Covid, but now it was steadily coming down - True That compared to our peer countries, we had the best economy on the globe - True That Kamala Harris's Opportunity Economy was going to put more money in the pockets of everyday Americans, while Trump's tariffs and corporate tax cuts were going to result in $4,000 more a year out of pocket - Also True What I did not successfully "get" was that none of that mattered to the clerk at the Dollar General Store. Nor did it matter to the low-level admin at the county office. Nor did it matter to the person who has 3 part-time jobs, none of which has health benefits or retirement savings. Carrie Fischer (aka Princess Leia) famously said, "Delayed gratification takes too long." A tax credit takes too long. A huge number of people don't even file taxes anyway, so a tax credit is meaningless. They can't even imagine buying a house, even with the $25,000 first time homebuyer credit. There are no houses that are anywhere near any of their three part-time jobs. They don't have a kid, or their kid is grown and gone, so the Child Tax Credit is moot. Start-up Tax Credit? They don't even have internet at home. How are they going to start up anything? The person who is working 60 hours a week in order to bring home $30,000-$50,000 a year needs a candidate who says, "I will put food on your table, gas in your car, and make sure you have money for rent." The big "miss" was that Democrats did exactly that when Joe Biden sent money to everyone. Actually, that was the year we had people filing their tax returns even though they don't normally file. People filed, reporting $1 in income, because they wanted to collect their stimulus checks. And the stimulus payments were not chump change. Wasn't it $1200, then another $1500, then another $1400? Double for two-income households. More if you had kids? Some people got as much as $4000? That's not nothing. We didn't mention that. Were we afraid that people would ask us how we were going to pay for it if we did another stimulus package? (Cue dialogue on raising the corporate tax rates and imposing a tax hike on high-dollar earners.) Many of the voters in NY-21 cringe when they have to put $10 worth of gas in their cars on Monday night, when the paycheck doesn't arrive until Friday. (Notice -- I didn't say they are filling up their car. They can only afford to part with the $10 and hope they can make it stretch.) That's reality. They don't have mental bandwidth or an appreciation of global economics to understand or care that the US economy is stronger than any other economy. They need to buy eggs, milk, and bread and they already have the late notice from the landlord stuffed in their purses. What did we do (myself included)? We gaslit the conversation on the economy. When they said their most important issue was the economy, we talked about abortion rights. When they said their most important stressor was money, we told them to hang in there for a theoretical "Opportunity Economy". When they said they are paralyzed by crushing inflation, we talked about joy, freedom, and equality. So they voted for the candidate who outwardly mirrored the chaos that they feel inwardly. As baffonish as Trump is - that's how many voters feel. Their only regret is that they can't act that way and get away with it. They voted for the cartoonish felon who said that he was going to do this-this-and-this (go after his enemies, deport the illegals, and drill, baby, drill to lower gas prices) "on Day One", instead of the elegant, joyous candidate who simply wanted to "turn the page." It's like the voters were telling us what was important to them, and we talked right past them. We invalidated their concerns. Out of everything that they heard this election cycle, their votes went with the party that promises to upend the very system that just is not working out for them. Our message ignored their pain. Our plan was not going to help them buy groceries, or gas, or rent. Gaslighting. Cognitive Dissonance. Whatever you want to call it, our message invalidated the voters' lived daily experience. I will run again. I hope I will have your support to do so. But I hope this time, I don't gaslight my voters on the economy again. If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

**But the battle for the House isn’t over yet.**

Only half the votes for my battleground House race in CA-9 are in, _**and as you can see, it’s a dead heat.**_

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=991efa77b48b4917b37fcbfec10625ef&_e=vYJ9VtY5v90hGueuHv1MVskCbIPSuDwPsPQ9AGnAYp9fwfX6zs8Ykpk6DJK_Eceh4bKcwxTLE0ymKV0v6vavmt0PKacax4-5fK5UL1Rk9N02UVksQkqNRmtdky88qmd4Z2J-Nr63LmtPTiNySin0C2YrM3cFDZLKXEcP7cZpp-5D84S2YdiysOV1ErkUhE11Cyzp1j9cGOLEUiLjoRPdFWMBpdIZO2VEOmj1V8k-KeIxoLt3RO3EzJr7dJ9tpp4rBtpTji4JnPl5qwGIX401muZeI6yL2Zp1rBLNI453frbv1UOU4tLD6obb2CnbqB5VfBJJMF5lqr3heKqLScP9vGzwkjN3NdHTUg2dvki4pUB0xw6bveeXxkhtyy-R33QPhO3lsBUs2LPVFVlO6KWnVjq318GKR6C91Qb8VB7ANxmsJVqJqWBjIlWBAnglgO03)

We are dispatching field teams to cure mail ballots and make sure our votes are counted. And if necessary, we need to be able to take action. [**But we also need your help to pay for this.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=991efa77b48b4917b37fcbfec10625ef&_e=vYJ9VtY5v90hGueuHv1MVskCbIPSuDwPsPQ9AGnAYp9fwfX6zs8Ykpk6DJK_Eceh4bKcwxTLE0ymKV0v6vavmt0PKacax4-5fK5UL1Rk9N02UVksQkqNRmtdky88qmd4Z2J-Nr63LmtPTiNySin0C2YrM3cFDZLKXEcP7cZpp-5D84S2YdiysOV1ErkUhE11Cyzp1j9cGOLEUiLjoRPdFWMBpdIZO2VEOmj1V8k-KeIxoLt3RO3EzJr7dJ9tpp4rBtpTji4JnPl5qwGIX401muZeI6yL2Zp1rBLNI453frYCHZUln6WQ8eNEJIONs-P_Wit4AjvGt5_T3ntQuAFj-lLGZmvju0nuZgEDTo3gMVoxn6XI01qe8ZkGlF-uVMMc1114wJzbPkrPGUCU6b41gzdJr1Z31u5LOtQEXpv3VXKeJfcstnFutO2OnQsdYvpl)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Get big money out of our elections

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — in just 3
months, 3 billionaires donated $220 million to Donald Trump. From Elon
Musk to Big Oil executives, billionaires should NOT be able to have this
much influence in our elections.

As Bernie said, “Democracy is not billionaires buying elections. That’s
oligarchy.” The Supreme Court paved the way for this unlimited billionaire
spending — Congress must end it immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20449?t=1020&akid=7207%2E5885482%2EfX-1Nz ]Stand with Bernie: Congress must overturn Citizens United and get big
money out of politics!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20449?t=1021&akid=7207%2E5885482%2EfX-1Nz ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20449?t=1022&akid=7207%2E5885482%2EfX-1Nz ]ADD YOUR NAME

The people can not have true control over our elections if the billionaire
class can spend such massive sums on advertising, lobbying, and supporting
candidates.

Billionaires like Musk, Michael Bloomberg, and Miriam Adelson spent over
$2.5 billion on 2024 elections. Crypto billionaires spent massive sums on
Senate and House races, especially in Ohio to defeat progressive Sherrod
Brown.

“The billionaire class not only controls our economy but our corrupt
political system,” Bernie said two weeks ago.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20449?t=1023&akid=7207%2E5885482%2EfX-1Nz ][IMG]

It’s time to stand with Bernie and get big money out of our elections and
political process before it’s too late.

elections. Get big money out of politics and end Citizens United!

**But I am ECSTATIC that President Trump has won!**

My name is Brandon Straka and I founded the #Walkaway Movement.

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Your participation is key
body:
The White House and leftists in Congress have deliberately created a crisis at our southern border.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=85fc3fa491d743579fca35ecb6e53865&_t=GBNppKVZ7StLWrMfefc3oNf7hwkxPbrdJ10ZqjF7OKKa2uJZxhXcopH2iWnfTxW-qOVz9Tb0-_oKyO8OqONwbgtxq10amHunQTaWRwU68O4-ZjiGpFzT80U_hjxTczzz)_

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=85fc3fa491d743579fca35ecb6e53865&_e=tzqhO1_6320ZiHt4456tsctbRVRBKpLATW31gvbRVejf2Cos8oD0MJ7RGZxvbYalpIBUKjsTfId95bkKXw8Hl16Pjrn81--ZFsyq8Kco3ZmVcoQ6gkyMq9zJS7Jev-pGI6XzLS_rNtPa_bmJjRsiVeja7nt4bk67tiAR1hM4Yx830McvoMHiRgevOzi6tlAPlqEsEi62Dy8_4RFDpf-qr-1dPYG6klOyOW_WZkJbI7uSS1oEGxhKMMjZw88-rzp4PRK2846kZ9OLcUfhrowA3OGv7XQbja-JHwxvzxilc35xDqZVis5XBRGUAHOfkzcYxgnXMYRbj-S9yiUggGKjaP6ak-ZZwkNMe4FcwW68Lu1KDxy-cK9QG5PfIOZR3kKF)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

The White House and leftists in Congress have deliberately created a crisis at our southern border. They want people to come into our country illegally. _In fact, they encourage it._

Having millions of illegal immigrants in our country radically increases the potential for voter fraud and undermines the integrity of our elections.

Patriotic Americans need to make their voices heard about this crucial issue.

**That 's why I'm inviting you to complete The Heritage Foundation's [Survey on Illegal Immigrants Voting in U.S. Elections](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=85fc3fa491d743579fca35ecb6e53865&_e=tzqhO1_6320ZiHt4456tsctbRVRBKpLATW31gvbRVejf2Cos8oD0MJ7RGZxvbYalpIBUKjsTfId95bkKXw8Hl16Pjrn81--ZFsyq8Kco3ZmVcoQ6gkyMq9zJS7Jev-pGI6XzLS_rNtPa_bmJjRsiVeja7nt4bk67tiAR1hM4Yx830McvoMHiRgevOzi6tlAPlqEsEi62Dy8_4RFDpf-qr-1dPYG6klOyOW_WZkJbI7tVgaWxwGA6KVAa-UQvbu-yZGXN_HXVfOLOFvODWB5_1JQh-4UboggiadNKF1WwhyclqjXJOs7O4OuIpUArsJxA843mgQcqOIsXI2Q2ygyDXN-dFDEfF597Up3803PHk-5fQdUWIBLSShGuGd7saUeT).**

Your responses will help my team educate policymakers, news outlets, and the public about the dangers of illegal immigrants voting in our elections.

**You can complete your survey using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/illegal-immigration-voting-survey/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=85fc3fa491d743579fca35ecb6e53865&_e=tzqhO1_6320ZiHt4456tsctbRVRBKpLATW31gvbRVejf2Cos8oD0MJ7RGZxvbYalpIBUKjsTfId95bkKXw8Hl16Pjrn81--ZFsyq8Kco3ZmVcoQ6gkyMq9zJS7Jev-pGI6XzLS_rNtPa_bmJjRsiVeja7nt4bk67tiAR1hM4Yx830McvoMHiRgevOzi6tlAPlqEsEi62Dy8_4RFDpf-qr-1dPYG6klOyOW_WZkJbI7tjdkI1_pdzzeOtMxmyUmIfHIhsHg7zjB0XHQEFr4NiKnBTf8F7uzabjjqwR-Fi6x-zpCYaR9aqsUqoYNRRg9vhHqKlackNnnWMBNhYkHztvj3eprF7zCrWRcHJzKOjp8dKYFODIoXJtTanHLqFuquG)

Your participation is key to the fight against illegal immigration and voter fraud. Please act now before it's too late.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Are you worried about illegal immigrants voting in the upcoming elections? Make your voice heard with The Heritage Foundation 's Survey on Illegal Immigrants Voting in U.S. Elections: [https://secured.heritage.org/illegal-immigration-voting-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=85fc3fa491d743579fca35ecb6e53865&_e=tzqhO1_6320ZiHt4456tsctbRVRBKpLATW31gvbRVejf2Cos8oD0MJ7RGZxvbYalpIBUKjsTfId95bkKXw8Hl16Pjrn81--ZFsyq8Kco3ZmVcoQ6gkyMq9zJS7Jev-pGI6XzLS_rNtPa_bmJjRsiVeja7nt4bk67tiAR1hM4Yx830McvoMHiRgevOzi6tlAPlqEsEi62Dy8_4RFDpf-qr-1dPYG6klOyOW_WZkJbI7uyAj45q3ftXt9apzKH9zAsohttiIyuF1Ot1qTe9ezVQCH0TClG4tFr3JGMGln_Q7rIM0hLMJYPM9uIDlcE9ThrcspEAY9L47Tiom5f-URP2en2WDZUllAkjHTR4Z7NKNFOesPb2_YiV7EWkxKhj_EC)**

name: Carolina, UWD
subject: Take Action: Join the Here To Stay Network today to defend immigrant communities
body:
We’re ready to fight, and together we will win. | | | We’re in this together, Peter. Now that we know what we’re up against for the next 4 years, we’re building up our Here To Stay Network — calling on allies and all people of conscience to be prepared to take bold action to keep our communities safe from family separation and deportation. [Join the Here To Stay Network today to defend immigrant communities.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_tbPJXOIaWy9EKCR2c8nvfK-cxZL_jQBDIWGXfaNtWLKxeSXzvO6HQrjpuT6vLqNmMhdDDVJMVqupZEOJEjLfHsSTZKJmqkAbBgVJg1DH8wju5Qh4zvCtvTnqkFGjOHp9sgyp0ME9PhJJQEhP66bZumhz_wT6S68dHWJOVYgvgFlI9pBPVjaV8zwYMSCiT5e_iDtRtt1gJfw09FABz9fgwK72d1njzGyH9uKRxa1tEGhIHHv4snNXliEFRfXP5crlifrKgN-vaYG-jyZNg0UkiUhuO8Sq5bL8bWiJAmtz1CPB_WaguV75BRHDwNoB1nvlmp-M0Dk67aNLgXziSXLSO/4ba/nxDpYN1KQ-CJWZXixpC6bQ/h0/h001.aJ9B_Jl2Mif5BRlOyEVVdPfMX7aoDSbUqQ7oz1equR4) Are you ready, Peter, to meet this moment? While none of us wanted to have to fight tooth and nail against Trump again, we know we can. We have faced this moment before, and our movement has grown stronger. We’ve fought against the deportations of our loved ones, reunited families, and defeated racist policies like the Muslim Ban. Trump and his MAGA base will never break us. 💪Together, we can protect our immigrant communities from Republicans’ plans to dismantle our rights and attack our communities. It’s okay to take time to process emotions and reflect on how we got here — but then it’s time for us to lock in and get to work to defend our undocumented loved ones and community members. **[Join the Here To Stay Network Today!****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_tbPJXOIaWy9EKCR2c8nvfK-cxZL_jQBDIWGXfaNtWLKxeSXzvO6HQrjpuT6vLqNmMhdDDVJMVqupZEOJEjLfHsSTZKJmqkAbBgVJg1DH8wlKD_FZ2vyqgoNSaffCmvB4_BixS4oCHKVoMmQr7eWCMXzaknw0mUGJvyOXjR6IDHz-Oj9b-hZ6Iy_gPYfF91ku6GuH-wvaRbzy9YY6izjHUjPc1usrTdl2mcPAlAvdDaLhVs7x2C8fMOTwRa00jCu4GGOK-ogGUxW8FgHgf-81_VI0yhM2ekyk3pOa_xx5YZqDi32VjrZypWKewLi6qm_AJfRo5TposxhAVpnRUiY8a/4ba/nxDpYN1KQ-CJWZXixpC6bQ/h1/h001.lBJBpu4qCNevU5hqgNjrJ9isEn5coiX2-CZcUQPD0Og)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_tbPJXOIaWy9EKCR2c8nvfK-cxZL_jQBDIWGXfaNtWLKxeSXzvO6HQrjpuT6vLqNmMhdDDVJMVqupZEOJEjLfHsSTZKJmqkAbBgVJg1DH8wksSskkcIb_my4SdJLiC5a-j5qUrGaElW46WedvHpIbiyvbSQP7Ab_9YHnDRiv1PBUS7yvOM0z17jIERZvn4ShKhZf_SwxNMby9TDMbgdoYh_jAFxGAfzPa68lQAAto2bB0wR9rSKwDhbnLz7UEuFPG4Zho81vh3evRAwrn_q0wy3Fipn1OXikNJk0viJZRMN2U9n0ScYFk8EIWjzSHeJ8MececBYPceNhv_KnulFqOX/4ba/nxDpYN1KQ-CJWZXixpC6bQ/h2/h001.DstCRREW25BEwVpQVWJH9dZlMkTwTIA5T_huKRTD_x0) **Our community has always been a powerful force against the hatred and bigotry aimed at us and our loved ones.** Time and time again, we’ve stood strong, supported one another, and fought back against those who seek to divide us. We’ve built a network of care, courage, resilience, and POWER — and we’re ready to protect one another.**** We’re strong. We’re resilient. And, together, we’ll create a future where everyone can live, thrive, and move without fear. clean_body: We’re ready to fight, and together we will win. | | | We’re in this together, Peter. Now that we know what we’re up against for the next 4 years, we’re building up our Here To Stay Network — calling on allies and all people of conscience to be prepared to take bold action to keep our communities safe from family separation and deportation. Are you ready, Peter, to meet this moment? While none of us wanted to have to fight tooth and nail against Trump again, we know we can. We have faced this moment before, and our movement has grown stronger. We’ve fought against the deportations of our loved ones, reunited families, and defeated racist policies like the Muslim Ban. Trump and his MAGA base will never break us. 💪Together, we can protect our immigrant communities from Republicans’ plans to dismantle our rights and attack our communities. It’s okay to take time to process emotions and reflect on how we got here — but then it’s time for us to lock in and get to work to defend our undocumented loved ones and community members. Our community has always been a powerful force against the hatred and bigotry aimed at us and our loved ones. Time and time again, we’ve stood strong, supported one another, and fought back against those who seek to divide us. We’ve built a network of care, courage, resilience, and POWER — and we’re ready to protect one another.** We’re strong. We’re resilient. And, together, we’ll create a future where everyone can live, thrive, and move without fear. Together, we will build the largest pro-immigrant movement in history — We’re ready to fight, and together, we will win. ✊In solidarity, Carolina and the rest of the UWD Team P.S. Before you head back to your inbox, can you support DACA recipients by donating to our DACA Renewal Fund today?👇 ** | Follow us on: | | | | |

Team -- Even though the presidential results weren't what we worked so hard for, the truth is clear: **Kamala Harris broke barriers, ran a historic presidential campaign, and inspired Democrats across America.**

She proved the importance of fighting for what we believe in, and from her first day as vice president to the last day of her campaign, she demonstrated what it means to be a champion for all Americans. **We're organizing a card to thank her for her public service -- and we want YOU to sign!**

We need 250,000 signatures by the midnight deadline before we can send it, so **please, sign on right away:**

[**Thank Kamala Harris for her _historic_ campaign >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/20667?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241108-SignTheCard-KamalaHarrisThankYouCard-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241108-SignTheCard-KamalaHarrisThankYouCard-ETG-sl1&akid=18877%2E9716520%2EumZUdM)

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Dear Friend,

In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young
Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This
trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these
two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?

To address this, we have created a new eBook, The History of
Socialism and Capitalism, authored by two of the most prominent
voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins,
development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each
scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different
lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in
today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining
traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of
socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions
about our economic and political future. The insights provided by
Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to
critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their
potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of
these pivotal economic systems. Click here to request your free
copy of The History of Socialism and Capitalism today.

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development

Hoover Institution | Stanford University

With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and
Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven
policy research organization that seeks to improve the human
condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity,
national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one
hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that
have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford
CA USA 94305

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=ff2cef1b2a6a4970a2cffdcb5ee1081d&_t=XdkGmEbg4IMBMH5I-SOKPnBKJWhRNulrBnf6UL6-7idttQvXDdJKTA7LdW8ms12l-Z5aeqTxhyEj12afboeWxupdkghvr5VOMDzAtMGmnKJ_DhsaRs4otOGGPI5d3N0_)_

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ff2cef1b2a6a4970a2cffdcb5ee1081d&_e=mHfpvGvTwCMv80UFxQz0ltZX2MhJ7_iaHygJgc3R0jGh_3GdRZVwZTu56rLCZZ4UcUpVFBzKEeReKwFuWsudJn79ZqQHYn7D1x_JezziWNSYDz1Tr4DzeALCLMgYBE5v7dcE64jOFCLm3CN1iRO9SE7eaCShr73sXF25lPBhk0MZzMkEo-HPHxCUkib0YBJ6Uij-Fvut4GP23hgKxRdtlbfgm9O_XKzrMbr0QjFHfqUFNEXSr3jpE2M-jicGrJeRNYxdPZBYnpsmok5xGBwt5CNUwwqzFASWtTOMDD55cj6NnXSH9tlEUwltSrBZcz95Ff8BVcgiUwIvBN0HeaKE5fWwjo2i3CipeDZ-Q3nSNhf7F3QO9ZuKmM-y1BbmXHR1UZ39EHbOw44aiVP0U128vw%3D%3D)
| |
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ff2cef1b2a6a4970a2cffdcb5ee1081d&_e=mHfpvGvTwCMv80UFxQz0ltZX2MhJ7_iaHygJgc3R0jGh_3GdRZVwZTu56rLCZZ4UcUpVFBzKEeReKwFuWsudJn79ZqQHYn7D1x_JezziWNSYDz1Tr4DzeALCLMgYBE5v7dcE64jOFCLm3CN1iRO9SE7eaCShr73sXF25lPBhk0MZzMkEo-HPHxCUkib0YBJ6Uij-Fvut4GP23hgKxRdtlbfgm9O_XKzrMbr0QjFHfqUFNEXSr3jpE2M-jicGrJeRMe6S-NbbBaOEYnmmz4rlfCbNo_1Ihr719F2IOMl0ZS9ZZkBiBG42f0WqAVz1oA92S1IIRDPnOjoEU8x604VSP1MUozVVH93Dp5frVr1l-BFiFiucl7UuMt7UJoEPIul1hUz3_37pBm7SbMSKVQtz2w%3D%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ff2cef1b2a6a4970a2cffdcb5ee1081d&_e=mHfpvGvTwCMv80UFxQz0ltZX2MhJ7_iaHygJgc3R0jGh_3GdRZVwZTu56rLCZZ4UcUpVFBzKEeReKwFuWsudJn79ZqQHYn7D1x_JezziWNSYDz1Tr4DzeALCLMgYBE5v7dcE64jOFCLm3CN1iRO9SE7eaCShr73sXF25lPBhk0MZzMkEo-HPHxCUkib0YBJ6Uij-Fvut4GP23hgKxRdtlbfgm9O_XKzrMbr0QjFHfqUFNEXSr3jpE2M-jicGrJeRUKqjK0Om7n7WSq17BkotuP61A5cujnuW0OeEtIeyfegEUPsLtc8K7_WuqTAV2kn-C0y1X-GwU1KXqnMkwK5jR94pC1jPtgLiSy5HmENwVGWV8Htkz7tmCDb76hSa7rkmSo5G8U2Uwb_fTrcbdtqspw%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
