name: Indiana GOP
subject: A Historic Red Wave!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**A Historic Red Wave!**_
---
Friends, Last night, Indiana was part of a historic red wave across the country. With decisive wins up and down the ballot, we proudly secured the White House for another four years as President Trump won with a popular vote victory, a first for a Republican since 2004. Indiana was among the earliest states called for Trump, reflecting the strong support Hoosiers continue to place in his leadership.

Our governor-elect, Mike Braun, won with a commanding mandate, marking one of the largest gubernatorial victories in Indiana’s history. We have not seen a margin this large for an open seat since 1980, resulting in a historic night for Mike Braun. Senator-elect Jim Banks won his race by 20 points! He will continue to represent our state in Congress, now as our Junior Senator. And Attorney General Todd Rokita will continue to fight for Hoosiers in his role as our state's attorney, winning his race by nearly 18 points. We also maintained Republican supermajorities in both the House and Senate. A huge congrats to our legislators that won reelection, and to those who will be joining for their first session in 2025.

These victories are a testament to the trust Hoosiers have in our party’s vision and the commitment of our candidates to serve. But none of this would have been possible without the countless individuals who dedicated their time, energy, and resources to support our campaigns. From campaign staff and local party leaders to the volunteers who knocked on doors, made calls, and engaged with voters, this success belongs to all of you. Your hard work, enthusiasm, and commitment helped make this historic election night a reality. Thank you for standing with us, believing in our vision, and working tirelessly to keep Indiana strong. We look forward to the incredible progress that our elected leaders will bring to Indiana in 2025 and beyond!
Thank you all for what you do!
---
| |
---
| | Chairman Randy Head
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| | _**Mike Braun Hit's the Ground Running on Day 1 Talking to Republican Caucus Leaders and**_ _**Announced his Transition Team**_
---
---
**Governor-elect Mike Braun** [met](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=136a6a7bd65243fbad7fcd91c0ca6598&_e=uqQa8faksBK2Kq7FNfuq22RjGhXGAguBrkkCrdeQuJiyAndrE_no-KC2qPPrJGEhu66nDI8YHv-xRlmQXC2-fBnMBCzedBTdkU2HKgQOJeT4dU-BsWII-y-l2Amzg3hXMLYDWS9H9XiL7yCCU_JCL3Pgj_ounAVsfL5euYRhsJEh8Ett8xBoOSXx1cc719NriMRNtR0R_1yXrWvCCPiuGLahw_vjKthMRzKglYXsKWXt1PByB1kd4kDCxtDB8Ola) with leaders of the House and Senate the day after winning Indiana's race for Governor. **What's he saying** : "On my 1st day as your Governor-elect, I sat down with Statehouse leaders to talk about making life better and more affordable for Hoosiers.

Thank you Speaker Todd Huston and President Pro Tem Rod Bray for your time and insight.

I look forward to working with you for Indiana!" \- **Governor-elect****. Braun** said via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=136a6a7bd65243fbad7fcd91c0ca6598&_e=uqQa8faksBK2Kq7FNfuq22RjGhXGAguBrkkCrdeQuJiyAndrE_no-KC2qPPrJGEhu66nDI8YHv-xRlmQXC2-fLRFVVU_EaITR9_7qA4yJ0uUHDkIEk5sJI4-6tOem6Vjghsv0zu-AUcpkWuYbxYiTd4AlFL0Cefv-i0vqY4fsZM3HibXBs4cNSfUJEktUGuVVoQb6-ifxdrQXXj95ntVU9FSYsCBTig8FMx5MZhRWejVyCkr7GHb5ohlL02IJ0Z0).
---
---
**Governor-elect Mike Braun**[held](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=136a6a7bd65243fbad7fcd91c0ca6598&_e=uqQa8faksBK2Kq7FNfuq22RjGhXGAguBrkkCrdeQuJgWrQXoQenROBR0WYsUgI_AAqc0S31cxCPP1nDCyNeMluZwD_QKV4yKV94vOyl0bfYA06bdisafzjLpZ6tp2xYJNGxN8gTdb_-oaHVcOr7EyH85nRwG_gMu71cIdiYMy4U8uUyziw-V7Z4E3MAHrtFwGjitejALJmHny0Y-HkNwarw7QPlhZdVfH2gNmOelisQuW9RVoex_ssWHTeF4sq_N) a press conference to announce his transition team. **What's he saying** : "To enact our Freedom & Opportunity agenda and get results for Hoosiers, we’ve put together a team of innovators who bring a wealth of experience, expertise, and a shared commitment to serving the people of Indiana. Read more about my Transition Team: [Here](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=136a6a7bd65243fbad7fcd91c0ca6598&_e=uqQa8faksBK2Kq7FNfuq2_Wok8HrMR8oERE_8NEht6HPT8u9x4gSk1gJgpVA7VUAjokbdRTsClMcegnpcnAWCv8TohVla45Efp6A_wBJfrLVyhia6jjMsJafp7qRUUJoXrnB4acv6E35yu2AssvBCATJCPXhwqNGf4stMTMC4jnt6HBpd_N5Bt9VQ3TBATzjAZWq124vIOKW1d4IZL57Iw%3D%3D)" \- **Sen. Braun** said via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=136a6a7bd65243fbad7fcd91c0ca6598&_e=uqQa8faksBK2Kq7FNfuq22RjGhXGAguBrkkCrdeQuJgWrQXoQenROBR0WYsUgI_AAqc0S31cxCPP1nDCyNeMlmeeZGXreBEvsHsr_a389mZCpfi7AxjTMJWhJN5d16ElwFxIoT6old2m_ZtuuVhgCaUpela8_Lmsw51q5J4ofZn5hQLH7I6CdVwbZAgHx5OIFNdF1Kdgad4kTq6Qu8Lk-ynP_g1PDgmSTZtC39uT1mFDNDcOzmcqAGTfyBQLFU2T).

Mike Braun **on [Facebook](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=136a6a7bd65243fbad7fcd91c0ca6598&_e=7mNsgHFFVXFYG9oAVOkEa2ibTv3Ix92wbKn1x52TFBiB3tmlxIIQLrQYeVmugFDUfGY_M-kBD3wzbuZOYZWoNsseIQd1aedQFuv-crQs66h4Ak3HRw7T3VKJscfff6ytoiF_LrxX6pTD2OhpUiy3iFqFlyfMMBGdYovL-JbtWSbbTEgw0Miy43wvbAyNajCJZT_IR7orq1CEczJqot44P7gDBTcnpdLhTmOTsiuol4A3Ry3GpsjltrPTU9MtvuiRMx0fCrhIY_N0qCMf8fJF92vyZ0KCGUMEqFFsKB6oiEYnvDNaJLET8yzqjJvkUk8B9zZvisUt369QCZqRwyqThD6lIRmYc97gCLSAMDOdK9c%3D) or [X.](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=136a6a7bd65243fbad7fcd91c0ca6598&_e=7mNsgHFFVXFYG9oAVOkEa2ibTv3Ix92wbKn1x52TFBiB3tmlxIIQLrQYeVmugFDUfGY_M-kBD3wzbuZOYZWoNsseIQd1aedQFuv-crQs66h4Ak3HRw7T3VKJscfff6ytoiF_LrxX6pTD2OhpUiy3iA47jtLOB6eK0KDkdLZw1NSJZD3zdSpfF7s8ZeSwVREgvJSYcWwRigbb76QMTNv81z4i2vV-KlcVxSGxXil8qCtHxOckjPrYR0hoWQzn_dcaUxvIEojI7gx2a4PwsSO_1XH7uf02HwTdWITZUGAkMZR0jTBrzjYrinjq915NCXgLFWFTifCkPziPSD_XShlsJLLh8-8ql7nOB2mxSLMKuOk%3D)

---
**2024's Red Wave**
---
In the 2024 General Election, Indiana Republicans demonstrated remarkable strength, commitment, and vision for our state’s future. From statewide races to local contests, our team worked tirelessly to earn the trust and support of Hoosiers across Indiana. Through a clear message of opportunity, freedom, and conservative values, we were able to deliver results that will benefit every community.

Below is a recap of our HISTORIC night:
---
* **Presidential Victory** \- Former President Donald Trump secured Indiana's 11 electoral votes early Tuesday night as Indiana was one of the first states called! President Trump will be returning to the White House for a second term!
* **Gubernatorial Mandate** \- Governor-elect Mike Braun won the governor's race, extending the GOP's control of the office for over 2 decades with 5 straight terms.
* This HISTORIC win also included the largest win margin for an open governor's seat since 1980.
* **Attorney General Landslide** \- Attorney General Rokita won reelection by almost 18% in what was a landslide victory!
* **U.S. Senate Seat Retention** \- Senator-elect Jim Banks won the U.S. Senate Seat, maintaining the party's representation in the Senate, also winning by double digit margins.
* **Congressional Dominance** \- We retained 7 of Indiana's 9 U.S. House seats, including victories in three open-seat races. Notably, Marlin Stutzman reclaimed the 3rd District seat, Jefferson Shreve won the 6th District, and Mark Messmer secured the 8th District, all contributing to the party's strong congressional presence.
* **State Legislature** \- Republicans maintained their supermajority in both chambers of the Indiana General Assembly, ensuring continued influence over state legislative agendas.

---
Indiana’s future is brighter than ever. With the leadership and vision of Governor-elect Mike Braun, alongside the support of the General Assembly, we are ready to bring new opportunities and lasting prosperity to every Hoosier. Together, we will drive progress, expand economic freedom, and ensure that Indiana continues to lead as a model of conservative values and innovation. United in our purpose, we’re poised to achieve remarkable things and take our state to places it has never before.
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | A Historic Red Wave! Friends, Last night, Indiana was part of a historic red wave across the country. With decisive wins up and down the ballot, we proudly secured the White House for another four years as President Trump won with a popular vote victory, a first for a Republican since 2004. Indiana was among the earliest states called for Trump, reflecting the strong support Hoosiers continue to place in his leadership. Our governor-elect, Mike Braun, won with a commanding mandate, marking one of the largest gubernatorial victories in Indiana’s history. We have not seen a margin this large for an open seat since 1980, resulting in a historic night for Mike Braun. Senator-elect Jim Banks won his race by 20 points! He will continue to represent our state in Congress, now as our Junior Senator. And Attorney General Todd Rokita will continue to fight for Hoosiers in his role as our state's attorney, winning his race by nearly 18 points. We also maintained Republican supermajorities in both the House and Senate. A huge congrats to our legislators that won reelection, and to those who will be joining for their first session in 2025. These victories are a testament to the trust Hoosiers have in our party’s vision and the commitment of our candidates to serve. But none of this would have been possible without the countless individuals who dedicated their time, energy, and resources to support our campaigns. From campaign staff and local party leaders to the volunteers who knocked on doors, made calls, and engaged with voters, this success belongs to all of you. Your hard work, enthusiasm, and commitment helped make this historic election night a reality. Thank you for standing with us, believing in our vision, and working tirelessly to keep Indiana strong. We look forward to the incredible progress that our elected leaders will bring to Indiana in 2025 and beyond! Thank you all for what you do! | | | | Chairman Randy Head | | | | | | Mike Braun Hit's the Ground Running on Day 1 Talking to Republican Caucus Leaders and Announced his Transition Team Governor-elect Mike Braun with leaders of the House and Senate the day after winning Indiana's race for Governor. What's he saying : "On my 1st day as your Governor-elect, I sat down with Statehouse leaders to talk about making life better and more affordable for Hoosiers. Thank you Speaker Todd Huston and President Pro Tem Rod Bray for your time and insight. I look forward to working with you for Indiana!" \- Governor-elect. Braun said via . Governor-elect Mike Braun a press conference to announce his transition team. What's he saying : "To enact our Freedom & Opportunity agenda and get results for Hoosiers, we’ve put together a team of innovators who bring a wealth of experience, expertise, and a shared commitment to serving the people of Indiana. Read more about my Transition Team: " \- Sen. Braun said via . To stay up-to-date, follow Sen. Mike Braun on or | 2024's Red Wave In the 2024 General Election, Indiana Republicans demonstrated remarkable strength, commitment, and vision for our state’s future. From statewide races to local contests, our team worked tirelessly to earn the trust and support of Hoosiers across Indiana. Through a clear message of opportunity, freedom, and conservative values, we were able to deliver results that will benefit every community. Below is a recap of our HISTORIC night: Presidential Victory \- Former President Donald Trump secured Indiana's 11 electoral votes early Tuesday night as Indiana was one of the first states called! President Trump will be returning to the White House for a second term! Gubernatorial Mandate \- Governor-elect Mike Braun won the governor's race, extending the GOP's control of the office for over 2 decades with 5 straight terms. This HISTORIC win also included the largest win margin for an open governor's seat since 1980. Attorney General Landslide \- Attorney General Rokita won reelection by almost 18% in what was a landslide victory! U.S. Senate Seat Retention \- Senator-elect Jim Banks won the U.S. Senate Seat, maintaining the party's representation in the Senate, also winning by double digit margins. Congressional Dominance \- We retained 7 of Indiana's 9 U.S. House seats, including victories in three open-seat races. Notably, Marlin Stutzman reclaimed the 3rd District seat, Jefferson Shreve won the 6th District, and Mark Messmer secured the 8th District, all contributing to the party's strong congressional presence. State Legislature \- Republicans maintained their supermajority in both chambers of the Indiana General Assembly, ensuring continued influence over state legislative agendas. Indiana’s future is brighter than ever. With the leadership and vision of Governor-elect Mike Braun, alongside the support of the General Assembly, we are ready to bring new opportunities and lasting prosperity to every Hoosier. Together, we will drive progress, expand economic freedom, and ensure that Indiana continues to lead as a model of conservative values and innovation. United in our purpose, we’re poised to achieve remarkable things and take our state to places it has never before. | 📱 News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb his final Community Crossing Grant. Since 2017 $1.7m billion to support local projects across Indiana. Lieutenant Governor Suzanne Crouch Carrie Wright who made "177 Pieces in My Dream" which hangs in the governors residence. Secretary Diego Morales the Lieutenant Governor of the Province of Cordoba, Argentina. Treasurer Daniel Elliott his birthday! Comptroller Elise Nieshella all incumbents and newly elected officials. Attorney General Todd Rokita Hoosiers for voting to allow him to continue protecting our jobs, values and families. Senator Todd Young the @BioCrossroads Life Sciences Summit to talk more about Indiana's leading role in life sciences. Senator Mike Braun down with Governor Holcomb and Indiana's First Lady Janet Holcomb. Congressman Rudy Yakym on commonsense change coming back to D.C. Congressman Jim Banks on our Military and what we can expect going forward. Congressman Jim Baird on what he want's to accomplish with President Trump and the House GOP. Congresswoman Victoria Spartz with Westfield and Noblesville chamber of commerce's to discuss priorities for next congress. name: Kirsten Engel
subject: We can’t give up yet — we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_110824_Wait_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_110824_Wait_act]
Hi Peter,
We knew from the start that this would be an incredibly close race.
In 2022, we lost by just a percentage point after being outspent 6:1 . This cycle, we gave it our all to make sure my opponent couldn’t drown out our campaign with his millions in dark money.
We decided to spend everything we had these last couple of weeks reaching undecided voters and getting them to the polls.
Now, we need the resources to make sure every lawful ballot is counted.
This race is going to come down to a razor-thin margin, and we’re working to make sure every lawful vote is counted fairly and securely.
Our grassroots campaign needs your help. We’ve made it this far because of you. Now, I have to ask: can you donate to ensure we have the resources to make sure every lawful vote is counted? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_110824_Wait_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_110824_Wait_act]
With so much at stake — control of the House of Representatives, our reproductive rights, and more — we can’t afford to give up.
Thank you,
Kirsten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_110824_Wait_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_110824_Wait_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_110824_Wait_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_110824_Wait_act]
Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_110824_Wait_act]

name: Laura Gillen
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
I am humbled and grateful to have the privilege of serving the people of New York’s Fourth Congressional District.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96809783/511265213/549506455?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2024-11-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDY4ODMzNS0xMDllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CO48Y-PuBdXQKOpR6nXysbG_GRfadGbXja6roxHfyBs=)

| Peter,

It’s official – I’ve officially been elected to represent New York’s Fourth Congressional District in Congress!

I am humbled and grateful to have the privilege of serving the people of New York’s Fourth Congressional District. Voters chose our message of common sense and common ground, and that is exactly the approach I will bring to Washington. As Town Supervisor, I reached across the aisle to lower costs for Nassau County families, and in Congress I will work in a bipartisan manner to deliver on the pressing issues we face.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96809784/511265214/549506455?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2024-11-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDY4ODMzNS0xMDllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CO48Y-PuBdXQKOpR6nXysbG_GRfadGbXja6roxHfyBs=)
This victory was only possible because of our people-powered movement! From knocking on doors to making phone calls to putting out yard signs to donating to our campaign - all your support helped us flip this seat from red to blue.

Thank you for all your incredible support and I look forward to representing you in Congress!

Grateful,

Laura Gillen

Team,
I know many of us are still processing the results of Tuesday's election and what it means for our state and our nation.

Donald Trump's victory presents challenges we must now confront together, and we'll need a strong presence in the People's House of Representatives to find the Big Middle, breaking down partisan divides.
Results are still coming in, and it looks like our race may result in a recount despite our small lead. That's why we must do everything we can to win the House or limit the GOP majority – that means holding the line in OH-09.
**Team, I need your support to fund our recount efforts and help us get over the finish line. Can I count on you right now? **
Here's the link: [**https://sherrodbrown.com/donate/kaptur-recount/dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96809719/511265140/-1458395968?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3819-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJlZjM4Mi0wZjllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E49mW7irHSJrVcm9R3dG4FQhoETnqjA2fFMSBcmjC0U=)
Thank you so much.
– Marcy Kaptur

body:
#

**The race for CA-27 is too close to call, while control of the U.S. House is still up for grabs.**
Team — we have an urgent update from a key California House race where the election is still too close to call.
Former NASA chief of staff George Whitesides, whose tossup race in CA-27 has yet to be called, is only down by a few thousand votes.
George could be headed for a recount, so we're mobilizing our supporters to ensure he has the resources to count every vote fairly and accurately.
[**The House is still up for grabs, and we need all hands on deck to keep our hopes of a House majority alive. Can you split $5 between GIFFORDS PAC and George Whitesides' recount fund today? name: Jacky Rosen
subject: We need to make sure every last vote gets counted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
We can’t afford to lose another Senate seat

| Here's where things stand, friend: **Nevada’s Senate race is not over – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.**

We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban.

Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: [_**Please, will you split $25 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and Fight for Progress to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96810210/511266828/1736145590?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-11-07_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxNjViMjQwLTEyOWUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k1kiXHU_zuxdWHDN2Oah15OLxWQR9h4CaiGld5x9n9o=)
---
| [DONATE $25 ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96810213/511266830/1736145590?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-11-07_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxNjViMjQwLTEyOWUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k1kiXHU_zuxdWHDN2Oah15OLxWQR9h4CaiGld5x9n9o=)
---
We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country.

Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But now, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win.

So please, friend, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment: [_**Split $25 or more right now to help my campaign get across the finish line.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96810214/511266832/1736145590?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-11-07_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxNjViMjQwLTEyOWUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k1kiXHU_zuxdWHDN2Oah15OLxWQR9h4CaiGld5x9n9o=)

Thanks to everyone who tuned into our special coverage Tuesday Night at the Heritage Foundation. We've really created a special community, and I appreciate everyone who has subscribed, sent the show to a friend, joined the chat and subscribed to my email lists.
## The end of the Trump rallies...
Last week, Trump announced that he would no longer be holding rallies because he was no longer campaigning. The MAGA movement is unlike any political movement before, and a core tenent of it was the unbelievable phenomenon of the massive crowds and energy at the rallies.
Over the past few years, our production crew captured what it's like at the rallies and followed a group of people who attended every rally - The Front Row Joes. I even sat down with President Trump at Mar-a-Lago to discuss this group and the rallies in a way he never has before.
Check out the 2-part documentary on Salem:
[Click here](https://substack.com/redirect/8f74002b-a05b-4c88-8dd0-083da0153ec7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

## Guests next week...
Next week, we've got Meghan McCain, Speaker Newt Gingrich, a great panel, the executive director of the National Republican Senatorial Commitee Jason Theiman and more. Subscribe now and hit the notification button so you don't miss an episode:
[Subscribe & turn on notifications](https://substack.com/redirect/7c897701-c1ae-4f10-baae-70dc4694f26a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## The big take aways from Tuesday
We learned a lot on Tuesday. But two things stand out.
First, the support for President Trump and his policies resonated in places and with people many didn't think possible. Second, if you are getting your information from left wing media sources (Washington Post, CNN, New York Times, CBS, NBC, etc) they proved once and for all how useless and bias they are.
When you look at the charts above it's clear the support for President Trump grew across the whole country. From New Jersey to California, states got reder and reder. In fact when you actually shade the country by county/city it's clear we don't have red states and blue states, we have a red country and blue cities. The Democrat party has become the party of the cities. It is truly now just a geographical party...

subject: Decoding an Alien Message, Puppy CPR, and Log-Riding
body:
Ken and Keli Chaffin, a father-daughter duo from the United States, exemplified the power of collaboration and mutual support in [decoding a simulated "alien" message](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEzzFu7CAUheHVQIcFF2yGguI1081rU1p34OIhwsYyaJzsPnI2kPYc6ZP-j8f8wFzytvzHlXxa0txTnUGCEUoJeZv3o7adQp8Njz4RAWlOXlmtpHPKSP7yUsfnhBB0GiE5DHZycQTrzKi0QpQ8-wtUSt5AjqDc4JxD56K9WUvPyQRmJMXc6zF81rz1F6XyXd90DKGuvPhX73tj-h-DO4P7eZ5D2zHQ9TK4Y8m0iZaXDYtY8WgiUqiRoqCGgr7qtfHDx_3MpeQ2WWbksmIuv3z_o_rt4ScAAP__GvNdTQ) transmitted by the European Space Agency's ExoMars Trace Gas Orbiter.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEkMFuqzAQRb_G7ILsGYPxwosnRezypFaV0p0F9kBcGYzACerfV6TtutuZM3OvzvViL12IYR7_dxOZYRxsHpIFDvIkxIk3dlnTtpDLVhbeDERAWJARCgXXWkhe3ExFpFzvuEKqXM29Bi970pq6qifseRHM8VAI3gCvQOhSa91p7VWjFPW1dExy8iGntfxIYc43GuJnetBaujQV0dxyXjaG_xi0DNp938uJwpxpdbTkg2HQotIILwza97fL6xUPFNt78AzPAiUHBvV27wXD80AU7ZiStz8p3ytgeJ5p3yLl_DvD41pY3jyNFKvxyx5iDFutmOTj1IX4rJj_MPcw8BUAAP__spxwMw) | |
# NOVEMBER 8, 2024
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** We were so encouraged by the hundreds of emails we received telling us how much you liked _The Feel Good Friday_. We were overwhelmed by your notes. If you haven't told us what you think, we would love to hear from you--just hit reply. This week's edition of _The Feel Good Flyover_ covers a father and daughter teaming up to crack an alien code and a heroic puppy demonstrating CPR skills to save his owner. Today we are sponsored by KilgourMD. [Learn more](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEkMFuqzAQRb_G7ILsGYPxwosnRezypFaV0p0F9kBcGYzACerfV6TtutuZM3OvzvViL12IYR7_dxOZYRxsHpIFDvIkxIk3dlnTtpDLVhbeDERAWJARCgXXWkhe3ExFpFzvuEKqXM29Bi970pq6qifseRHM8VAI3gCvQOhSa91p7VWjFPW1dExy8iGntfxIYc43GuJnetBaujQV0dxyXjaG_xi0DNp938uJwpxpdbTkg2HQotIILwza97fL6xUPFNt78AzPAiUHBvV27wXD80AU7ZiStz8p3ytgeJ5p3yLl_DvD41pY3jyNFKvxyx5iDFutmOTj1IX4rJj_MPcw8BUAAP__spxwMw) about how KilgourMD can transform your hair care routine.
|
---
## Father-Daughter Duo Cracks 'Alien' Code
Ken and Keli Chaffin, a father-daughter duo from the United States, exemplified the power of collaboration and mutual support in [decoding a simulated "alien" message](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEzzFu7CAUheHVQIcFF2yGguI1081rU1p34OIhwsYyaJzsPnI2kPYc6ZP-j8f8wFzytvzHlXxa0txTnUGCEUoJeZv3o7adQp8Njz4RAWlOXlmtpHPKSP7yUsfnhBB0GiE5DHZycQTrzKi0QpQ8-wtUSt5AjqDc4JxD56K9WUvPyQRmJMXc6zF81rz1F6XyXd90DKGuvPhX73tj-h-DO4P7eZ5D2zHQ9TK4Y8m0iZaXDYtY8WgiUqiRoqCGgr7qtfHDx_3MpeQ2WWbksmIuv3z_o_rt4ScAAP__GvNdTQ) transmitted by the European Space Agency's ExoMars Trace Gas Orbiter. Their collaborative effort involved running extensive simulations over several days, leading to the revelation of an image depicting five amino acids--[the building blocks of life](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEkLGOqzAQAL_GdItsxwRcuHgNXV57JTLsAo4MRvYmHH9_yv3A9aPRaL4ew8OHGPblv9_Izcs88JwGLbUBpUB2w5FTOWjiwVToZiJNt4qcam9KWquMrFY3NR4bhdJbaaiTOKGdkHRnqGmx62wV3EeolOy0bLSytbXWW4tt17Y03s0kjCQMnHL9TGHnleZ4pTflekpbFd3KfBRx-yd0L3R_nmf92sObciFO6K8PJXSv7laaVug-00bbSBl49Qw-BtqhhGX3EQrtDOMFvBLQd9p8LpDyGJgyRF8YLvIZAhd4vgrDSLQD0pSQUOi-yg6PM8QYyr0VRi6bD_G3kf9Y93b6JwAA__-e2XZ4). Ken, a retired software developer and musician, dedicated daily efforts to the project, while Keli provided encouragement and support, urging him to trust his intuition.
## Hero Dog Performs 'Puppy CPR' to Save Veteran
A Canadian military veteran credits his dog, Bear, [with saving his life](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEkMFu4yAUAL8G354FGIdw4BBtZOWS3WhbqUeLwLNDY4MFxFb69VX6A72PRqP5OPdn4ycfxr9mRj2MQ1-G2HPKBTAGdN8vKeYFbelF5fSAyLGpUDPZMKoUE7S6aSOkpGhbY5i0basEXqm5OuV2DVorsfL6JWSM7jltOVO1Usoo5eReSrzuhCWCovMlpvoz-lBuOEzPuGKqbZyrSd9KWTJpDoR3hHfbttX5EcIz359fL4LwbozRQcAtE961rWoI706YIhzjCBdMQ0xzhj-X__Ae4c2sCP-2gAmOj-TDCGeTs18RTmhSgUMpxt6rpN2y-WnyeSeJoONs_PTTU37ZtGr-HQAA__88u25U) during a massive 'widowmaker' heart attack--a severe and often fatal event--that struck him in the middle of the night. Darren Cropper, 57, collapsed in his basement, only to be revived by Bear, a one-year-old [Siberian Husky-Golden Retriever mix](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEkL1uxCAQhJ_G7jgBxj8UFGmuu7QprTUs9kYYLEA--e0jR0qd7tNoNBp9X6_5BRQorp-wo_Grn6tPs-RSMSEYn-Yjp3KgrbNqnfGIErsWjRg7wbUWirebWabe-UV6pQanrZXd4HrbjXoaF91PsLRk7kEh-CR5L4V-aK1BazdO44jLoGyjODqqKT--E8W6oQ9XOjE_bNrbYLZaj9J0H418NvIZoVKKEI5U6l24I3yXRj4tRHDwBwSR7RSoQr7YiRUzRFbgKixFZBdCZik4ttxQ4ETHNioskEe2XOzA7FPeKa7MHrnNxh1vCoHKMDaKrztQ-H1X_5F2GvkTAAD__x9IdTE), who jumped on his chest with such force that paw prints were left on his torso. Paramedics later said Bear's instinctive "Puppy CPR," which may have lasted hours, kept Cropper alive. Now recovered, Cropper called Bear's actions a testament to his service-dog lineage and life-saving instincts.
## Couple Forms Unique Friendship With Otter
While living on a remote Scottish island, a man named Billy Mail formed an unlikely bond with an [orphaned otter he named Molly](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEkLFyrCAUQL8GOxxAFCkoXmO3r03p3IWrkKAYvLvO_n1m8wPpz5w5cz5u8w1STvv6HzZ0y7rMtJRZCaW5lFyM81HLeaCnWTfBLYgKuwadNJ0U1kotmuhM77teaw9jv9w7ITuwnbbGDMH3d7DQJPcWSilGJXolbWutBWuDGY3B-6A90wJDolLbz5J2irjkV3libX3Zmuwi0XGy7h9TE1PTdV0tRaS04fkGmJoeX0xNpy-UYQ9MTVAp-YxMTVvJ-cUpIo-Pfa0vDnvgpR4Rdgy8EGHlVyz8pJKRA99gP3lEqMS__VKf43BtTXXhuFLO6RwM02LdIOXfNPrj2NOpnwAAAP__C2JzQg), who first appeared near his home while scavenging for food. Over three years, he and his wife Susan provided Molly with fish during winter months, allowing her to maintain her wild nature while becoming familiar in their lives. [Molly, now a regular visitor](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEzzFuxCAQheHTQLcWM-CFKSjSuNu0KS1shjURXiwbrZXbR84FUr3iSZ_0fz3GR8glv56fYWWfnmlsqY6o0NwAbsqN216Pjec2Ghl9YkbWkj1YDYoIjJKLVzq6lHokFXs9sWMz9wamoJEoaJpl9hcIoByqHoE6IgpE0TprebqbWRjFMbe6d981v9rCqfzUN-_dXFdZ_NLadgj9IXAQOJzn2eU1TtcpcGi5Fb62aQBHjqzAQe4-bmcuJR93K4x6riGXP639E_n2-BsAAP__gAFU8Q), is attached to the couple, even "checking in" on them when they're outside. Their unique friendship is captured in the visually stunning documentary _Billy & Molly: An Otter Love Story_, streaming on Disney+ and airing on National Geographic's YouTube channel. [Watch the full movie here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyEz81uhCAUxfGngd2Yy4ciCxZtWtPNzKaLLg3CRWlxMMpo5u0b-wLdnpP8kv_Xtb_amOJ9vNkZTRhDX0LuOXB5YewCbb-seVvQlV5SbwIiR0HRMCUYaM0k0MkwZ0EPNQI6qZvGsqZ2YL1TQgFI72g0J8gYtBxqznSltbZae9UqhUMjHZGAPpa8Vt853suEIT3zjmvl8kyTmUpZNiJeCO8I747jqJ75UR4Dnv-52OImIrqdiLfwk2_4_vn6oSVdjV-OmFLcGkUkjLON6Y8s_5Tuhv8GAAD__5-pV9I).

clean_body: Ken and Keli Chaffin, a father-daughter duo from the United States, exemplified the power of collaboration and mutual support in transmitted by the European Space Agency's ExoMars Trace Gas Orbiter. | | | | | | NOVEMBER 8, 2024 ---|--- Good Afternoon! We were so encouraged by the hundreds of emails we received telling us how much you liked The Feel Good Friday. We were overwhelmed by your notes. If you haven't told us what you think, we would love to hear from you--just hit reply. This week's edition of The Feel Good Flyover covers a father and daughter teaming up to crack an alien code and a heroic puppy demonstrating CPR skills to save his owner. Today we are sponsored by KilgourMD. about how KilgourMD can transform your hair care routine. | Father-Daughter Duo Cracks 'Alien' Code Ken and Keli Chaffin, a father-daughter duo from the United States, exemplified the power of collaboration and mutual support in transmitted by the European Space Agency's ExoMars Trace Gas Orbiter. Their collaborative effort involved running extensive simulations over several days, leading to the revelation of an image depicting five amino acids--. Ken, a retired software developer and musician, dedicated daily efforts to the project, while Keli provided encouragement and support, urging him to trust his intuition. Hero Dog Performs 'Puppy CPR' to Save Veteran A Canadian military veteran credits his dog, Bear, during a massive 'widowmaker' heart attack--a severe and often fatal event--that struck him in the middle of the night. Darren Cropper, 57, collapsed in his basement, only to be revived by Bear, a one-year-old , who jumped on his chest with such force that paw prints were left on his torso. Paramedics later said Bear's instinctive "Puppy CPR," which may have lasted hours, kept Cropper alive. Now recovered, Cropper called Bear's actions a testament to his service-dog lineage and life-saving instincts. Couple Forms Unique Friendship With Otter While living on a remote Scottish island, a man named Billy Mail formed an unlikely bond with an , who first appeared near his home while scavenging for food. Over three years, he and his wife Susan provided Molly with fish during winter months, allowing her to maintain her wild nature while becoming familiar in their lives. , is attached to the couple, even "checking in" on them when they're outside. Their unique friendship is captured in the visually stunning documentary Billy & Molly: An Otter Love Story, streaming on Disney+ and airing on National Geographic's YouTube channel. . | Flying together with our sponsor Achieve Stronger, Fuller Hair. Meet KilgourMD's plant-based serums, where nature meets science to give you healthier, fuller hair just in time for the holidays. () ➤ A Northern California retiree surprised the staff at a local Dunkin' Donuts with $20 tips each after learning their hours were cut. Now nicknamed "Grandpa," he's greeted warmly, and the owner even posted a sign joking, " Anyone who lets 'Grandpa' pay is terminated immediately." name: Jacky Rosen (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: Nevada’s Senate race is not over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
We can’t afford to lose another Senate seat

|
#
---
_Aloha Peter, this is Mazie. I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my friend, Senator Jacky Rosen. Jacky's race in Nevada is still too close to call, so I hope you'll read this message and [split](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96810493/511268542/615972423?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20241108_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzlmOTY0Yy0xNDllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UTt017VJiZzP_GC9BytU_WYrrmHLf8OJ8RqV3fIOM0=)_[ _ a donation between our campaigns if you can._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96810494/511268544/615972423?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20241108_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzlmOTY0Yy0xNDllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UTt017VJiZzP_GC9BytU_WYrrmHLf8OJ8RqV3fIOM0=) _Thank you._
* * *
Here's where things stand, friend: **Nevada’s Senate race is still too close to call – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.** We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: **[Please, will you split $10 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and Mazie to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96810495/511268545/615972423?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20241108_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzlmOTY0Yy0xNDllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UTt017VJiZzP_GC9BytU_WYrrmHLf8OJ8RqV3fIOM0=)** | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96810497/511268548/615972423?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20241108_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzlmOTY0Yy0xNDllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UTt017VJiZzP_GC9BytU_WYrrmHLf8OJ8RqV3fIOM0=)

Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But now, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: You have an important role to play right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by End Citizens United-Nonfederal
body:
I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close.
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22527%2E4449941%2E7uHj_E)
---
My friend —

When I first launched this campaign, I never would’ve dreamed that this many people would have my back.

It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we built together.

Here’s where we’re at in Arizona:

I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close.

Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down.

Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it. [**If you’re looking for some way to have an impact and help us fight back against Kari Lake as we work to ensure the votes are counted, please make a split donation to my campaign and Fight for Reform to elect state and local Democrats.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57098?t=7&akid=22527%2E4449941%2E7uHj_E) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57099?t=8&akid=22527%2E4449941%2E7uHj_E)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57098?t=12&akid=22527%2E4449941%2E7uHj_E)
Thanks again, and Semper Fi.

Ruben

name: Letter to Trump
subject: Thank you, President Trump. From: Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.
Will you sign our thank you note to President Trump?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks.

**[Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3ba7ba396268475e996fed05cd072ecf&_e=HRbs0ZC5IbFoMCTjhR5ppZJQJSbd1tM1OIGrw_9YGs4Vc09JuEIYM-V3dYMFH1lM1JBhDXl8PsuG7Yjj330NCChScBwc21vKjrL9dquIU78wwGJw-DcvENa1xmImlEs9wseoT7-NbwgD_FifuHZFh8Awx_4hFj1XFn7GJ2C_nfHnfgb59QuKoolC5ZiS7jqDXCz0wspVUYeym19kO6NmAG97bdq7Sdnrnze7BKZkMYhWVH0ol6ebgNCUVMzhCgI_xt4V9fHskupAFzplllMwNodyQSGMEXOsRlky2U6PidBiOjFIi-02YBPggENxVGmdXBUU-UfkUb41LnCS9uL_tMexxLoZovhum2JWkTFlXA9bnvjJbUhcn2KI8_vfB1zBMZUrrYTk54El-fR8jLv1qc9nITrPqY0hIQMw_FjJkQ0%3D "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?")**

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: This is urgent
body:
---
Derek, I wouldn't reach out again if it weren't important. Our race in Nevada isn’t over. This race will be one of the tightest in the country, and unless we raise another $115,762 before midnight, we could fall short of the critical resources we need to win. The hard truth is that Nevada is won by the margins, so please, will you chip in right now to help tip the scales in our favor to keep Nevada blue and support Democrats nationwide? **Here's the best link to split a donation between my campaign and the Democratic National Committee:** [**https://democrats.org/go/Help-Win-NV**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-jr-split-nov-2024?amount=20&refcode=em_20241108_2316_fr&refcode2=2316_22930333_GuGJWp&akid=2316%2E22930333%2EGuGJWp) Best, Jacky

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Jacky Rosen (via DLCC.org)
subject: Nevada’s Senate race is not over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
This race, and its stakes, are higher than ever. We can’t afford to lose another Senate seat. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Here's where things stand: **Nevada’s Senate race is still too close to call – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.** We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: [Please, will you split $10 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and the DLCC to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue and build Democratic power in state legislatures nationwide?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_D1QUohCyWJCmyFuD4nReM_rrqGKoVwO0YmcUHTLtUaEYJqBveHQs6d-GIp6abvU9mtyeDR3cwcDu9CLfzSH3dF5w_TNBmVTS-BDa6MaD-zlRIupiZt3lacoAISFzT11dNU5Qxx8NhcWBzhMbLrfgXFJszF2dObaj2rngvI6tBkBIkADdOOGiViHpi6ZTWMDLHmqz7iQH2oh2HYQALpL24t8oNDd_V8cSF-6Q_rVWXcnCyM91poFoRHYr_wsQA3l8vp4mXiNyP5WEup6XpU9AkeSwoOomCHY9ysmuMgrsg_Dqc_iQPMwpPzEYhOiUy4_yrbtQ1nmAWfT7IsVCgVWuprEOu-kBSi3fMTs7BX_Qvxskn-xWPKu_ZnsBbmCIqAZa/4ba/BmyGdiesRFuookxcEQ91Jw/h0/h001.8NuXTftugBEC-ufHI6I41LBjiZHyTM5LKc6e1c8qHNU) [Donate $10 »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_D1QUohCyWJCmyFuD4nReM_rrqGKoVwO0YmcUHTLtUaEYJqBveHQs6d-GIp6abvU9mtyeDR3cwcDu9CLfzSH3dF5w_TNBmVTS-BDa6MaD-zlRIupiZt3lacoAISFzT11dNU5Qxx8NhcWBzhMbLrfgXGR_8zvIGUeasfhA-oEAgaPM8eacLReauowaS5mMMvH7LK-7JGv_rl9kARBjEWHguvjj0haXd6RDKfqnkLChiHjBF8nvqb7l4ThG7ttvHScHNq65AjPuMGCYkmnVnFOZ3d97oud2qZdRUlCkgG3uiXmXFbzeAdl8lEgREHYftQHxR_KrBgBHNMQzhzmdUpaVQcsaB_pdKzjtM_VFb5p3FuYKiPkN6zv7K06pwLQWdlAd/4ba/BmyGdiesRFuookxcEQ91Jw/h1/h001.2lR60FX1Hm5biSAGYGQH5hU8TWMTYR1pOeBygyv8YXk) We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But now, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win. **So please, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment:**[Split $10 or more right now to help my campaign get across the finish line and elect state Democrats.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_D1QUohCyWJCmyFuD4nReM_rrqGKoVwO0YmcUHTLtUaEYJqBveHQs6d-GIp6abvU9mtyeDR3cwcDu9CLfzSH3dF5w_TNBmVTS-BDa6MaD-zlRIupiZt3lacoAISFzT11dNU5Qxx8NhcWBzhMbLrfgXDdTdRYCqkPY9lxiCxQ8dz7wRASdNMVuERY7K1gU265rCqWbf83d2tZh7NtuWdeqC6iSmKZXUelUpqLmgF9ZSvFcT8UorWL1nLeLbBIxd3rscxV5waeIsCj7rIRAVIHSZ6L8VRTPL-ih2-NXLmEWAGnOV0laeVwfIpJESHhf0Gy9jikcyX96As-tebV89Hm1cJjgPmymgOGhE_CufjZV7WBS7_hszGyx_PdP2bggpf11/4ba/BmyGdiesRFuookxcEQ91Jw/h2/h001.Eg7WuD_5icwRaWBla2bfuhyZ1mlApye30YQK6w2q0R8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Jacky Rosen and DLCC PAC.

clean_body: This race, and its stakes, are higher than ever. We can’t afford to lose another Senate seat. | | | | | ---|--- Here's where things stand: Nevada’s Senate race is still too close to call – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes. We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But now, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win. So please, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Jacky Rosen and DLCC PAC. | | | | | | Thank you so much. subject: Gaining ground
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96812624/511275409/-613562098?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDk4NDNjMi0xYzllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2nKb2c2j0fpdUIzr9Wwk0cDBVPaq4FoDpoBugMmyJE=)
We have some good news today, Peter.

**Yesterday’s vote count had us gaining ground on Mike Garcia.**

Here’s where we stand:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96812625/511275410/-613562098?refcode=em-11.8.24-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDk4NDNjMi0xYzllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2nKb2c2j0fpdUIzr9Wwk0cDBVPaq4FoDpoBugMmyJE=)
We’re closing the gap – now a little over 3,000 votes separate us and Garcia. We won over 55% of new ballots counted!

But as you can see, there are still tens of thousands of ballots left to count. We won’t rest until everyone’s voice is heard in this critical race for CA-27.

I know that the results of the presidency and the Senate are disheartening. But the good news is that _Democrats still have a chance of flipping the House and providing a check on extremism by winning this seat._

**[Help us ensure that every last vote is counted accurately and prepare for a very likely recount with $3 or any amount right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96812626/511275411/-613562098?refcode=em-11.8.24-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDk4NDNjMi0xYzllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2nKb2c2j0fpdUIzr9Wwk0cDBVPaq4FoDpoBugMmyJE=)**

subject: I’m losing it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=d16e88b35a7d4eac9d2d7dcd516ff479&_e=zR92o2f_wQll54oZKZD6kdf2Y2ZE_l6Air4wGgJ238dfd4YIL4SWdld-GAfbDUEQenGrG_GdOFA9Ys3pkJ_2uhD92BG8UxUi5WLYIudK9icthq5RCkT8rroyRjHWzoH-cVPvFe0kRpcq4TK3xyPFuQopQ5Y3ityiay0omnzZYWWEPRlxciRaB_Z7aoNw8nnoSKwRMN11Oie4CsR1-4CATO0sdeo-WD9kvXnCckrslOp0obRhckJLe-rBHqD87jhsiR-8D-DwcipHqVNLHERBkeNoxxwQ_88KIEsQt49I5akDg5JVXJ8-NFD_HRn6F7nFDIC03rtUyZPMsW6eheQFiE72a_sM_fRx7mxWP8wg74RCjDD6j8j0yClU-T0qLJwDPS0IyqO1qJZ8FqtLeJ-sXg4x_HItgmaJMlImyd44f-SJrvUczxOsKPkqlVhtVRFy) I’ve been spending all day talking to folks about Nevada’s Senate race, and I’ve all but lost my voice. But I’m gonna have to yell it one more time: **IS THERE ANYTHING I CAN SAY TO CONVINCE YOU TO CHIP IN TO JACKY ROSEN’S CAMPAIGN???** **[**SPLIT A DONATION**](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=d16e88b35a7d4eac9d2d7dcd516ff479&_e=zR92o2f_wQll54oZKZD6kdf2Y2ZE_l6Air4wGgJ238dXhXd_aR3yHy0nD7jQGhZ6ExXM88UPqem6sEmqNSkJ02ylpfD2ZVdplj2_TzjKmD71eymA0jmKZ9Qp7ZhZV3BhqssYb6aq_bte_zxBR3IhuEVXwhwbzaSw8zic9e6_6xMsAY8utszeqMWFQg0WD_tGMuHXBZ92znSSrxOPXucCpH2ZFemiRtSl5qLbcHmx212E6-JTh2j2Cu80s8vXtaIqxwfRWx9u3SXSDRHH858lqkDSUpNbUf7uVEdWPIf9SKztzTTBjdfINKH9yPJAIGUuaoY27jaEHTTquUH7IdRBWho_Stkz3b-SYAqMokKS4djmBZzkE9civahyAC0iaRTxUcujuHN2bxkhJOSdJwrZhmXDIrqT1xjAbrv5RvbvzkA%3D)** Jacky Rosen’s race was always going to come down to a narrow margin. After Democrats squeaked by with a 0.77% margin of victory in 2022, Republicans were dead set on flipping Nevada red – and they spent nearly $80 million to do it. With the help of this grassroots team, Jacky has run one of the best campaigns I’ve ever seen. But our work isn’t done yet.**This race is still going - and there are THOUSANDS of ballots that need to be counted.** If we let up now, Jacky’s Trump-endorsed opponent will flip this seat and be another vote to secure the worst of Trump’s agenda – including gutting the Affordable Care Act and passing a nationwide abortion ban. clean_body: | | | I’ve been spending all day talking to folks about Nevada’s Senate race, and I’ve all but lost my voice. But I’m gonna have to yell it one more time: IS THERE ANYTHING I CAN SAY TO CONVINCE YOU TO CHIP IN TO JACKY ROSEN’S CAMPAIGN??? Jacky Rosen’s race was always going to come down to a narrow margin. After Democrats squeaked by with a 0.77% margin of victory in 2022, Republicans were dead set on flipping Nevada red – and they spent nearly $80 million to do it. With the help of this grassroots team, Jacky has run one of the best campaigns I’ve ever seen. But our work isn’t done yet.This race is still going - and there are THOUSANDS of ballots that need to be counted. If we let up now, Jacky’s Trump-endorsed opponent will flip this seat and be another vote to secure the worst of Trump’s agenda – including gutting the Affordable Care Act and passing a nationwide abortion ban. Jacky Rosen has a path to victory, but we can’t make a single mistake. And lemme tell ya – letting her fall short of her emergency fundraising goal would be a HUGE MISTAKE RIGHT NOW!! name: Tamie Wilson
subject: My take on our race and what’s next
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
We’ve had some time to take a deeper look at our election numbers, and even though we came up short, there are some really encouraging trends.
Let’s break it down:
We received 123,693 votes—a major step forward, especially in such a challenging election year.
Compared to the last cycle, we gained 34,310 new supporters.
That’s not just growth; it’s proof that our message of standing up for everyday people, fighting Jim Jordan’s extremism, and exposing his 17 do-nothing years in Congress has resonated with voters.
People are listening, and we are far from done.
Our polling showed that when voters learned about Jim Jordan’s record, they were less likely to support him.
The problem?
The election season is just too short to reach everyone.
Plus, Jim Jordan and his ULTRA-MAGA cronies flooded the airwaves and digital spaces with millions of dollars worth of lies that we had to constantly combat.
That’s why I believe our next move has to be about building a powerful grassroots movement—one that keeps working year-round to inform voters, listen to their needs, and make them aware of Jordan’s failure to represent Ohioans.
As we look to the future, we’re focused on hammering home Jordan’s dismal record and ensuring that people understand just how much he’s failed to stand up for those who need it most.
Our veterans deserve access to the healthcare and resources they’ve earned, but Jordan voted against the PACT Act to support them.
Our seniors need affordable healthcare and secure Social Security, yet Jordan consistently backs plans to cut these lifelines.
And workers deserve fair wages and protections, but Jordan has repeatedly sided with corporate interests instead.
We all know Trump and Jordan have no interest in helping the working class. It’s clear who they’re working for—and it’s not everyday people like us.
We’re already strategizing our next steps and planning where we need to be to show up for those who feel ignored.
We know Jordan and his allies will keep doing what they do best: prioritizing themselves and their wealthy donors.
But we’ll be ready.
They can’t help but reveal their true colors, and when they do, we’ll be there, ready to respond.
To make sure we’re prepared, I’m asking for your help. Will you chip in now to help us close our books on this election? Every dollar helps us build the resources needed to act swiftly when Jordan and his allies inevitably stumble. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241108_vote_numbers_button]
Thank you for everything. This movement isn’t going anywhere—we’re just getting started.
Stay tuned.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

Delaware, OH 43015

name: John Fetterman
subject: Pennsylvania is now the frontline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We need your help to make sure every ballot is counted. Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now. His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need your help to make sure every ballot is counted. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The system is broken.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s clear that Democrats were not able to articulate clearly enough how we would improve people’s lives.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241108-4503-footer&t=1&akid=4503%2E420207%2EmyVY6z)
Peter, yesterday I had the chance to speak about what just happened to an incredible group of over 100,000 Democrats and progressive organizers on a mass call sponsored by more than 100 grassroots organizations. I wanted to make sure you heard the message too.
I’m sure we share a lot of theories as to what went wrong. But we need to listen to voters – not just hot takes. **The one thing we really know for sure: Democrats were not able to articulate clearly enough how we would improve people’s lives.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241108?refcode=em20241108-4503&amount=3&refcode2=4503_420207_myVY6z&akid=4503%2E420207%2EmyVY6z)
[**If you’re ready to focus the Democratic Party’s efforts on progressive policies that will actually make a real difference in people’s lives, will you pitch in $3 today to help grow our movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241108?refcode=em20241108-4503&amount=3&refcode2=4503_420207_myVY6z&akid=4503%2E420207%2EmyVY6z)
A lot of people who voted for Donald Trump did so because they believe the system is broken — which they’re right about — and they saw Trump as someone who was willing to buck that system.
In several Trump states, voters simultaneously voted for ballot initiatives to raise the minimum wage, implement paid sick leave, and protect abortion access. Voters were clearly signaling they felt economic pain and attacks on their freedoms. We should listen to them.
Democrats need to do a better job of making it clear to voters how we will materially improve their lives. And as Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, that will be one of my top priorities in the coming months.
But Peter, I don’t take corporate PAC money, and there are already a lot of powerful voices calling for the Democratic Party to move further to the right. It’s going to take a sustained grassroots effort to make sure that we remain focused on the kind of progressive policies that will actually improve people’s lives.
**So while I know the 2024 election just ended, the work starts now to put ourselves in a position to rebuild and act on a bold progressive agenda after the next elections in 2026 and 2028.**
[**If you’re with me, will you pitch in $3 or anything you can to help grow our movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241108?refcode=em20241108-4503&amount=3&refcode2=4503_420207_myVY6z&akid=4503%2E420207%2EmyVY6z)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241108?amount=3&refcode=em20241108-4503&refcode2=4503_420207_myVY6z&akid=4503%2E420207%2EmyVY6z)**
Thank you,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241108-4503-footer&t=2&refcode2=4503_420207_myVY6z&akid=4503%2E420207%2EmyVY6z)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4503%2E420207%2EmyVY6z)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4503%2E420207%2EmyVY6z)

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Thank you, Southwest Washington.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marie for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

Thank you, Southwest Washington. Serving you in Congress is a profound honor and a gift I will never squander. I'm deeply grateful for this vote of confidence in the work I’ve done to set aside national politics and represent our community in Washington, D.C. I will continue to honestly reflect the independence of Southwest Washington in everything I do as our voice in D.C. Our heritage as fiercely independent, loyal fighters for our community is as clear to me as it was the day my family and I decided to ask for the privilege of working for our community.

I am deeply humbled by the tens of thousands of supporters who stood alongside me in this campaign, the patriotism and diligence of my staff, and for my friends and family – especially Dean – who have extended truth and grace to me on this challenging road. Your confidence in my ability to do this work and do it well has carried me through many long plane rides.

I will always be the person I was raised to be, someone who works to fix things, not break them. It has been a profound honor to be invited into so many living rooms, shop floors and community spaces across the district and the political spectrum – I’m deeply grateful to continue in this work. It is a privilege to listen, show up, do the work, and focus on substance, not slogans or sound bites.

To the people of Southwest Washington: I pledge to you that I will work every day to live up to the responsibility you have placed in me, I will continue to deliver results for our district, and I will continue to put the place we live above the national politics trying to divide us. It never will.

– Marie

---
|
* * *
---

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: FWD: let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | Did you see this?! A handful of House races in vital swing districts are still too close to call. [**_Please: This is our LAST chance to ensure we have a Democratic check on Trump’s power. So I’m personally asking you to read this urgent message – and then rush $15 before midnight to help rush emergency resources to any race that still needs it to make sure every last vote is counted fairly. Can I count on your support in this consequential moment for our nation and For The People? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96813653/511279167/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241108_em_fr_b2_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGRiMjVhZC0yMTllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9wMUg8Yi7h8ExaBC7iJQWFwXjuea0q5VLyVDh9LIpk=) [**\---------- Forwarded message ---------**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96813654/511279168/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241108_em_fr_b2_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGRiMjVhZC0yMTllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9wMUg8Yi7h8ExaBC7iJQWFwXjuea0q5VLyVDh9LIpk=) We are all disappointed right now. But I am urging you to stay focused on the fight to win the House, which is still underway. – As of 5pm, many House races are still too close to call.
– It is absolutely critical that every last ballot is counted FAIRLY.
[**– Why? Because we only need to flip a handful of these races to win back our majority – and make Hakeem Jeffries the Speaker of the House.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96813655/511279169/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241108_em_fr_b2_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGRiMjVhZC0yMTllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9wMUg8Yi7h8ExaBC7iJQWFwXjuea0q5VLyVDh9LIpk=) I need you to understand the severity of this situation: [**With Republicans projected to control the Senate in January – the ONLY check that we can count on against Trump’s unfettered power grab will be a Democratic House. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96813656/511279170/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241108_em_fr_b2_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGRiMjVhZC0yMTllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9wMUg8Yi7h8ExaBC7iJQWFwXjuea0q5VLyVDh9LIpk=) [**_Hear me: Many races likely spent down to absolute zero on Election Day. If we want to win the House, we MUST now send emergency resources to states that are still counting votes, and other Democrats who need it. We MUST be certain that every last vote is counted fairly. We MUST ensure Democrats have everything they need to finish these fights out strong. I set an ambitious goal to raise 5,000 donations in the next 7 hours. I hate to ask this of you. I know you have given so much already. I know you are tired, spent, and ready to put this election behind us and start fresh. Peter, I know the last few days haven’t gone how we’d hoped.

I’ve been through some tough times in my life. Times when it seemed foolish to hope, when the outcome was uncertain. I got through those tough times by fighting my way to the other side. Today, tomorrow, and the next day, we have to fight.

With Republican control of the Senate assured, every seat that we win is a check on their control. I won’t shy away from working with anyone if it’s in the best interest of Arizona, but whatever power we retain is a mechanism for fighting the worst that might come our way.

My race is still too close to call. There are hundreds of thousands of votes yet to be counted. We need to run through the tape and win this seat in Arizona.

**_[Please, make a split donation to my campaign and Letitia James. Give one last push to victory in Arizona. This matters, Peter. We need to run through the tape and win this seat in Arizona. = ______If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Letitia James and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately__: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Ruben | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

body:
Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now.
His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need your help to make sure every ballot is counted.
Bob’s team is working hard to make all Pennsylvanians have their voice heard, but they need the resources to make that happen.
Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑 and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪
[**So please, donate $5 or whatever you can to Bob Casey today. Let’s make sure his team has the resources they need to count every last vote.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241108-5?refcode=em20241108-5&refcode2=4806_552475_eoBIak&akid=4806%2E552475%2EeoBIak)

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Trump Wins! What NEXT!
