body:
Happy Veteran's Day!

[INSIDE JW]

HISTORIC ELECTION: President Trump Needs to Clean House

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33844&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1kZG10enQzdXNydyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c228c2e5fafcedd267ba15689c2fc0cebd821ecbc3eaf807cca72ddc68e489a1]
Judicial Watch congratulates President Trump on his remarkable
election as 47th president of the United States. The voters broadly
and directly repudiated the lawfare targeting Trump, as well as the
dangerous government abuses and contempt for the rule of law endemic
here in Washington, DC.

President Trump had to overcome unprecedented abuse by corrupt and
partisan prosecutors, politicians and judges – all of whom tried to
rig the election by smearing, raiding, investigating, prosecuting,
trying, convicting, and gagging President Trump.

In short, President Trump needs to clean house. The FBI and Justice
Department are irredeemably corrupt. And the government abusers who
targeted Trump and other innocent Americans should be subjected to
criminal investigation. And, as sunlight is the best disinfectant,
President Trump should open wide the Deep State files on politicized
Deep State lies and corruption – especially its war on the rule of
law, constitutional government, our First Amendment and other civil
rights.

We are ready, willing and able to help (and sue) for government
accountability as we continue our mission to uncover what the
government is up to and enforce the rule of law for election
integrity, immigration, and against woke discrimination and racism.

In my new book
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33845&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20vXV9SaWdodHM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=bd9621e575ab09f756f87035b675b2355d169a57375d2de9f741a11dcf879b22
and Freedoms in
Peril_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=32838&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=ba8bd96ab41142a1841e8c567ecfc4a6ccfc96704092458b4162b48c53db16a5]
I detail a long chain of
abuses officials and politicians have made against the American people
and call readers to battle for “the soul and survival of America.”
The book details how the progressive movement threatens America’s
most venerable institutions, undermining the core principles that make
this country a beacon of hope to the world.

Through open records laws, we frequently request records from the
government and sue when it refuses to release them. For example:

* Recently, we uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33846&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGFycmlzLXNlY3JldC1zZXJ2aWNlLWRldGFpbC9dcmVjb3Jkcz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e26920fc583b0c90e87b0e4ed3d284d87c0fb334ff300762a265699642ff7361
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33820&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGFycmlzLXNlY3JldC1zZXJ2aWNlLWRldGFpbC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9deb28d17459ee6a7664216582b3583e0bdf8fb84d93e543cd38b76c3de46fdf]
from the
Department of Homeland Security which show,
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33847&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnVzaW5lc3NpbnNpZGVyLmNvbS9zZWNyZXQtc2VydmljZS1idXN0ZWQtc2Fsb24tdXNlLWJhdGhyb29tLW93bmVyLTIwMjQtOF1jb250cmFyeT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=23b62bce3d9275ba3694661fb9f5d623ff136729f50eae01e7dde0e2fbc68663
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33787&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnVzaW5lc3NpbnNpZGVyLmNvbS9zZWNyZXQtc2VydmljZS1idXN0ZWQtc2Fsb24tdXNlLWJhdGhyb29tLW93bmVyLTIwMjQtOD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=cf47e2bf2ab6f15b025f86a46f12b1872cd6d455e8891087f697b5ff701c937a]
to what it told the media, that least one U.S. Secret Service agent
broke in to a hair salon and taped over the salon’s security camera
in Pittsfield, MA, during a July 27, 2024, campaign fundraising visit
by Vice President Kamala Harris.

* In October, we
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33848&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWlyLWZvcmNlLWFjYWRlbXlzLWRlaS9dc3VlZD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=bf8a22bdb9de3bca8dfd30b2cd54538cd2b02ac9b0bf813ba6130a43f0bc8c49
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33640&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWlyLWZvcmNlLWFjYWRlbXlzLWRlaS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=2b0618d89dabbdedf04feaea9c078f221f1b49afedac2e6d04e076701c687a89]
on behalf of
Stand Together Against Racism and Radicalism in the Services, Inc.
(STARRS) against the U.S. Department of Defense for records regarding
the U.S. Air Force Academy’s diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI)
plans.

* In August, we received
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33849&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmVkLWFnZW5jeS10cm9sbGluZy1zb2NpYWwtbWVkaWEvXXJlY29yZHM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=33f9df21abf6f34dc7031e718b3bcd308620d3a1f28591823d879286f0b41262
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33343&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmVkLWFnZW5jeS10cm9sbGluZy1zb2NpYWwtbWVkaWEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b1b1b17f2b9d54af0454a10a4dba0a75634121054629e2416b869fd1cd7416ed]
from
the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA – a
component of the Department of Homeland Security (DHS)) revealing that
CISA is trolling on social media and reporting on alleged “domestic
violent extremism” (DVE).

* In May, we reported on a
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33850&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmFpZC1vZi10cnVtcHMtaG9tZS9dcGhvbmU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f9dae380548d9ff1ba4d691dbc5392a3509208c01f807ee6124ab9667d0ec3b1
message
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=32339&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmFpZC1vZi10cnVtcHMtaG9tZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9a9ce94681988da6e02c7fd65c6c48a23a742e7c1daf21d923acd26aedd660a1]
left by an FBI
special agent for someone at the Secret Service in the context of the
raid on President Trump’s home in Mar-a-Lago, Florida.

* The U.S. Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33851&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmFtZXMtb2YtdG9wLXN0YWZmLWFudGktdHJ1bXAvXWlzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=9f214885f6a38e231b29cb72326b54a06fc148ec642e6f9d76e7bc825b6b70c3
asking
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=31981&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmFtZXMtb2YtdG9wLXN0YWZmLWFudGktdHJ1bXAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f983bb930d170366a97627dca8c343257ec206b62fce008c7bee21f62e8ad904]
a federal court to allow the agency to keep secret the names of top
staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office that has
been targeting President Donald Trump and other Americans.

Let’s hope we enter a pro-transparency and anti-corruption era
under the new Trump administration. You can be sure that Judicial
Watch will remain front and center in these battles either way!

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES GARLAND JUSTICE DEPARTMENT OVER ELECTION ROBOCALL
CONTROVERSY

I don’t trust the Justice Department.

Judicial Watch just had to file a FOIA
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33852&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXZyYS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDMxMDkvXWxhd3N1aXQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f0ec4de4ecb358f31d1f243daf40e4ebd651b88b0bffb4642a699c1b07794db1
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33833&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXZyYS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDMxMDkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=ec57ad4faf12767f6204b902bf2197d5e62efc527a9149d03221cce12d0981cc]
against the Department of Justice for records regarding the Justice
Department’s involvement in the League of Women Voters’
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33853&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF3LmNvcm5lbGwuZWR1L3VzY29kZS90ZXh0LzUyLzEwMzA3XU5hdGlvbmFsP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4503eab062bdadd88a29682e4d5e9c325660e94c865bb91881e076cd1a513a51
Voting
Rights Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33834&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF3LmNvcm5lbGwuZWR1L3VzY29kZS90ZXh0LzUyLzEwMzA3P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=123eec984e4f5cfa17894e66a1a860867a019147edb5aafe7fc8f3da60baedcd]
lawsuit
concerning fake Biden robocalls conducted during New Hampshire primary
(_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33833&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXZyYS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDMxMDkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=ec57ad4faf12767f6204b902bf2197d5e62efc527a9149d03221cce12d0981cc]
(No. 1:24-cv-03109)).

We sued after the Department of Justice failed to respond to a
September 24, 2024, FOIA request for:

> Records of the Office of Legal Counsel, including emails, text
> messages, voicemail messages, video conferences, briefings, notes,
> or other form of record regarding the Voting Rights Act (52 U.S.C.
> § 10307(b)); robocalls; Steve Kramer; Lingo Telecom, LLC; Voice
> Broadcasting Corporation; or Life Corporation.
In February, during this year’s presidential primary season in New
Hampshire, an elections consultant, Steve Kramer, commissioned
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33854&F=T&&hash=ae8a9af37faa357b0bae61c8ada3c07c7a6561e2e79fa8f9866e50bfeb3b1fa6
fake robocall
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33835&F=T&&hash=163d07976d30f2fb320c0eaa6eeac1141fb493bd17ff380500f61f1cbe31f447]
using artificial intelligence (AI) to impersonate Joe Biden’s voice
to urge New Hampshire voters not to participate in the state’s
January 23 primary. New Hampshire’s attorney general charged Kramer
with
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33855&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud211ci5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZS9zdGV2ZS1rcmFtZXItYWktcm9ib2NhbGxzLWJpZGVuLWluZGljdG1lbnQtNTIyMjQvNjA4NzU0MjJdMTM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=bfb3f9ab15f68d5fd880a7518ff2eec1be664c75dabba0d59ff7b16e62c4506c
felony counts
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33836&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud211ci5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZS9zdGV2ZS1rcmFtZXItYWktcm9ib2NhbGxzLWJpZGVuLWluZGljdG1lbnQtNTIyMjQvNjA4NzU0MjI/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=08ee304405bf68eca5eb10aa012a9bee629161ae9ba1741ad94ce6c03ee9f71c]
of voter suppression and 13 misdemeanor counts of impersonation of a
candidate.

Subsequently, the League of Women Voters
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33856&F=T&&hash=03e0615f0256d892cad30eeb6c482c4ea36770e23e273f8e62108a90852b7435
a lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33837&F=T&&hash=d2feb74cb0a92f24885ee9b74e9dacd7a4c88d1e57eff115eeee28ecc90e797a]
against Kramer and other firms involved in the fake call.

The Biden Justice Department clearly has something to hide. Was there
selective prosecution and collusion with allied leftist groups as a
favor to the Biden-Harris campaign? You can expect many more
lawsuits and investigations to uncover the full truth about this
thoroughly corrupt Justice Department.

OBAMA JUDGE SAYS MILITARY MUST COVER GENDER TRANSITION SURGERY

Can you imagine what General George Washington’s response would be
to what is going on in our military today? Our _Corruption Chronicles_
blog looks at
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33839&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZ2VuZGVyLXRyYW5zaXRpb24tc3VyZ2VyeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=0236980fe4639608adec13490dd56545b51474e6fee2a52d73897a09e6da1370]
the gender
madness “encouraged” by an Obama judicial appointee.

> The U.S. military’s health insurance plan is discriminatory and
> violates Equal Protection rights under the Fifth Amendment of the
> United States Constitution by failing to cover costly gender
> transition surgeries, an Obama-appointed federal judge ruled
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33857&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21pbGl0YXJ5dHJhbnNnZW5kZXJydWxpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8f258ad897a6abcc2bc062b277186bf63de7b7b5d5589b713c86cd0c8d49d973]

> ago. Two transgender women sued the Department of Defense (DOD), the
> U.S. Defense Health Agency, Secretary of Defense Lloyd J. Austin III
> and the agency’s Tricare Health Plan over a provision that bans
> surgical coverage of procedures that improve physical appearance
> without a significant restoration of functions, including “sex
> gender changes.” The biological males, who want to be female,
> claim in their lawsuit that denying coverage of medically necessary
> gender transition surgeries violates their Constitutional Equal
> Protection rights, a guarantee that requires the government “to
> treat alike all persons similarly situated.”
>
> In court documents the plaintiffs are identified as Jane Doe and
> Susan Roe and they receive health insurance through Tricare as
> dependents of former service members. The health plan covers more
> than 9.6 million active-duty servicemembers, retirees, and their
> families providing services at military hospitals and clinics around
> the world as well as a civilian network of providers. Tricare offers
> transgender patients services
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71024&L=33859&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90cmljYXJlLm1pbC9Db3ZlcmVkU2VydmljZXMvSXNJdENvdmVyZWQvR2VuZGVyRHlzcGhvcmlhU2VydmljZXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8a3db3557366412bbad955ba66a2d4273d447322722f51d264cf81dbc5a6448f]
> that include hormone therapy and psychological counseling for gender
> dysphoria, which is identified as “psychological distress that
> results from an incongruence between one’s sex assigned at birth
> and one’s gender identity.” However, it does not cover surgery
> for the treatment of gender dysphoria, the insurance plan’s
> website states, adding that active-duty service members may request
> a waiver for “medically necessary gender affirming surgery.”
>
> The transgender plaintiffs in this case have both received at least
> one surgery to treat gender dysphoria and say they will need more
> surgeries in the future. One has been enrolled in Tricare since 2002
> and the other since 2023 and both “were assigned male at birth and
> have female gender identities,” according to the recently issued
> ruling. Neither procedure was paid for by Tricare, but the men took
> legal action to get the military insurance to cover future surgeries
> by claiming its policy discriminates based on sex and transgender
> status. An Obama-appointed federal judge in Maine, Nancy Torresen,
> agreed, writing in her decision that the exclusion violates the
> Constitution’s Equal Protection clause because it “expressly
> excludes sex gender changes from Tricare coverage.” Furthermore,
> Judge Torresen writes that gender transition surgery is not
> “cosmetic,” but rather “medically necessary” because the
> goal is to effectively treat a serious medical condition not enhance
> beauty or appearance. “In other words, surgery treats gender
> dysphoria by addressing the incongruence between a transgender
> person’s anatomy and their immutable brain-based gender
> identity,” according to the judge.
>
> The 28-page ruling provides detailed information about gender
> identity and dysphoria and cites standards of care issued by an
> international nonprofit, World Professional Association for
> Transgender Health (WPATH), considered to be an authority on the
> issue. The misalignment between gender identity and birth sex, known
> as “gender incongruence,” means a transgender person feels
> “wrongly embodied” due to their anatomy, the ruling explains,
> adding that it may be medically necessary for the health and
> wellbeing of some transgender people to take steps to live
> consistently with their gender identity. “If untreated, gender
> incongruence may lead to gender dysphoria, which can be a serious
> medical condition,” Torresen’s ruling states. The judge also
> writes that WPATH considers medically necessary treatment for people
> with gender dysphoria to range from hormone therapies to surgical
> procedures that include chest reconstruction, facial feminization,
> and genital reconstruction. Torresen points out that the same
> procedures also treat conditions other than gender dysphoria. “For
> example, mastectomies, hysterectomies, salpingo-oophorectomies, and
> orchiectomies can treat cancer, and genital reconstruction may be
> performed after removing a patient’s genitalia due to cancer,
> injury, or infection,” she writes.

HAPPY VETERANS DAY!

We would not have the great nation we have without the men and women
who sacrificed to defend it, and so it is fitting that every year on
November 11 we honor them.

That date was set in November 1919, when President Wilson proclaimed
November 11 as the first commemoration of Armistice Day with the
following words:

> “To us in America, the reflections of Armistice Day will be filled
> with solemn pride in the heroism of those who died in the
> country’s service and with gratitude for the victory, both because
> of the thing from which it has freed us and because of the
> opportunity it has given America to show her sympathy with peace and
> justice in the councils of the nations...”
We join all Americans in saluting our veterans – especially our
many veterans on staff here at Judicial Watch! God bless them and
God bless America!

Until next week,

clean_body: Happy Veteran's Day! [INSIDE JW] HISTORIC ELECTION: President Trump Needs to Clean House [] Judicial Watch congratulates President Trump on his remarkable election as 47th president of the United States. The voters broadly and directly repudiated the lawfare targeting Trump, as well as the dangerous government abuses and contempt for the rule of law endemic here in Washington, DC. President Trump had to overcome unprecedented abuse by corrupt and partisan prosecutors, politicians and judges – all of whom tried to rig the election by smearing, raiding, investigating, prosecuting, trying, convicting, and gagging President Trump. In short, President Trump needs to clean house. The FBI and Justice Department are irredeemably corrupt. And the government abusers who targeted Trump and other innocent Americans should be subjected to criminal investigation. And, as sunlight is the best disinfectant, President Trump should open wide the Deep State files on politicized Deep State lies and corruption – especially its war on the rule of law, constitutional government, our First Amendment and other civil rights. We are ready, willing and able to help (and sue) for government accountability as we continue our mission to uncover what the government is up to and enforce the rule of law for election integrity, immigration, and against woke discrimination and racism. In my new book [ and Freedoms in Peril [] I detail a long chain of abuses officials and politicians have made against the American people and call readers to battle for “the soul and survival of America.” The book details how the progressive movement threatens America’s most venerable institutions, undermining the core principles that make this country a beacon of hope to the world. Through open records laws, we frequently request records from the government and sue when it refuses to release them. For example: Recently, we uncovered [ [] from the Department of Homeland Security which show, [ [] to what it told the media, that least one U.S. Secret Service agent broke in to a hair salon and taped over the salon’s security camera in Pittsfield, MA, during a July 27, 2024, campaign fundraising visit by Vice President Kamala Harris. In October, we [ [] on behalf of Stand Together Against Racism and Radicalism in the Services, Inc. (STARRS) against the U.S. Department of Defense for records regarding the U.S. Air Force Academy’s diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) plans. In August, we received [ [] from the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA – a component of the Department of Homeland Security (DHS)) revealing that CISA is trolling on social media and reporting on alleged “domestic violent extremism” (DVE). In May, we reported on a [ message [] left by an FBI special agent for someone at the Secret Service in the context of the raid on President Trump’s home in Mar-a-Lago, Florida. * The U.S. Department of Justice [ asking [] a federal court to allow the agency to keep secret the names of top staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office that has been targeting President Donald Trump and other Americans. Let’s hope we enter a pro-transparency and anti-corruption era under the new Trump administration. You can be sure that Judicial Watch will remain front and center in these battles either way! JUDICIAL WATCH SUES GARLAND JUSTICE DEPARTMENT OVER ELECTION ROBOCALL CONTROVERSY I don’t trust the Justice Department. Judicial Watch just had to file a FOIA [ [] against the Department of Justice for records regarding the Justice Department’s involvement in the League of Women Voters’ [ Voting Rights Act [] lawsuit concerning fake Biden robocalls conducted during New Hampshire primary (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:24-cv-03109)). We sued after the Department of Justice failed to respond to a September 24, 2024, FOIA request for: Records of the Office of Legal Counsel, including emails, text messages, voicemail messages, video conferences, briefings, notes, or other form of record regarding the Voting Rights Act (52 U.S.C. § 10307(b)); robocalls; Steve Kramer; Lingo Telecom, LLC; Voice Broadcasting Corporation; or Life Corporation. In February, during this year’s presidential primary season in New Hampshire, an elections consultant, Steve Kramer, commissioned [ fake robocall [] using artificial intelligence (AI) to impersonate Joe Biden’s voice to urge New Hampshire voters not to participate in the state’s January 23 primary. New Hampshire’s attorney general charged Kramer with [ felony counts [] of voter suppression and 13 misdemeanor counts of impersonation of a candidate. Subsequently, the League of Women Voters [ a lawsuit [] against Kramer and other firms involved in the fake call. The Biden Justice Department clearly has something to hide. Was there selective prosecution and collusion with allied leftist groups as a favor to the Biden-Harris campaign? You can expect many more lawsuits and investigations to uncover the full truth about this thoroughly corrupt Justice Department. OBAMA JUDGE SAYS MILITARY MUST COVER GENDER TRANSITION SURGERY Can you imagine what General George Washington’s response would be to what is going on in our military today? Our Corruption Chronicles_ blog looks at [] the gender madness “encouraged” by an Obama judicial appointee. The U.S. military’s health insurance plan is discriminatory and violates Equal Protection rights under the Fifth Amendment of the United States Constitution by failing to cover costly gender transition surgeries, an Obama-appointed federal judge ruled [] [ ago. Two transgender women sued the Department of Defense (DOD), the U.S. Defense Health Agency, Secretary of Defense Lloyd J. Austin III and the agency’s Tricare Health Plan over a provision that bans surgical coverage of procedures that improve physical appearance without a significant restoration of functions, including “sex gender changes.” The biological males, who want to be female, claim in their lawsuit that denying coverage of medically necessary gender transition surgeries violates their Constitutional Equal Protection rights, a guarantee that requires the government “to treat alike all persons similarly situated.” In court documents the plaintiffs are identified as Jane Doe and Susan Roe and they receive health insurance through Tricare as dependents of former service members. The health plan covers more than 9.6 million active-duty servicemembers, retirees, and their families providing services at military hospitals and clinics around the world as well as a civilian network of providers. Tricare offers transgender patients services [] that include hormone therapy and psychological counseling for gender dysphoria, which is identified as “psychological distress that results from an incongruence between one’s sex assigned at birth and one’s gender identity.” However, it does not cover surgery for the treatment of gender dysphoria, the insurance plan’s website states, adding that active-duty service members may request a waiver for “medically necessary gender affirming surgery.” The transgender plaintiffs in this case have both received at least one surgery to treat gender dysphoria and say they will need more surgeries in the future. One has been enrolled in Tricare since 2002 and the other since 2023 and both “were assigned male at birth and have female gender identities,” according to the recently issued ruling. Neither procedure was paid for by Tricare, but the men took legal action to get the military insurance to cover future surgeries by claiming its policy discriminates based on sex and transgender status. An Obama-appointed federal judge in Maine, Nancy Torresen, agreed, writing in her decision that the exclusion violates the Constitution’s Equal Protection clause because it “expressly excludes sex gender changes from Tricare coverage.” Furthermore, Judge Torresen writes that gender transition surgery is not “cosmetic,” but rather “medically necessary” because the goal is to effectively treat a serious medical condition not enhance beauty or appearance. “In other words, surgery treats gender dysphoria by addressing the incongruence between a transgender person’s anatomy and their immutable brain-based gender identity,” according to the judge. The 28-page ruling provides detailed information about gender identity and dysphoria and cites standards of care issued by an international nonprofit, World Professional Association for Transgender Health (WPATH), considered to be an authority on the issue. The misalignment between gender identity and birth sex, known as “gender incongruence,” means a transgender person feels “wrongly embodied” due to their anatomy, the ruling explains, adding that it may be medically necessary for the health and wellbeing of some transgender people to take steps to live consistently with their gender identity. “If untreated, gender incongruence may lead to gender dysphoria, which can be a serious medical condition,” Torresen’s ruling states. The judge also writes that WPATH considers medically necessary treatment for people with gender dysphoria to range from hormone therapies to surgical procedures that include chest reconstruction, facial feminization, and genital reconstruction. Torresen points out that the same procedures also treat conditions other than gender dysphoria. “For example, mastectomies, hysterectomies, salpingo-oophorectomies, and orchiectomies can treat cancer, and genital reconstruction may be performed after removing a patient’s genitalia due to cancer, injury, or infection,” she writes. HAPPY VETERANS DAY! We would not have the great nation we have without the men and women who sacrificed to defend it, and so it is fitting that every year on November 11 we honor them. That date was set in November 1919, when President Wilson proclaimed November 11 as the first commemoration of Armistice Day with the following words: “To us in America, the reflections of Armistice Day will be filled with solemn pride in the heroism of those who died in the country’s service and with gratitude for the victory, both because of the thing from which it has freed us and because of the opportunity it has given America to show her sympathy with peace and justice in the councils of the nations...” We join all Americans in saluting our veterans – especially our many veterans on staff here at Judicial Watch! God bless them and God bless America! Until next week, [Contribute] [] [advertisement] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2024, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Can you join me on a Zoom about the election at 4pm PT / 7pm ET?

body:
I'll be getting on the call shortly and hope to see you there.

Friends —
I know this is last minute, but I am hosting a Zoom call in a few minutes (7pm ET / 4pm PT), and I would LOVE to see you there.
We're talking about the election, what happens next, and what we are doing in California as Trump gets set to return to office.

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39282%2E3422442%2EbFi7tj)
Derek,
The fight for the House isn’t over.
Votes are still being counted in California’s 45th district, where veteran and consumer rights attorney Derek Tran has been running to flip this critical swing seat from red to blue. The final margin is likely to be narrow, and the race could go to a recount.
We need to make sure that all votes are counted in CA-45—it could flip this seat and be the difference between a Democratic House majority and a GOP trifecta in Washington. _Will you act now?_
**[Please make a split contribution now to support Derek Tran in a potential recount. The House majority is on the line.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241108-2?refcode=em20241108-39282&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39282_3422442_bFi7tj&akid=39282%2E3422442%2EbFi7tj)**

I am proud that Derek Tran was one of my first endorsements for this campaign cycle. I know Derek will fiercely defend Californians’ rights and freedoms in Congress.
Any amount you can give will help every vote get counted in this critical race.
Thank you,
Katie

Peter, it is okay to feel sad and disappointed about the outcome of the presidential election. But, as I said on Wednesday, _we can’t ever give up._ There are critical Senate races where ballots are still being counted. These Senate seats -- in Arizona and Nevada -- will determine our ability to put a check on Donald Trump's power. [**We must continue to fight to ensure that every vote is counted and every voice is heard in those races. That is why I am asking you to support the Harris Fight Fund program today.**](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jw19nK6Yk904jr2ZtjiO4RdFcI_M9LJtmDQgg6k1hTm6jQbzg-6wDxcSdomrZjR4-HbQEHdX-Z1MMnekcH0u3UbKyJr8Qo84RYDHpf-QhfPX629yToq1NphWYpzPVVzlxrfYrKu_58DD15zYLHyrriajZ6E9BT6ji4z6nXwV0KxdHsHmcovY1NXIr_HBXgSagC38QNjNk4w8JJKA1FW8WLU39C3zijuoJ6NRCUGEfEDteBrysVB04h9rpefTO6aYqtJOFOttxX6sZe5LfD4b6gZrL1O9RaJYTD7IgQ0FJVsuQ7BloxEGXNq0WT2mz9_Gmj3i6KaLA05NRCqe-FQR1FAK1L5vaEqqdDbTNt3GKLpt4f2AlAnm1CY2B8tem3nLxl9Cleb8EPvb6hfTjymbKIwir0Mo6TCEHc0FokQHvHRxS2pk-UWfxCJYAPyXsYIM6F2Vq2Ddfep6liPkjYpb3xfKQ2-tKKLDcrc_JTuYaqrotKvPI4S4-JBo5fpWCrzepBlj_PkED8jD7UOMFkF6hQHhU4dl7p31WKJpCitM8ZVcTRXN0KnFzBwW9wRGmTVYME/4ba/F4Ahk2QDSYKFgsp2buzlOw/h1/h001.umXGfuCwxJzRfgM39v_ZEv0-b3oKkpLnF02-QdfIWas) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$50 >>](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jw19nK6Yk904jr2ZtjiO4RdFcI_M9LJtmDQgg6k1hTm6jQbzg-6wDxcSdomrZjR4-HbQEHdX-Z1MMnekcH0u3UbKyJr8Qo84RYDHpf-QhfPX629yToq1NphWYpzPVVzlxrfYrKu_58DD15zYLHyrriajZ6E9BT6ji4z6nXwV0KxdHsHmcovY1NXIr_HBXgSagC38QNjNk4w8JJKA1FW8WLU39C3zijuoJ6NRCUGEfEDteBrysVB04h9rpefTO6aYqtJOFOttxX6sZe5LfD4b6gZrL1O9RaJYTD7IgQ0FJVsuQ7BloxEGXNq0WT2mz9_Gmj3i6KaLA05NRCqe-FQR1FAh0_93XGgl5MGTd27f3Sy0ivdhyUPYoUOyDxequeBcGizcaDNlDi-p6kKkdvsXuvkYWzqcv6_uL1J9nbZckoaQ41VRt3SnYbYo8FG1w5OqRQc0YDmkSr6zQpyBJy8DJ7K5kBoEE9DVx3wbzVnLibXtxcRetNrYRryyh29DcUkn4tFitQJisaVJ1uoGS7lqaXxm1dqXSVleZmheGAsC6mFNsTt6kcigoljPzICRW5SzlmCNRx6a-disc_RdsVZRmYB/4ba/F4Ahk2QDSYKFgsp2buzlOw/h2/h001.8GJ5BR-AaT5ZhF6ggkKBinJ2jEUomuAarkI2V6_RnKw)

The first $41,300/$15,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to the DNC. The next $3,300/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Harris for President’s Recount Account. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. clean_body: We must continue to fight to ensure that every vote is counted and every voice is heard. | | | Peter, it is okay to feel sad and disappointed about the outcome of the presidential election. But, as I said on Wednesday, we can’t ever give up. There are critical Senate races where ballots are still being counted. These Senate seats -- in Arizona and Nevada -- will determine our ability to put a check on Donald Trump's power. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Here’s the thing: Sometimes the fight takes a while. That doesn’t mean we won’t win. And it certainly does not mean we stop fighting. Now is not the time to throw up our hands. It is time to roll up our sleeves. Thank you for your support, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States | | | |

name: Kari Lake Headquarters
subject: Make sure that our voice is heard and our ballots are counted

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Nevada's Senate race is still up in the air -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We can't afford to lose this seat
| | | Here's where things stand, friend: **Nevada's Senate race is up in the air – which means our work isn't done yet. And we're expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.**

We cannot afford to lose this seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they'll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban.

Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: [**Please, will you split $5 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and the DSCC to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue and fight for the Senate?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/20538?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20241108-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20241108-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=18886%2E9716520%2Eyy21UO)
| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/20538?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20241108-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20241108-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=18886%2E9716520%2Eyy21UO)
---
Your donation will be split between Jacky Rosen for Senate's recount account and the DSCC to fight for the Senate.
We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country.

Our work isn't done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But today, we're starting all over again from scratch, which is why we've set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win.

**So please, friend, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment:[Split $5 or more right now to help us get across the finish line and fight for the Senate.](https://go.dscc.org/go/20538?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20241108-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20241108-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=18886%2E9716520%2Eyy21UO)**
